name: Adam Schiff
subject: The greatest threat to our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Just after announcing my run for Senate, I stopped by Pod Save America to
discuss my campaign, housing, our democracy, The Big Lebowski (of course),
and more.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]Adam Schiff and Jon Favreau recording on the set of Pod Save America

During our conversation, host Jon Favreau asked what keeps me up at night.

I listed my concerns about foreign powers — but then I said what I’ve said
all along: The greatest threat to our democracy does not come from
outside, but from within.

That’s why it’s so important we never allow another person like Trump (or
his imitators like DeSantis) to wreak havoc on our republic, and it’s why
I’m running for Senate: We must have leaders in the Senate committed to
protecting our rights and freedoms, and our democracy, building it back
stronger, and holding accountable those who would tear it down.

I know that both our economy and our democracy are at risk, and we must
fight back. I’ve been at the center of that fight for years, and I’m not
about to back down now.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]So I hope you’ll consider pitching in a few dollars to support my
campaign. We’re still in the early stages, and anything you can chip in
right now goes a very long way as we build a movement for the long haul:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dZVEvl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=mar2023_abs_em.7h-CrL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=mar2023_abs_em.o650ZW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=mar2023_abs_em.5OS6KE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

P.S. If you want to hear how we got from talking about my campaign and
talking about wonky housing policy all the way to quoting The Big
Lebowski, you can watch the full interview [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1819?t=1013&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]here.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=mar2023_abs_em.4Qw1zC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=1957%2E5257348%2EffvYQ4 ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Trump Investigation Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Update from Georgia >>
body:
A special grand jury investigating Trump and his allies’ attempts to interfere with election results in Georgia recommended multiple indictments | | |
---
| | **UPDATE:****A special grand jury investigating Trump and his allies’ attempts to interfere with election results in Georgia recommended _multiple_ indictments.** Trump could FINALLY be held accountable for his bogus claims of election fraud – and an indictment could BLOCK Trump’s path back to the White House. That’s why he’s already gearing up to fight back – his defense attorneys stated **they’ll fight “tooth and nail” if he’s indicted** and even claimed the investigation was compromised! [_**Indicting Trump could change _everything_ , so we’re asking Democrats in your area to share whether you think Trump should be indicted: **_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1Tbs8gPQ6tirXTh9suxADR4Tf_LrLdiHiopoL--zP1qvuNx7d9JKjEkfZ5AvSifaYeLTGExS6siJLavuPqDW_Ggk604qVGhOubAeCJDVyCja1DqREiVXK_EFWS3eWZJzWgacwOquBgURbgBQ8duRmQCckb9ImIzx8e749BxpQxagwNe_QCE9ZROUPwBscKMC6QaAUA_9MfPQh-no5glckWHpK1N2I93iM8OhXSQnRxLjbjphyRmXJyA69_SKWip4NvbbElib0rkg_Op_ctVr-lfFR92acs0m-Bu12Qzns3dFKID73amRX5MTjoX4xDga15g/3uk/uxu4XgU-S3uOPH3wblP6TQ/h0/RduxkH9I4KFAkesZete134fcrnr0ny7cSm0e_fE1Js4) | **Do you think Trump should be indicted for his attempts to overturn the 2020 election?**

In every elected office – legislators, county recorders, and Members of Congress – the AZ GOP are making a mess of representing the people of Arizona. We cannot stand to have them still in those positions come the next election cycle, not when there are Democrats who are eager to get to work for Arizona.

AZ Dems are making it our focus to win races across this state, and we need the help of every one of our supporters to make it happen.

We need to start our work to flip these seats _right now_. The early momentum we were able to build last election cycle is why we had so many gains. To win these seats, we must start building up our resources __today.

**[We must hit our goal of $10,000 by midnight tonight to stay on track in flipping GOP seats blue. In every elected office – legislators, county recorders, and Members of Congress – the AZ GOP are making a mess of representing the people of Arizona. We cannot stand to have them still in those positions come the next election cycle, not when there are Democrats who are eager to get to work for Arizona. AZ Dems are making it our focus to win races across this state, and we need the help of every one of our supporters to make it happen. We need to start our work to flip these seats right now. The early momentum we were able to build last election cycle is why we had so many gains. To win these seats, we must start building up our resources today. name: Rep. Monica De La CRUZ
subject: Petition: No more private jets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
The Homeland Security secretary continues to fly on private government planes, courtesy of the American taxpayer, while illegal immigrants storm the border with impunity. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=312ca0b4eee24f18962b3e195a1148c7&_e=BsOZyMLExnnotpCz9_ykpIoKPWX_pSrP404uw9cRzIUE8PTZWj-_s-Ukt9uU4AVwzmL-spAVPd7R2cOUl_yqvhgNDl6RjJV5CgE1scTiqh2yEdVIxv7Zg8kHWjZoSWyI_duFcHi5rcINpVGhOFMRTU1L1xPVAGNi92JGm3AtPbex2HqEU755uWDc7_liMjQ4w2FlRkba965EYLFCX5M7_6Hm7GpaiAbh2cJKMwkJ0wP7yLwWf-VdbKzXWi_oXmj_29rtw4RkffIQcfrMakkXpHj0oDvS3aYr-OEspooyZSCAtVqvvJDeXYwJVJc2cjbLQUNNsQ0jjWX656qM2OJgChAyBYhJDYILLb42iOJwtlmYPr_vSy81Z_PG0qKHsMkwUtg_1lIQG7FD18mZ2KZ7-QpextKBW9tqsPCgTgl8VPzsWvmzQtwIhbYLVTjSx-TGF9eZwgFUSRVnbvJpDYSyffqjViYOsFq7PgBy7IOm6KrA3VzANpwONzNe2Mxio-kx-15JTyZqWXVUsob23r3WKXF37KOgDHGTXzq91xb-d6E%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Over the weekend, illegal migrants stormed a border patrol checkpoint near El Paso in a brazen effort to gain entry to the United States. **The mob of migrants who stormed the border have no regard for our laws and could have succeeded in their effort to gain entry into the United States if not for the brave men and women of Customs and Border Patrol.**

I’ve written to you in the past at length about the threat posed by the open-border policy the Biden Administration seems to support. As a member of Congress who grew up on the border, and who represents a border district, I’m outraged to see that no one in the federal government (**namely the Homeland Security security**) has been fired - or held accountable to any degree whatsoever - for their inability to secure the border.

We can demand that Biden terminate individuals, like Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas, but only the President has the power to remove him from office. Given that is unlikely to happen, Congress can make Mr. Mayorkas’ life “miserable” until he finds a solution to the chaos unfolding every day at the border. Recently, I introduced legislation in the House that would BAN the Homeland Security secretary from flying on private planes until the border is safe and secure.

**There is no reason whatsoever that Alejandro Mayorkas should be flying private on secure government aircraft when he can’t even ensure the safety of the American people.**

[**LET ME KNOW IF YOU SUPPORT MY EFFORTS TO STROP THE HOMELAND SECURITY SECRETARY OF HIS PRIVATE PLAN PRIVILEGES UNTIL HE STARTS WORKING TO GET THIS BORDER MESS UNDER CONTROL**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=312ca0b4eee24f18962b3e195a1148c7&_e=BsOZyMLExnnotpCz9_ykpIoKPWX_pSrP404uw9cRzIUE8PTZWj-_s-Ukt9uU4AVwzmL-spAVPd7R2cOUl_yqvhgNDl6RjJV5CgE1scTiqh2yEdVIxv7Zg8kHWjZoSWyI_duFcHi5rcINpVGhOFMRTU1L1xPVAGNi92JGm3AtPbex2HqEU755uWDc7_liMjQ4w2FlRkba965EYLFCX5M7_6Hm7GpaiAbh2cJKMwkJ0wP7yLwWf-VdbKzXWi_oXmj_29rtw4RkffIQcfrMakkXpHj0oDvS3aYr-OEspooyZSCAtVqvvJDeXYwJVJc2cjbLQUNNsQ0jjWX656qM2OJgChAyBYhJDYILLb42iOJwtlmYPr_vSy81Z_PG0qKHsMkwUtg_1lIQG7FD18mZ2KZ7-RjVu_0-it3HPWWGDWSpI0tODjQvMEwBdq-anWUPSmZTj-XjYDHZNB8Z9czF3cPeYL4VC-x5ljtKbNBiqZZfP7u47g-5zlrOjjOhobrJyU7xM3VXtCxhYLhw9lSVN4e0zxa9yUewx9bxp8eRzyrwfkc%3D)

[**NO PRIVATE JETS
FIX THE BORDER-> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=312ca0b4eee24f18962b3e195a1148c7&_e=BsOZyMLExnnotpCz9_ykpIoKPWX_pSrP404uw9cRzIUE8PTZWj-_s-Ukt9uU4AVwzmL-spAVPd7R2cOUl_yqvhgNDl6RjJV5CgE1scTiqh2yEdVIxv7Zg8kHWjZoSWyI_duFcHi5rcINpVGhOFMRTU1L1xPVAGNi92JGm3AtPbex2HqEU755uWDc7_liMjQ4w2FlRkba965EYLFCX5M7_6Hm7GpaiAbh2cJKMwkJ0wP7yLwWf-VdbKzXWi_oXmj_29rtw4RkffIQcfrMakkXpHj0oDvS3aYr-OEspooyZSCAtVqvvJDeXYwJVJc2cjbLQUNNsQ0jjWX656qM2OJgChAyBYhJDYILLb42iOJwtlmYPr_vSy81Z_PG0qKHsMkwUtg_1lIQG7FD18mZ2KZ7-U-Xwnqu_2Jm1yMgyuh9boiFGqvAMYsB6-LrsNJdIsZx2nfuL1m3zGiVCh0Sx0FikLsIOzff8VCbUq3PChH7QaJixbxq4C5pCQUmWglrOSrvPAhdtW42Fx2OgyI5-TE3JSigaTdL6OTxneUly3pXb40%3D)

Fellow American, nearly 40 individuals on the terrorist watch list have been apprehended at the border since Biden took office; when we have migrants overpower border patrol agents, which will likely become more common, how can anyone in power say that they’re doing everything they can to keep Americans safe?

Monica De La Cruz
Member of Congress - TX-15

| Paid for by Monica for Congress
---
PO BOX 4605
McAllen, TX 78503

Peter,

Our mid-month fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, and Derek is counting on your support to reach our $5,000 goal!

This is our final mid-month deadline before our first FEC quarterly-campaign finance report of 2023 is due. It’s important we show the strength of our grassroots campaign, so will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help Derek cross the finish line before midnight? → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kilmer-q1-2023**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60300885/396678878/-1919651591?refcode=em23_230316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230316_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=6a7b6ef2-5cc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE3YjZlZjItNWNjNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vOcScITt-tkxoOqYTtfT4ThoMcgz4AS2VRCfaVBa7L4=)

Team Kilmer

name: =?utf-8?Q?Veterans=20for=20Lori?=
subject: Support our Veterans
body:
Lori is a strong advocate...| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/df689384538f/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8119691?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=0871f64589&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

_Lori is a strong advocate for our veterans, and she is committed to ensuring they receive the support they need to thrive after their service._

This past week Lori supported several bills in the House that aim to improve accessibility and medical coverage for our veterans.

**_The bills that Lori supported include:_**
* H.R. 1226, the Wounded Warrior Access Act, which requires the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to establish a secure website or online tool through which veterans can submit a request for a copy of their VA claims file (C-file).
* H.R. 815, the Removing Extraneous Loopholes Insuring Every Veteran Emergency (RELIEVE) Act, which enables veterans who are newly enrolled to the Veterans Community Care program to get reimbursed for emergency treatment received at a non-VA facility during the 60-day period after enrollment.
* H.R. 502, which ensures that no service member who elects to use the post-9/11 GI Bill, despite previously paying into the Montgomery GI Bill, misses out on their refund.

In addition to her work in Congress, Lori has been a strong advocate for veterans throughout her career. As Mayor, she completed the Happy Valley Veterans Memorial, which serves as a testament to the gratitude of those who defend our country.

[_**Contribute today to help Lori fight for the needs of our veterans and ensure they receive the support they deserve. >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=0f86b93b80&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=230ed5a0ae&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY")
---
| Together, we can support our veterans and ensure they are receiving the services they deserve.

Thank you,

Veterans for Lori
---

* [Restoring our Economy](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=5783827b03&e=c87c5d8d97)
* [Parental Choice in Oregon Schools](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=4aa674d48c&e=c87c5d8d97)
* [Low Taxes, Balanced Budgets](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=9b255191ad&e=c87c5d8d97)
* [Keeping our Communities Safe](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=329e2912bf&e=c87c5d8d97)
* [Putting America and Oregon First](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=a1b2e29253&e=c87c5d8d97)
* [Supporting our Veterans and Armed Forces](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=83a0be593a&e=c87c5d8d97)
* [Empowering Farmers and Ranchers](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=73ccabd4d1&e=c87c5d8d97)
* [Improving Transportation and Infrastructure](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=255bd82fe1&e=c87c5d8d97)
* [Fighting Homelessness](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=ad8dd6f986&e=c87c5d8d97)

If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress

body:

[**Learn More**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5ca46ihhe3hrc3r1gvido3fkp8ppiaq569b6vo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs)

](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zahlrjd1jhvcopegpq7tcdk8ifcnrdf7mmsgt780_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs)**The future of this country is under assault like nothing we've seen before. The **Feds new secret "Project Hamilton"** will obliterate freedom in America. [**Learn More**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zma2ivqbreejaqt3nkm17calo1ttscjbq5q5kjtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs)
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqf13duaddch5cl5ad6tn98rc914lfhbf8f8qbjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs)[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1d24pkhf0v0mrdacnd3q9fc5oakovldgul39hko_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs) | **[Government to close the biggest tax loophole
](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zci8l537k7i8akm63csqnd889j9gds59c5ohifog_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs)**
The IRS is trying to close the tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market crashes and recessions. **[Learn More](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvtdt3ad703b72vbemvfmk66fvsm25u20nrqd7b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs)**
# **
The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zktug95o41u0c305akkoeh7e1jslu89qrvvomdj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5d942bi3qmfbu4rp562enplcm9ufmaoih82egig_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a["Financial Rat-Lab"](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuoucqdlc2br3tjnr0ktfk10621f6c8r4lviavo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbbn3qva1d4k37tc6asl9mq7noeha3pud0ipo8k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2cth2bs)
There has never been a more urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it. Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your retirement.

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdenf2t7jcq15u5vvos9blvid361bjhd84j3npp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2c3h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztgs7ovglg07rd6d339dejhc67ki7bl17rck34po_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2c3h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/") Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zife32vbo4j028lj8h9ojp8kbpmm0882sfekva7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2c3h2bs) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7g88cg7rosfc292ridml12mfqbutui1kmjv46r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2c3h2bs)
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvjsg4ipj47k4oareu2vebcjitph4nagt3787008_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshg66pr1c3gm48d245p25oh4cdjm9o31cth64o724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpt5hgehuu7qa9o83fgj0bjus246smchn2sfa07g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1gmeoj2c3h2bs)_

name: Aaron Withe, Freedom Foundation
subject: Tell Congress to STOP unions
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY5MDMifQ/DiRD7oE1QFORzXxC1NdPDA)
---
Fellow American, Did you know **the top 20 Public-Sector Unions in America spent nearly $80 MILLION on political activity** and gifts in 2022? And that wasn't even a Presidential Election year! Public-sector unions are **some of the largest lobbies** in America, and they're entirely funded by **your taxpayer-dollars!** It's no surprise those same government unions have a reputation for heavily supporting far-left political candidates and issues that expand government control and therefore the money public sector unions can take from their members... regardless of their members' beliefs! It's high time Congress do something about this! [**Freedom Foundation is taking a stand and urging Congress to STOP Public Sector Unions from funding far-left candidates and causes - with YOUR tax dollars - while giving their members no say. Will you help us by signing this open letter to Washington?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY5MDMifQ/-5_iiTkEn3gxZ6TN9UgOPw)
---
[Tell Congress to STOP labor unions](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY5MDMifQ/l6dqhm-LlxM2QBJXgY8MCA)
---
Government unions are a publicly funded lobby that consistently works against the interests of the taxpayers who are forced to bankroll them. While some states ban using union dues for Political Action Committee (PAC) contributions and require that any donations to political organizations be _voluntary_... most states do NOT have ANYTHING on the books to protect union workers from being taken advantage of by their far-left union-bosses. In many states, employees' mandatory union dues are spent propping up candidates and political causes that go against their values. The only ones who win with the current rules in place are union bosses and the far-left politicians lining their campaign coffers with immoral stolen-adjacent money. [**We _must_ tell Congress to prevent Public Sector Unions from spending YOUR hard-earned tax dollars on radical political causes that neither you the taxpayer, nor the vast majority of union member's support. Please sign this open letter today and tell Congress, to "STOP the unions!"**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY5MDMifQ/j_SN1hF7wdb7W_gkhk7HCw) Fellow American, Public sector unions are a multi-billion-dollar industry that almost exclusively supports one political party. Essentially, these taxpayer-funded unions serve as the funding arm of the radical left. The problem is amplified when the politicians these union bosses support can redefine certain movements as "non-political." For example, in 2020 the "Defund the Police" movement was deemed "non-political" which meant unions were further enabled to steal their member's money each paycheck to put toward one of the most radical agendas the country has ever seen. **Even though we all know they're radically leftist causes!** We must act to put an end to this gross use of your taxpayer dollars. [**Please help us to urge Congress to STOP labor unions from using taxpayer money to fund radical leftist candidates and causes by signing this letter today.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY5MDMifQ/BjeQGUyeynecIiQfW0HbBw)
---
[Tell Congress to STOP labor unions](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY5MDMifQ/rjHIYSOTOI8XHd5LnnCuYg)
---
In freedom, Aaron WitheCEOFreedom Foundation
---
---
[**Support Freedom Foundation**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzY5MDMifQ/KdjujYEl9CfzbCnXMWCC_A)
---
PO Box 552
Olympia WA, 98507
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDc2LTEzYmVkNmRiYWZjMjQ4ZmY4ZThhMDFjZmRlNjgwZjY5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/aNZLKg3yq5KMh3-uGaBukA) to unsubscribe.

name: Dave McCormick
subject: When my chute collapsed…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
|
---
| | | I think it's fair to say that most Americans think of paratroopers leading the charge in combat abroad. Well, one of my most memorable jumps as a paratrooper happened in Gettysburg, PA.

**I'm Dave McCormick. I proudly served my country as a paratrooper in the 82nd Airborne Division. **

When I was a young lieutenant, my battalion commander would take all the officers to battlefields around the country as a staff training exercise. We'd jump in, walk the battlefield, have a big dinner, then fly back to Fort Bragg the next day.

One trip took us to Gettysburg, not far from Harrisburg, where my parents were living at the time. It was my first chance to have my parents see a jump. I arranged to be the first man out of the plane and called my mom to tell her what was happening. She and my dad piled into their station wagon and parked by the field outside Gettysburg, on a farm that we'd arranged as a drop zone.

**As we flew in low over Gettysburg, I stepped up to the open door of the aircraft.** The jumpmaster slapped me on the back, and I jumped. My parachute deployed immediately, but something had gone wrong.

I looked up and saw the boots of another paratrooper through the thin silk of my chute. The second man out of the plane had jumped right on top of me.

_**My chute collapsed.**_ I began to free fall. After the longest two seconds of my life, my chute finally unfurled and caught the air. I leveled out and slammed into the hard Pennsylvania soil, a little spooked but unhurt. I gathered up my gear and jogged over to my crying parents.

**Some thirty years later, I was back in Gettysburg for an Adams County straw poll during my Senate campaign.**

Here I was met with some Trump supporters who spoke out against the establishment and globalists. Initially they didn't give me a warm reception.

But as I got to talking with them, I told this story. **Before long, we were swapping war stories and other tales of our common Pennsylvania upbringings.**

It certainly wasn't a new revelation, but this interaction reinforced something that I already knew at my core. As Americans and Pennsylvanians, we may all be incredibly different people, but the core beliefs that unite us are far stronger than anything that could divide us.

Gettysburg is the site of one of the bloodiest moments in American history. Tens of thousands of lives were lost there during the Civil War. But it was also the turning point in that conflict. The Union won the war and our country was restored.

Thankfully, our country is not faced with civil war today. But, **we are living in a moment when we will decide America 's future! I'd like to explain exactly what we must do to save America, but I can't do it in an email.**

**Instead, right now, you can claim a signed copy of my book, Superpower in Peril: A Battle Plan to Renew America, at this secure link:[secure.winred.com/pennsylvania-rising/superpower-in-peril/?signed-copy-for-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62444903:JaBU6zGbN:m:1:3365131770:8A7DA9E8A6655678C2B7941016F3EE50:r "secure.winred.com/pennsylvania-rising/superpower-in-peril/?signed-copy-for-dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

We _**must**_ restore our nation's excellence. Americans are hurting. And I can guarantee you that won't change until we confront China, rebuild trust in our institutions, and **unite** behind strong, conservative leaders!

_**[If you'd want this future for America and want to learn more, I hope you'll donate to claim a signed copy today.<<](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62444902:JaBU6zGbN:m:1:3365131770:8A7DA9E8A6655678C2B7941016F3EE50:r "If you’d want this future for America and want to learn more, I hope you’ll donate $40 to claim a signed copy today.<<")**_
---

---
Thank you for taking the time to read this,

-Dave McCormick
_Pennsylvanian, Combat Veteran, and Job Creator_

clean_body: | | | | I think it's fair to say that most Americans think of paratroopers leading the charge in combat abroad. Well, one of my most memorable jumps as a paratrooper happened in Gettysburg, PA. I'm Dave McCormick. I proudly served my country as a paratrooper in the 82nd Airborne Division. When I was a young lieutenant, my battalion commander would take all the officers to battlefields around the country as a staff training exercise. We'd jump in, walk the battlefield, have a big dinner, then fly back to Fort Bragg the next day. One trip took us to Gettysburg, not far from Harrisburg, where my parents were living at the time. It was my first chance to have my parents see a jump. I arranged to be the first man out of the plane and called my mom to tell her what was happening. She and my dad piled into their station wagon and parked by the field outside Gettysburg, on a farm that we'd arranged as a drop zone. As we flew in low over Gettysburg, I stepped up to the open door of the aircraft. The jumpmaster slapped me on the back, and I jumped. My parachute deployed immediately, but something had gone wrong. I looked up and saw the boots of another paratrooper through the thin silk of my chute. The second man out of the plane had jumped right on top of me. My chute collapsed. I began to free fall. After the longest two seconds of my life, my chute finally unfurled and caught the air. I leveled out and slammed into the hard Pennsylvania soil, a little spooked but unhurt. I gathered up my gear and jogged over to my crying parents. Some thirty years later, I was back in Gettysburg for an Adams County straw poll during my Senate campaign. Here I was met with some Trump supporters who spoke out against the establishment and globalists. Initially they didn't give me a warm reception. But as I got to talking with them, I told this story. Before long, we were swapping war stories and other tales of our common Pennsylvania upbringings. It certainly wasn't a new revelation, but this interaction reinforced something that I already knew at my core. As Americans and Pennsylvanians, we may all be incredibly different people, but the core beliefs that unite us are far stronger than anything that could divide us. Gettysburg is the site of one of the bloodiest moments in American history. Tens of thousands of lives were lost there during the Civil War. But it was also the turning point in that conflict. The Union won the war and our country was restored. Thankfully, our country is not faced with civil war today. But, we are living in a moment when we will decide America 's future! I'd like to explain exactly what we must do to save America, but I can't do it in an email. Instead, right now, you can claim a signed copy of my book, Superpower in Peril: A Battle Plan to Renew America, at this secure link: "secure.winred.com/pennsylvania-rising/superpower-in-peril/?signed-copy-for-dpwillis67@gmail.com" We must restore our nation's excellence. Americans are hurting. And I can guarantee you that won't change until we confront China, rebuild trust in our institutions, and unite behind strong, conservative leaders! "If you’d want this future for America and want to learn more, I hope you’ll donate $40 to claim a signed copy today.<<" | | | "CLAIM YOUR BOOK FOR $40!" Thank you for taking the time to read this, -Dave McCormick Pennsylvanian, Combat Veteran, and Job Creator | | Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC 421 Office Park Dr. Mountain Brook, AL 35223 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 12, 2022. body:
We’ve known about Former CNN president Jeff Zucker’s anti-Trump bias for years now,

Friend,

We've known about Former CNN president Jeff Zucker's anti-Trump bias for years now, but I (almost) can't believe how far he was willing to go!

**Former CNN president Jeff Zucker told employees not to look too far into the "lab leak theory" concerning the origins of the Chinese coronavirus because he considered the story a _" Trump talking point."_**

**There 's a reason why almost everyone we knew from CNN just a few years ago has been let go since.**

When Chris Cuomo used his position as a CNN host to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic and to LIE about Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations to keep him in elected office and save his career, we were quick to discover it.

**MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo 's coverage, EXPOSED his lies on social media, and ended his career.**

Brian Stelter devoted the entirety of his run as a CNN anchor to President Donald Trump's _ "criminal presidency"_ and questioning not only the sanity of Trump but also his _" cult"_ following of supporters. He often exposed his leftist bias in his criticisms of Republicans and news outlets (like Fox News) that refused to carry water for Obama and Biden.

**After we exposed his left-wing bias on several of our NewsBusters blogs, Brian Stelter was fired.**

And because of our work, CNN demoted Don Lemon, _one of the leading men in the Zucker-directed CNN-vs.-Trump mega-drama,_ from Primetime to Mornings.

And with your support, _we can FIRE at least 2 more CNN staff_ this year over their constant lying.

[_**It 's time to make CNN pay for its dishonesty. **__**Click here to show the media that you 're tired of their lies **__**> >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh6ktjkrdc9t200nbt1rd06j8degetal6r203ie0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im4or2cdh2bs)

MRC's proven three-step process has revealed the media's leftwing bias to the public. Here's how.

**STEP 1:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**STEP 2:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**STEP 3: MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, **sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The MRC also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

[_**Friend, will you help us continue to expose the media for the liars they really are? Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfintkmsqk999p50m5repqf5pjrlqr54r9gr8kf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im4or2cdh2bs)

Thank you for joining the fight, friend.

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s Second Amendment Survey because you’re someone who understands

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5u0l0fg1i6lekld46v349em9ohmm6bv5rjt27ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im4or6chh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5doj1p4jvd0ft4a66388f9rm3m5n5algkhpf828_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im4or6chh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/") Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuv9vfefotichfrvffbc6kufiftdsvih7eo6akho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im4or6chh2bs) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5ujhneb0tfvbmqi5hgfru5ons67th89j7tn03ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im4or6chh2bs)
---

1600 Daily
---

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652373%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NzsatF%2f6WA6lYaZ3R6pppA&sysid=1)**

There’s growing panic in the Washington, D.C. Swamp as you read this email.

Both Democrats and RINOs in Congress and in the national media are terrified by Tucker Carlson’s release of U.S. Capitol camera footage this week.

**As a generous supporter of Freedom Watch, you know this is a good sign.**

Thanks to Tucker, millions of Americans are seeing for themselves that the official narrative about a “violent insurrection” at the U.S. Capitol building on January 6, 2021 is a pack of lies!

**People across the country who bought the “violent insurrection” pitch now know:**

* The protester known as Q Shaman was not violent, and he was actually escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

* US Capitol Police officer Brian Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

* Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason.**

Tens of millions more Americans will know this crucial information within two weeks, as their family, friends, and neighbors spread the word in person and on social media.

What’s more, that critical video footage may help me defend my clients and all January 6 peaceful protesters...we’ll know soon!

**[Patriot, please help me fight back as hard as I can for each abused, ignored, and tortured January 6 peaceful protester with your special gift now of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652374%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oeHh4vIH21sYB3XDpjsg6g&sysid=1)**

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

body:
We’ve known about Former CNN president Jeff Zucker’s anti-Trump bias for years now, but I (almost) can’t believe how far he was willing to go!

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsftsldacolmfrka4t9b45ftadh9pari3l5q28dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im2ob4c3h2bs)

Friend,

We've known about Former CNN president Jeff Zucker's anti-Trump bias for years now, but I (almost) can't believe how far he was willing to go!

**Former CNN president Jeff Zucker told employees not to look too far into the "lab leak theory" concerning the origins of the Chinese coronavirus because he considered the story a _" Trump talking point."_**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zblaavgbqbqd4n1k0g3iaie5tm43cjusan718m3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im2ob4c3h2bs)

A true journalist would've looked into it. _**But CNN l doesn 't employ true journalists.**_

My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.

I'm looking to add 500 new donors in the next 48 hours to bury CNN and bankrupt the corrupt media. But I can't do it without your help.

**There 's a reason why almost everyone we knew from CNN just a few years ago has been let go since.**

When Chris Cuomo used his position as a CNN host to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic and to LIE about Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations to keep him in elected office and save his career, we were quick to discover it.

**MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo 's coverage, EXPOSED his lies on social media, and ended his career.**

Brian Stelter devoted the entirety of his run as a CNN anchor to President Donald Trump's _ "criminal presidency"_ and questioning not only the sanity of Trump but also his _" cult"_ following of supporters. He often exposed his leftist bias in his criticisms of Republicans and news outlets (like Fox News) that refused to carry water for Obama and Biden.

**After we exposed his left-wing bias on several of our NewsBusters blogs, Brian Stelter was fired.**

And because of our work, CNN demoted Don Lemon, _one of the leading men in the Zucker-directed CNN-vs.-Trump mega-drama,_ from Primetime to Mornings.

And with your support, _we can FIRE at least 2 more CNN staff_ this year over their constant lying.

[_**It 's time to make CNN pay for its dishonesty. **__**Click here to show the media that you 're tired of their lies **__**> >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtn2lfm5uq8a6rp8vpph9vtunbc6mnbtrn10hv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im2ob4c3h2bs)

MRC's proven three-step process has revealed the media's leftwing bias to the public. Here's how.

**STEP 1:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**STEP 2:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**STEP 3: MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, **sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The MRC also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

[_**Friend, will you help us continue to expose the media for the liars they really are? Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0jvlsohl9g9s0htersfkva2opi6qddi13g2knuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1im2ob4c3h2bs)

Thank you for joining the fight, Friend.

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

name: Lori Chavez-DeRemer
subject: Parental Bill of Rights
body:
| |

---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62444917:JAfUpzGVN:m:1:3365131770:C20A077DA7A68DE1DFC4572A354C58B5:r)
---
| Peter,

_**As a member of the Committee on Education and the Workforce, I am thrilled to announce that I have recently signed onto the Parents Bill of Rights as a cosponsor. This proposal seeks to promote children 's well-being and success by empowering parents and ensuring they have a seat at the table in their child's education.**_
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62444917:JAfUpzGVN:m:1:3365131770:C20A077DA7A68DE1DFC4572A354C58B5:r)
---
| As a mother of two, I understand firsthand the importance of parental involvement in education. No one understands a child's interests and needs better than their parents, and the Parents Bill of Rights ensures that parents can speak up without fear of retaliation. This bill contains five key pillars that seek to empower parents and keep children safe:
* Parents have the right to know what their children are being taught.
* Parents have the right to be heard.
* Parents have the right to see the school's budget and spending.
* Parents have the right to protect their child's privacy.
* Parents have the right to keep their children safe.

These pillars are crucial to ensuring that parents are aware of what their children are being taught and are able to provide input and feedback. By supporting the Parents Bill of Rights, we can help to create a more transparent and equitable education system that puts the needs of parents and students first.

I believe in the power of parental involvement to drive student success. However, I also recognize that this is a bipartisan issue that affects families across the political spectrum. [_**That's why I'm committed to working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to ensure that every parent has a voice in their child's education.**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62444917:JAfUpzGVN:m:1:3365131770:C20A077DA7A68DE1DFC4572A354C58B5:r)

Together, we can create a brighter future for our children and families.

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62444917:JAfUpzGVN:m:1:3365131770:C20A077DA7A68DE1DFC4572A354C58B5:r)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62444917:JAfUpzGVN:m:1:3365131770:C20A077DA7A68DE1DFC4572A354C58B5:r "CONTRIBUTE")
---

name: Accountable Tech via Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign now: Tell Google To Delete Users' Location Data.
body:
Protect abortion patient privacy
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8780ccf3-8d94-4cbf-b67a-bb2acbab2c3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, 24 states have banned abortion or are likely to do so in the coming months.[1] Hundreds of thousands of Americans seek an abortion every year. Our research found that Google still retains location search queries for reproductive care facilities – despite promising otherwise. This is a HUGE problem: Right-wing state governments are increasingly seeking to prosecute people seeking abortions – and even private citizens can sue anyone who aids and abets abortion seekers in states like Oklahoma or Texas. [2] **[Peter, will you join us in calling on Google to protect users’ privacy and delete users’ location data that state governments and private citizens could use to prosecute those seeking reproductive health care →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68470022-540b-4432-991a-97d00897e4fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47bb8038-7d29-494a-9878-9f067d891d97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks to previous pressure we put on Google last year, they updated their policy to automatically delete the location data of visits to "particularly personal" locations like counseling centers, domestic violence shelters, abortion clinics, fertility centers, addiction treatment facilities, weight loss clinics, cosmetic surgery clinics, and others.

However, our own research shows that this data is STILL being stored despite Google’s promises, and it could be weaponized by anti-abortion prosecutors and state agents. Reporting from December concluded that location history data related to visiting abortion clinics was stored by Google for months, despite their promises to automatically delete that sensitive data. **[This is unacceptable. Join us in calling on Google to uphold its promise and ADD YOUR NAME to demand Google stop collecting and retaining location data from users.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a0352fa-3608-4d92-a430-63891aaed0b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks for taking action with us to hold Google accountable, – The Team at Accountable Tech [1] Guttmatcher Institute: [https://www.guttmacher.org/2023/01/six-months-post-roe-24-us-states-have-banned-abortion-or-are-likely-do-so-roundup](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21edf217-eca2-4b38-93ac-4ec931ca4126/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [2] CNN: [https://www.cnn.com/2022/04/28/politics/oklahoma-heartbeat-act/index.html](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41d6c6bc-c037-4a0a-815f-729c2665a9f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad5340b2-2929-4dfa-b33a-e140651b0b2f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

## Mike Lindell NEEDS Our Help!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11009.1.7e85190dc4c8d75e5d0d0a78de6cf379)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
I have come to love the heart of **Mike Lindell** and was just texting with him yesterday about some upcoming projects.
In his pursuit to Save America, he has almost destroyed his incredible company [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11010.1.7e06f3b8b8c2766b1afeee9d9921b7d4).
It is very important that we support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11011.1.4d8fad248d4872f7cfab1c9c02c17b6e), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and even his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11012.1.9e87fa6192615204a0d436fd026dd7be).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11013.1.3355842aa20171d3379ad28a224f1727) and look at all of the great America First products available (so much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11014.1.6ea22775677903a8e2fa68ff29e515b8)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11015.1.5eaff41bac81aa650d52ee365a6477aa) products, especially the MyPillow Towels and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11016.1.fc5f841b266ce2a65f2a93c3b35ebada), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11017.1.5ac59eeff120a3ad907de86cfb13dda5), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11018.1.91ee77cf03df8fc483206986d048146c), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11019.1.9c28b8915aa7c6af4975251374a5ef38), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11020.1.03029fa73926b2c0af97b362da32b8e3), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11021.1.a153c360208c8c685b75ec49f6cf7640)).

**Date** : April 20
**Time** : 6:30-8:30pm
**Location** : 4121 S Sheridan Rd Tulsa, OK 74145
**Cost** : $10 RSVP Here: [www.sheridan.church/rsvp](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11027.1.567e581da8d3fd6f1c78438e06bbcccb) To request a **Media Pass** please email connect@sheridan.church

## Sheridan.Church Is Coming To OKC!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11029.1.3100a73423d594b58aac27474692efaf)

In 8 days, [Sheridan.Church OKC](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11030.1.9ce061affe5f561a8a3b25a16bc94525) will officially launch!
I am so excited for what God has already been doing as we prepare to launch a new [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18870177.11031.1.5528abaaeb69ecf78ebb8e8fe8e85271) campus.
If you live in the OKC area and are **looking for a church home** then come join me on Saturday, March 25 at 5pm.
**Location** : 2222 W Hefner Rd OKC, OK
If you know someone in the OKC area that is looking for a church home please invite them.

| Peter,

With prices on the rise and the cost of goods and services skyrocketing, families are struggling to make ends meet. We know that this is an issue that affects all Americans.

Lori has always been a commonsense voice and knows the importance of bipartisan solutions that benefit all Americans. That's why she is committed to finding practical solutions to address inflation and help hardworking families get ahead.

She needs your support.

[_**Your contribution will help Lori fight for policies that will help mitigate the effects of inflation and help hard-working families get back on their feet. >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445065:6gfVLzGNc:m:1:3391001263:C581C9060BF5793E36B0DCC2496CDE95:r)
---

---
| With your help, we can advocate for economic growth, support small businesses, and provide relief for struggling families. Every dollar counts, and your contribution will make a real difference in the fight against inflation.

Thank you,

Team Lori

* [Supporting our Veterans and Armed Forces](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445060:6gfVLzGNc:m:1:3391001263:C581C9060BF5793E36B0DCC2496CDE95:r)
* [Empowering Farmers and Ranchers](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445060:6gfVLzGNc:m:1:3391001263:C581C9060BF5793E36B0DCC2496CDE95:r)
* [Improving Transportation and Infrastructure](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445060:6gfVLzGNc:m:1:3391001263:C581C9060BF5793E36B0DCC2496CDE95:r)

body:
The U.S. Central Bank has been quietly stockpiling gold over the past few weeks.

** The United States Is About to Face Arguably...
The Greatest Dollar Collapse We’ve Ever Seen **
Hopefully, you’ve been preparing yourself because this problem is accelerating right before our very eyes...

We recently have seen the first real indications that the **U.S. Dollar is in a real decline** ...
For over 10 years now the U.S Dollar and Treasury bonds have been seen as a hedge against volatility...
But with lower yields now for bonds[2](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01837%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gtET0OqQz%2fgQ80sxKLP3bA&sysid=1) -- [investors are running back to gold and silver](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01838%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lI4qG%2fgaLS5O2kKZ1JDG9g&sysid=1) and away from the U.S. dollar.

body:

---
| | | Peter,

I am heartbroken to say we came up short of our FINAL mid-month fundraising goal before the end of the quarter (our first FEC deadline of the new Congress). We missed our goal by $4,937...

**I spoke with Majority Leader Scalise and we agreed this is an emergency for House Republicans.** _**[Luckily, we were able to reach you with enough time for ONE LAST PUSH to fix it.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445078:6oF6AzG1N:m:1:3391001263:09C75C1CFDA180F90A207611E0F08628:r "Luckily, we were
able to reach you with enough time for ONE LAST PUSH to fix it.")**_

But if you sit on the sidelines, the results won't be pretty.

If we lose any more ground in the fundraising race, we will almost certainly lose our fragile House Majority to the Democrats. A Liberal Super PAC is already pledging an EIGHT-FIGURE investment to win enough races for Democrats to take back control of our Majority.

_**[Don't let that nightmare become a reality - chip in right away to help us close the budget gap and save the day!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445078:6oF6AzG1N:m:1:3391001263:09C75C1CFDA180F90A207611E0F08628:r "Don’t let

body:
We've known about Former CNN president Jeff Zucker's anti-Trump bias for years

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2e2a4bcc26d346ce8fc03a41d6a9b14b&_e=jvgLl5fd4qk7JchIwQ2Y-4fOMQu2Xqc2V6r3oB_dsWVrLdgJj9dBV-Aewl7cUcmh5qButwe5Sg_5snJvtO3KHj2WjY7G_5Xv3LJw0QbPu8aIwenv57XUOxc8LKtc8zEzhmiabcvQ0TnsJj9AcH_6r5nurgIoCs_Tz2sTmqNmuxj1-G6uZBi44Z2mas2Fv42Xzfz1phpzspZKuWD-fuXwSqo0cSp4-H6tgsvuSw1Ex34gOuPdVGJpXeKRFDYnifASNWpDafMsxPK73x9ZW2MJZQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

We've known about Former CNN president Jeff Zucker's anti-Trump bias for years now, but I (almost) can't believe how far he was willing to go!

**Former CNN president Jeff Zucker told employees not to look too far into the "lab leak theory" concerning the origins of the Chinese coronavirus because he considered the story a _" Trump talking point."_**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2e2a4bcc26d346ce8fc03a41d6a9b14b&_e=jvgLl5fd4qk7JchIwQ2Y-4fOMQu2Xqc2V6r3oB_dsWVrLdgJj9dBV-Aewl7cUcmh5qButwe5Sg_5snJvtO3KHj2WjY7G_5Xv3LJw0QbPu8aIwenv57XUOxc8LKtc8zEzHn1yes4ux46Zr4GNoZ28TiwTGoQZq8VR0d07cUCz5tiQT5zTJYSHAneZJX6dQozk0PZaBN3LBjyoxBtpwjhzjKk34RM8nx7p4zno7Ddo8OfGka_P248a91GXPheJduq9GaH5VebCBc6Bi19-iQMdnA%3D%3D)

**There 's a reason why almost everyone we knew from CNN just a few years ago has been let go since.**

When Chris Cuomo used his position as a CNN host to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic and to LIE about Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations to keep him in elected office and save his career, we were quick to discover it.

**MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo 's coverage, EXPOSED his lies on social media, and ended his career.**

Brian Stelter devoted the entirety of his run as a CNN anchor to President Donald Trump's _ "criminal presidency"_ and questioning not only the sanity of Trump but also his _" cult"_ following of supporters. He often exposed his leftist bias in his criticisms of Republicans and news outlets (like Fox News) that refused to carry water for Obama and Biden.

**After we exposed his left-wing bias on several of our NewsBusters blogs, Brian Stelter was fired.**

And because of our work, CNN demoted Don Lemon, _one of the leading men in the Zucker-directed CNN-vs.-Trump mega-drama,_ from Primetime to Mornings.

And with your support, _we can FIRE at least 2 more CNN staff_ this year over their constant lying.

[_**It's time to make CNN pay for its dishonesty.**__**Click here to show the media that you 're tired of their lies **__**> >>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2e2a4bcc26d346ce8fc03a41d6a9b14b&_e=jvgLl5fd4qk7JchIwQ2Y-4fOMQu2Xqc2V6r3oB_dsWVrLdgJj9dBV-Aewl7cUcmh5qButwe5Sg_5snJvtO3KHj2WjY7G_5Xv3LJw0QbPu8aIwenv57XUOxc8LKtc8zEzoZVrBBbrsklVprxWkwLL3_y9N4fAQiDle1pfEGn5pNYHkL4a14YWkP3s_Edgh_6Hp4PabA7rITHKjQuzhuPFtTpB220mhq-05lpeve6OETpTuZqIX3cwwXQhMQpF81OWJxWx8oDcxLekhmu7vxJS9g%3D%3D)

MRC's proven three-step process has revealed the media's leftwing bias to the public. Here's how.

**STEP 1:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**STEP 2:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**STEP 3: MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, **sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The MRC also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

[_**Friend, will you help us continue to expose the media for the liars they really are? Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2e2a4bcc26d346ce8fc03a41d6a9b14b&_e=jvgLl5fd4qk7JchIwQ2Y-4fOMQu2Xqc2V6r3oB_dsWVrLdgJj9dBV-Aewl7cUcmh5qButwe5Sg_5snJvtO3KHj2WjY7G_5Xv3LJw0QbPu8aIwenv57XUOxc8LKtc8zEzKgAYgumoco28bomakhoLfYfZhQ8xgXRPncyyx5mvqqpE6GU0bhaT5i1_CwblnrxVRwOQTlF0TAmueG1c74CAnLYetBnWpHCJSoCGuXxi6L_DI5x-JnlrN3p3HKb5_4U539qS0J9tLPtCouSnwcjlUQ%3D%3D)

Thank you for joining the fight, Friend.

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

_The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible._

And because of our work, CNN demoted Don Lemon, one of the leading men in the Zucker-directed CNN-vs.-Trump mega-drama, from Primetime to Mornings. And with your support, we can FIRE at least 2 more CNN staff this year over their constant lying. MRC's proven three-step process has revealed the media's leftwing bias to the public. Here's how. STEP 1: The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987. STEP 2: My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias. STEP 3: MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The MRC also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters. Thank you for joining the fight, Friend. Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible. body:
The U.S. Central Bank has been quietly stockpiling gold over the past few weeks.

** The United States Is About to Face Arguably...
The Greatest Dollar Collapse We've Ever Seen **
Hopefully, you've been preparing yourself because this problem is accelerating right before our very eyes...
**[>>> Get Your Free "Wealth Survival Kit" Here <<<](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7vcmr54bbjea8hmrbofr0addis8is2a9aia6nt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1hm8or1cdh2bs)**
The U.S. Central Bank has been quietly stockpiling gold over the past few weeks.[1](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrko3ali0nmtuj2m30q4g1q3aqea9a6ts9m60voo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1hm8or1cdh2bs) They won't admit that **the U.S dollar is in a free fall**.
We recently have seen the first real indications that the **U.S. Dollar is in a real decline** ...
For over 10 years now the U.S Dollar and Treasury bonds have been seen as a hedge against volatility...
But with lower yields now for bonds[2](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdaso0ko7fjnfr4je91ea9m6rrtr573rrgvep5r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1hm8or1cdh2bs) -- [investors are running back to gold and silver](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z62rd86dilde0hud2jmroji9n980jp640ibfkof8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1hm8or1cdh2bs) and away from the U.S. dollar.
The dynasty of the U.S. dollar is coming to an end.
And when you have a Fed with a massive balance sheet that can and will continue to print money -- It's **only a matter of time before the dollar completely collapses.**
Billionaires have already been making major moves to protect themselves. Even China's Crypto billionaire is stockpiling Gold[3](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj6l0hcdj0qt7d5qfhftgs9amp9q6kpqbjpjs2n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1hm8or1cdh2bs).
But it's the **IRA and 401(k) savers who will be screwed** unless they [**make some major pivots now**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4ri8564rnv3tvvne8fj8127pvljthb5asihrsto_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1hm8or1cdh2bs).
So it's incredibly important **RIGHT NOW to protect your family**.
**The warning signs are here ...**
**[Request your FREE'Wealth Survival Kit' from Lear Capital >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpkimjnbebb4rhmkpc1647vc9u47h82lo2m22atg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1hm8or1cdh2bs)**
**Inside you 'll discover a LEGAL IRS LOOPHOLE that may protect your IRA, 401(k), or pension savings. (Tax and Penalty Free)**
[Click here now](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdt8ggao170d2048s8uunrddjol22kakicg1hpk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1hm8or1cdh2bs), because once this crisis hits, it'll already be too late.
Christopher Coyne
**P.S.**
Don't wait to protect your hard-earned savings. name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01841%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4mxfy%2fHX9WzzOMErofltzw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01842%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eQ5vUTX%2bnK1gXlb6ZWU1DA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01843%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Aod3psdW7kyqMAjEuH%2b%2bhA&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01844%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=smESQkSQNH4Pi7J57Q%2bCcw&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News _625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7208%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DbiaLg%2fLPK9I67mFia1EtQ&sysid=1)_

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Greenhalgh- Protecting Women in Sports
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Geenhalgh for Delegate**
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends, This past legislative session, I was proud to sponsor [House Bill 1387](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/92386674888ba9c4/d0b05e3e6bae0a12c3d6b838967d376c/37923) \- Fairness in Women’s Sports, to protect girls and young women in our schools from being forced to compete against biological males. This common-sense legislation would have guaranteed a level playing field by requiring participation in sports to be based on each student’s biological sex rather than their chosen gender identity. Women train and practice for years to compete in the sports they love, and we need to protect their right to fair competition. Unfortunately, this simple legislation did not pass, and that’s a loss for all our daughters and granddaughters who work so hard to achieve recognition and earn scholarships. _ The attack on women’s sports being championed by the left is egregious._ _We must protect the integrity of women’s sports and defend sex-based rights for women._ Next year, I will bring back my bill, Fairness in Women’s Sports, to be considered again by the General Assembly. We must protect the rights of our girls and young women in Virginia’s schools! However, I will need your support to get me back to Richmond so I can be a voice for reason, a voice for women. Your donation of [$500, $250, $100 or $50](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/92386674888ba9c4/c71a3d812a7e4c93c3d6b838967d376c/37923) will help me get my common-sense message out to voters and have an impact on this race! Thank you, Karen Greenhalgh
