clean_body: | | | | | Friends, This past legislative session, I was proud to sponsor \- Fairness in Women’s Sports, to protect girls and young women in our schools from being forced to compete against biological males. This common-sense legislation would have guaranteed a level playing field by requiring participation in sports to be based on each student’s biological sex rather than their chosen gender identity. Women train and practice for years to compete in the sports they love, and we need to protect their right to fair competition. Unfortunately, this simple legislation did not pass, and that’s a loss for all our daughters and granddaughters who work so hard to achieve recognition and earn scholarships. The attack on women’s sports being championed by the left is egregious. We must protect the integrity of women’s sports and defend sex-based rights for women. Next year, I will bring back my bill, Fairness in Women’s Sports, to be considered again by the General Assembly. We must protect the rights of our girls and young women in Virginia’s schools! However, I will need your support to get me back to Richmond so I can be a voice for reason, a voice for women. Your donation of will help me get my common-sense message out to voters and have an impact on this race! Thank you, Karen Greenhalgh | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Karen Geenhalgh for Delegate

I just checked in with my team, and here’s where we’re at: **We’re only 40% towards our $10,000 March 31 end-of-quarter goal.**

I’m working hard for the people of Northern Ohio, and I’m asking you to help sustain the movement we’ve built and the progress we’ve made. The GOP is already targeting this race, and we know that they’ll throw everything they have to flip this seat. _**We need to show our grassroots strength.**_

We’re over halfway through the month and tracking behind where we need to be. Will you be the one to put us back on track towards our critical goal so we can build the type of campaign that it’ll take to win this toss-up race?

**You can use this secure link to give today:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur_march2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60303231/396697797/-820256091?refcode=EM_FR_230317FR_N_MK_45DA_3_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzNjNmViMy1iM2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIp9829F_GTURvNpR_mFYtOZyJAOx_izV2bGTRyfXdE=)**

Marcy Kaptur

subject: The Excitement of Spring Training!
body:
The Sunshine Report
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013svBCgO2Zvyo2xJyo_sOGiP93bQq29ceRYvlzrtXkZgC_UY5AWU8FlNY1_y3rx-jTQmZUvGekcoj6HyxnMyyFCM0iUH5bYRpmjVCdwqg-h0ahhhMiajccf3kvRzIu90jm1gpSYtMFegC1TaoXRcoNYAKhSjE_Bzx_NTa51KGCCpSBdX_Mcz79Fiaskt1cRM1LZh9WZF6ISI=&c=yqhm3Fo6CwJ6TSM_oN_-vm6l7kWG5Mzst4gRlfDhodTTVMupLx7d4g==&ch=8W78-iXdUcEEKEq_a4nPAQiXnKqGLyqw0E6ePUPhsSUQ-0R0YFicjA==)

# The World Begins Anew...
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013svBCgO2Zvyo2xJyo_sOGiP93bQq29ceRYvlzrtXkZgC_UY5AWU8FnmBljkD6IrLd9iWhN66VzEtiw7LruoPnPblKgBca3chlFKjKROIfCjgLBuzqBaEGdlMtcvj_WeHss4Hxb1SjlFso_yJ19H4rA==&c=yqhm3Fo6CwJ6TSM_oN_-vm6l7kWG5Mzst4gRlfDhodTTVMupLx7d4g==&ch=8W78-iXdUcEEKEq_a4nPAQiXnKqGLyqw0E6ePUPhsSUQ-0R0YFicjA==)
---
| 'Jay shares the excitement of spring training and the arrival the new season - against the backdrop of a snowy New Hampshire day in March'
---
| When it's spring in New England, and the Red Sox head south, that's the sign! A whole new season of baseball - as well as life - beckons before us. It's that moment when all once again seems possible. Whatever our dreams, we're starting fresh. There is an excitement and a deep abiding belief that this is the year. We're on our way to the best season ever!
Hall of Famer Ernie Banks once said, "Spring training means flowers, people coming outdoors, sunshine, optimism and baseball." To go one step further, Spring training is a symbol of renewal and revitalization, something we can all take a note from. Spring historically has been a time for new beginnings, often associated with rebirth, renewal, and growth. As the season follows the long, dark winter months, it brings with it a sense of hope and new beginnings. Just as plants and trees begin to bloom and the air becomes warmer or as baseball players use spring training to hone their skills, we too can use this period to shake the frost of winter and bring some new energy into our lives.
For a sports fan like me, with spring just around the corner, it can only mean one thing: baseball! But before the season can begin, spring training is an essential part of the preparation before the start of the regular season. While it may seem odd that teams play almost an entire month's worth of games that don't mean anything come October during the Playoff's, spring training is actually crucial to how teams perform well into the season. From player conditioning to team building, skill development and competing for roster spots, spring training provides an opportunity for players to get in shape, work on their skills, and develop chemistry with their teammates.
On an even larger level, spring bespeaks numerous values, both practical and cultural, that make it an important season. From an agricultural side, it's the time of year when crops are typically planted, and the growth of plants is stimulated by the warmer weather and increased sunlight. Environmentally, spring plays a crucial role in maintaining the balance of the Earth's ecosystems. As plants and trees begin to grow, they absorb carbon dioxide from the atmosphere and release oxygen, helping to regulate the climate. And culturally it brings holidays and celebrations such as Easter, and more generally, we partake in cleanses, spiritually, mentally, and physically. So, while spring training may just seem like the start of the baseball season, it's actually an important symbol - a harbinger of so much more for each of us to embrace, celebrate and enjoy!
---

---
| Positive Profile of the Week: Rick Brenner, CEO, NH Fisher Cats
---
| | |
---|---
|
This week we are delighted to highlight a truly innovator and sports entertainment icon in the Granite State, Rick Brenner, CEO of the New Hampshire Fisher Cats.

Most everyone - young and old - loves baseball. We cheer our favorite teams, we make memories along the way, and we enjoy park food and entertainment. But in order to enjoy America's greatest pastime, it takes people behind the scenes and outstanding leadership to ensure it happens. And Rick truly epitomizes this important role.

In fact, Rick has one of the greatest resumes you'll ever see when it comes to sports entertainment, and his vision truly is the memorable quote from the movie, 'Field of Dreams,' "If you build it, they will come."

Rick took his knowledge and training from the Disney Institute and put it right to work as General Manager of the minor league team, the Trenton Thunder. For 10 years, Rick brought the ball club's family experience to new levels. His focus on fun, friendly, and family resulted in numerous awards including attendance records for minor league professional sports. And then he came to the Granite State.

Rick's first stint with the NH Fisher Cats was in the early mid 2000's when the Fisher Cats came to town. Rick was instrumental in the construction of Northeast Delta Dental Stadium and its connection and commitment to the community. Rick oversaw every piece of the stadium development and made sure it fit the Queen City's splendor while establishing some of the best entertainment around. It was personal for Rick. In fact, Rick trained his golden retriever Ollie to be the official bat dog of the New Hampshire Fisher Cats. Ollie became a national hit and was loved by everyone who saw him both on and off the field. In addition to the on-field activities of the team, Rick has played a key role in the Fisher Cats Foundation that has raised nearly $2 million dollars for programs including the Children's Hospital at Dartmouth. The annual baseball dinner organized by the foundation is an annual treat for baseball enthusiasts to meet some of the region's greatest ballplayers. So why the 'first stint?' Where did Rick go?

Turns out that Rick would depart the Fisher Cats in 2013 to take the reins of Michigan Motor Speedway. Under his leadership, the fast action speedway featuring NASCAR's biggest names brought new opportunities to the track including motor clubs and concerts. The fan experience and family culture created new and exciting opportunities for the track and the state, but New Hampshire was home for Rick.

In 2020, despite a global pandemic, Rick became a minority owner in the Fisher Cats and today has assumed the role of CEO. Being back in the 603 full-time, Rick is excited to expand on the 'foundation for fun' he created. So along with his hardworking and dedicated team, Rick will continue to bring top notch sports entertainment for us all to enjoy - while also supporting opportunities to 'do good' in the community.

Rick is truly one of the Granite State's favorites! And I think we all can agree that "Rick is successfully 'hitting it out of the park!'

|
---
| Quote of the Week
---
| "Spring training means flowers, people coming outdoors, sunshine, optimism and baseball. Spring training is a time to think about being young again." \- Ernie Banks

Under his leadership, the fast action speedway featuring NASCAR's biggest names brought new opportunities to the track including motor clubs and concerts. The fan experience and family culture created new and exciting opportunities for the track and the state, but New Hampshire was home for Rick. In 2020, despite a global pandemic, Rick became a minority owner in the Fisher Cats and today has assumed the role of CEO. Being back in the 603 full-time, Rick is excited to expand on the 'foundation for fun' he created. So along with his hardworking and dedicated team, Rick will continue to bring top notch sports entertainment for us all to enjoy - while also supporting opportunities to 'do good' in the community. Rick is truly one of the Granite State's favorites! And I think we all can agree that "Rick is successfully 'hitting it out of the park!' | | Quote of the Week | "Spring training means flowers, people coming outdoors, sunshine, optimism and baseball. Spring training is a time to think about being young again." \- Ernie Banks | Jay Lucas | == | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | | | | | | | Jay Lucas | 7 Portwalk Pl, Portsmouth, NH 03801 | | == Sent by mailto:info@jaylucas.us

clean_body: I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. Friend, The government and fake news media are lying to you! They called the January 6th protest a " deadly insurrection," but the video evidence doesn't back it up. A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful. We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State. I 'm launching the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Support the January 6th Defendants Goal: $33,000 Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donation: PENDING The January 6th Committee lied. They lied about how Brian Sicknick died. They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission. They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away. They lied about Ray Epps. If they were "insurrectionists," then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested? What else are they lying about? I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free. I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying. This is just the beginning. The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events. Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. ** Thank you, Kash Patel The Fight With Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. ** Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: NextGen America
subject: Fight for abortion rights this Women’s History Month
body:
| | Friend, **This Women’s History Month, we’re here to remind you: The fight for our right to abortion is far from over. ** Since the Supreme Court overturned our right to abortion, **Republicans have gone as far as introducing a national ban on abortion** — meaning that our right to abortion would be at risk no matter where we live. **We won’t let it happen.** [Act now: Sign our petition and tell Congress to do everything in their power to STOP the Republican-led national abortion ban.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60325980/396765702/-1443124587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDllZTEyNS1kZWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBCpqyXTSReTdyUbd1xDQL73r3c6StQ0Oxv2HKJvwEk=&emci=5988e2f9-19c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=709ee125-dec4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6787172) Young people have already seen the ripple effects of abortion bans. Our futures, communities, lives, and so much more have been deeply impacted. As we work to move our democracy forward, GOP lawmakers are simultaneously plotting to move us backward. **But make no mistake,** we’re fighting to ensure that everyone, no matter who they are or where they live, can access abortion. No matter what Republicans throw our way. We’re in the fight for reproductive justice and abortion care for the long haul. **Are you with us?** [**Take action this Women’s History Month by signing the petition to stop the national abortion ban now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60325981/396765703/-1039905596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDllZTEyNS1kZWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBCpqyXTSReTdyUbd1xDQL73r3c6StQ0Oxv2HKJvwEk=&emci=5988e2f9-19c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=709ee125-dec4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6787172) In this fight with you, NextGen America

body:
We need to hear from you!

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven’t heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---

---

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here’s why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sen. Rick Scott deregulates banks, oil companies, railroads & more--allowing corporate CEOs to rip off the system like he did, while the rest of us pay for it. (And pay, and pay, and pay …) It also explains his plan for an end to Social Security & Medicare. Scott's never won a race by more than 1.2%, even with all his wealth. He is very beatable. Can you help get him out of office?
body:
An expensive Senator
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5aa61d85-4a06-4dc7-8b1a-68697fc7776d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Senator Rick Scott, who threatened to gut Social Security & Medicare, is trying to destroy our banking system. _Scott's greed helped lead to the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) crash, as he fought to deregulate everything._** **[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to protect our banking system by getting Scott out of the Senate?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8d8c4c3-8aab-467b-b457-d5c999483734/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** __As Florida Governor and U.S. Senator, Scott reveled in deregulation of damn near everything. He was even thoroughly rebuked for it by FL's Supreme Court, as reported in FlaglerLive:__
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3357def0-5899-4e11-ab0e-e379c459aa5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _This is who Rick Scott is_ _a hospital CEO_ _ who oversaw the largest case of Medicare fraud in U.S history, leading to a record $1.7 billion fine. Which he hid by taking_ the 5th Amendment a ridiculous 75 times during his civil trial, which allowed him to keep much of his ill-begotten wealth. **_Makes sense he's for deregulating banks, oil companies, railroads & more--it allows corporate CEOs to do what he did, while the rest of us pay for it. It also explains his plan for Social Security & Medicare "sunsets."_** **_Rick Scott's never won a race by more than 1.2%, even with all his wealth. He is very beatable. _[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to protect our banking system by getting Scott out of the Senate?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77f0d8ee-6d11-4c32-9b72-207b98849c8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _Thank you for taking this blight on Congress and our democracy out of office._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78efc3c1-6f41-4c18-9a57-2a6fee9a5abb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/rickscottsvbfloridacandidatefund3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea968372-17f6-4c11-9a1e-0418b95a83ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: bad news from The Washington Post
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I'll get right to it, team: The Washington Post just named my seat in Nevada one of the most endangered seats heading into 2024.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
I'm vulnerable, and I'm counting on your early grassroots support to help me fight back against the GOP. That's why I'm asking you directly: So please, will you split $20 or more right now between my campaign and Serve America to keep Nevada and the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies will pour millions of dollars into Nevada to try to buy this seat. He has done it before, and he nearly succeeded. That's why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up right here, right now – today.
Because it's not just your $20. It's your $20 combined with $20 from your neighbor, your friend, a waitress in Las Vegas, a nurse in Reno, and a small-business owner in Carson City. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to keep this must-win seat blue.
Senate control could all come down to what happens in Nevada – so please, team, we need all hands on deck: Will you split $20 or more now between my campaign and Serve America – every dollar makes a crucial difference in these early days of the election cycle – to fuel our reelection campaign to victory and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
I can't tell you how grateful I am for your support. Thank you.
– Jacky
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]

subject: The ugly truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

The ugly truth is my campaign hit rock bottom.

We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line.

The only reason we won was the support of brave patriots like you.

After getting hit with massive attacks funded by the Democrats' dark money, we unfortunately had to take on some campaign debt to survive.

And now, _**[we need help to retire our campaign debt.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445375:63pXuzGBN:m:1:3365131770:90121BFFDA227DC5A544781A9366B0E0:r "we need help to retire our campaign debt.")**_

I hate to ask this, but it has to be done.

_**[Will you help us pay off this debt? Any amount will be helpful.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445375:63pXuzGBN:m:1:3365131770:90121BFFDA227DC5A544781A9366B0E0:r "Will you help us pay off this debt? Any amount will be helpful.")**_

The sooner we can retire this debt, the faster we can turn our attention to beating the Democrats again in 2024.

Thank you,

Ron Johnson

---
| | [CHIP IN TO PAY DOWN DEBT >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445375:63pXuzGBN:m:1:3365131770:90121BFFDA227DC5A544781A9366B0E0:r "CHIP IN
TO PAY DOWN DEBT >>")
---

PS - I'm a man of my word. My promise to you is that I will always tell the truth and fight for you, your family and for America. **_[Will you help me keep going?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445375:63pXuzGBN:m:1:3365131770:90121BFFDA227DC5A544781A9366B0E0:r "Will you help me keep going?")_**

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445375:63pXuzGBN:m:1:3365131770:90121BFFDA227DC5A544781A9366B0E0:r "CHIP IN NOW")
---
---

Thanks to you I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.

But winning took everything I had, and more. I took on some campaign debt, and now it's time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, but **_[will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445375:63pXuzGBN:m:1:3365131770:90121BFFDA227DC5A544781A9366B0E0:r "will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end")_** so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?

Any amount you can contribute will be helpful. Your help is greatly appreciated.

Thank you,
Ron Johnson

Peter, March madness is underway, but there’s more action than just what’s happening on the basketball court.

[**Our team at UNLEASH AMERICA is going through a MARCH MADNESS FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and we want YOU to be a part of it!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=01c31d8219464af9900e6e1b365a6157&_e=iT_PJJ5LnZg-_JZYhDiNgDElJZ3_k8lKBUq4VIz_-hhBifZaSHAFdY9M4dyZIsOyCIWR1GGpk9NNqfRQIKhvI6eywfeh6Pm5UNZuuGETBV8aYJ68ys3880ubETKGJdcQEyCio2HD-L-7i3ZPBrIsd6z5nTFx_JyngIWJLT2Tb1e0rbEN0J0z_SUXmoyVXiJzy_JIEPdGeNNbBa6W5i5k0pucpVSlsSZIvoVV2-TDXUy6u75JsT0Du0nNJ9pc4oxJNHuJJh6U4eYQ6yur403sTSAgqbSoyc6ExRl0fG6GbHaDR70YozFUmIASntqMYx3wL6Cf2DzKlPfBNfbKkvP9LfR60cbfFZheRSKcSDBame3M7JS66CRsqXyMcOB65vXo)

Peter, February was a short month, and to make up for it, we have to push EXTRA HARD this month.

**Our _major_ end of quarter deadline is coming up, and we can’t unleash American potential without every patriot doing their part. **

[**Pitch in NOW so we can UNLEASH AMERICA and unchain our great country from the tyranny of the socialist Democrats.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=01c31d8219464af9900e6e1b365a6157&_e=iT_PJJ5LnZg-_JZYhDiNgDElJZ3_k8lKBUq4VIz_-hhBifZaSHAFdY9M4dyZIsOyCIWR1GGpk9NNqfRQIKhvI6eywfeh6Pm5UNZuuGETBV8aYJ68ys3880ubETKGJdcQEyCio2HD-L-7i3ZPBrIsd6z5nTFx_JyngIWJLT2Tb1e0rbEN0J0z_SUXmoyVXiJzy_JIEPdGeNNbBa6W5i5k0pucpVSlsSZIvoVV2-TDXUxPgG0-9xj0Wm5NT5o9dZPL8pE5vU1pGH4FQZJxqQNd-pKBMdMyt8Bq5D4xEpMTzWwJEfG5yGaUAiDXyRO_7LoJ1e_m10GXMA0i5I_pY_T_xH48vN2FPeH4tbsw8jkhcpgIMbELdmM4FvfC03yHoVjf)

[**< < UNLEASH AMERICA >>**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=01c31d8219464af9900e6e1b365a6157&_e=iT_PJJ5LnZg-_JZYhDiNgDElJZ3_k8lKBUq4VIz_-hhBifZaSHAFdY9M4dyZIsOyCIWR1GGpk9NNqfRQIKhvI6eywfeh6Pm5UNZuuGETBV8aYJ68ys3880ubETKGJdcQEyCio2HD-L-7i3ZPBrIsd6z5nTFx_JyngIWJLT2Tb1e0rbEN0J0z_SUXmoyVXiJzy_JIEPdGeNNbBa6W5i5k0pucpVSlsSZIvoVV2-TDXUyDt4lK7SbQL6Tyzpl4_Z8gf_mD6UENFxxdX8ORCrQST2ZwdVrcJEQl3vXJV8xtetRmPxn2CTD4oDOUuLalA4R04v7UqERynlHcpDXVzXqsqvXR0pKHJRCuDIj-DEEWi6_KGioFEieDpTgkpv5Jcq4c)

Peter, I served in Special Operations in the Navy for 25 years.

And one thing that was always true no matter the mission was that NO great success could be achieved without every member of the team doing their part.

In politics, it’s no different.

I can’t defend America from the Democrats alone - but if we ALL do our part, there’s no stopping us.

clean_body: | | | Peter, March madness is underway, but there’s more action than just what’s happening on the basketball court. Peter, February was a short month, and to make up for it, we have to push EXTRA HARD this month. Our major end of quarter deadline is coming up, and we can’t unleash American potential without every patriot doing their part. Peter, I served in Special Operations in the Navy for 25 years. And one thing that was always true no matter the mission was that NO great success could be achieved without every member of the team doing their part. In politics, it’s no different. I can’t defend America from the Democrats alone - but if we ALL do our part, there’s no stopping us. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. body:
A quick message from me. | Hi Peter, I’ll keep this brief. Asking you time and again for your support may get annoying to you, and for that, I apologize. But if we’re going to flip North Carolina blue in the presidential election for the first time since 2008, then we can’t get complacent. In my time as governor, we’ve taken action to protect our climate. We’ve affirmed our support for reproductive health care access. We’ve made critical improvements to our state’s infrastructure. We’ve worked to keep people safe and fought for better jobs across the state. But I know that we can always do more. Keeping up our hard work to elect Democrats relies on having the resources to fulfill our plans. Those resources come from folks like you, and I’m so grateful each and every time someone steps up to invest in our efforts. We need to raise $3,500 before midnight tonight to stay on track this month. Please, if you can, chip in before midnight today. clean_body: A quick message from me. | Hi Peter, I’ll keep this brief. Asking you time and again for your support may get annoying to you, and for that, I apologize. But if we’re going to flip North Carolina blue in the presidential election for the first time since 2008, then we can’t get complacent. In my time as governor, we’ve taken action to protect our climate. We’ve affirmed our support for reproductive health care access. We’ve made critical improvements to our state’s infrastructure. We’ve worked to keep people safe and fought for better jobs across the state. But I know that we can always do more. Keeping up our hard work to elect Democrats relies on having the resources to fulfill our plans. Those resources come from folks like you, and I’m so grateful each and every time someone steps up to invest in our efforts. We need to raise $3,500 before midnight tonight to stay on track this month. Please, if you can, chip in before midnight today. Here’s a link just for you where you can make a contribution of any size: = Thank you, Roy | Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
We must elect more Democrats who will stand up to the gun lobby and bring an end to this gun violence epidemic. | |
---
President Biden is taking action to reduce gun violence and save lives. Just last year, he brought together Democrats and Republicans to pass the first significant gun safety law in _nearly 30 years._ And over the past two years, _President Biden has taken more executive action to reduce gun violence than any other president at this point in their presidency._ Now, he’s taking another critical step forward. Earlier this week, President Biden traveled to Monterey Park, California -- one community on the growing list of those that are forever changed due to gun violence -- to announce an Executive Order. **President Biden’s order will help move the U.S. as close to universal background checks as possible without additional legislation, strengthen efforts to hold the gun industry accountable, and accelerate law enforcement efforts to identify and apprehend the shooters menacing our communities. name: =?utf-8?B?QeKAmXNoYW50aSBGLiBHaG9sYXI=?=
subject: Peter, welcome to the winning team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Peter, welcome to Team Emerge.
We are a community full of trailblazers, glass-ceiling shatterers, and fierce fighters. We are the nation's premier organization that recruits and trains Democratic women to run for office. We are the only political organization that focuses on effective state and national programming that gives women the tools they need to run and win. We are so thrilled to have you with us.

With the help of supporters like you, we’re inspiring our communities to action, fighting back against far-right extremism, and making real people the top priority in politics all over the country.

And through it all, we’re elevating the voices of Black, Brown, and Indigenous women and women of color, as well as LGBTQ+, young, and unmarried women. Because these are the voices of a growing force in American politics that make up the New American Majority – and we must focus on them to ensure a strong future for the Democratic Party and a just future for all.

Peter, I invite you to take a moment now to get to know us better. Watch our new video to hear directly from Emerge leaders transforming the face of politics today.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L-uN6Er7pss

Share on Twitter [https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?&text=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L-uN6Er7pss

Share on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DL-uN6Er7pss]

By backing these women on the campaign trail and beyond, we're building a powerful sisterhood to flip states blue, from school boards to state legislatures to Congress. Because when we help dedicated community champions run – and empower them with battle-tested tools and strategies – we win.

Thank you so much for joining us in this crucial work, Peter. Let's stay in touch.

A’shanti F. Gholar
President, Emerge

SUPPORT EMERGE [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/emerge2022?refcode=jtk809-ot-text]

Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.
You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. If you’d like to donate, click here. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/emerge2022?refcode=jtk809-fr-text

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ZShko813aE2PbaayjFt-qw2?unsubscribedata=o4UCFl6jCigaLWy3ZORCrtaXzTQFaB4cqkoFgPLPoFHPIJT7tKs3%2BwCkv1UCaYkC6LWrhHtlBaXaPz%2FsiAqi3oixh%2FWSRYBo2g9Jy0YHXkJgpzwbW3O%2BVbGH5n1FwtjTeC5mmyQRxpB7YBAmBZFrPToeqHCoWLz%2BnkNtElDE%2B0vYwhsK7wJhY7LN7GMCbQBS0H6ZQNa0Xw0pUM%2BZ3NM6O41Oc5FTqDzoHEGNU0kB78MDa7izZ4RIuEnEg6J3RINuqPxfWwNpSvw56Wwl72zQc6qXUPX%2F092ZrEK793k283MQJ2zoC%2BGqdxhyhssSRqW6D1zeVEd1kgfQDRVL7%2FYj0bm%2FIJRjkcTt80YE%2BEmEduvoKhlbNgHuCB9G9MvZqxbmgbLNQX4xaixahWEWEGLdXiWo2oUYfiMxPJ4L54hdrB4%3D off all our lists instantly. Questions or concerns? Contact us here. [connect@emergeamerica.org]

name: Maj. Gen. Paul Eaton, USA, Ret.
subject: Important news: Our ad is live
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
And to keep it up, we need your help.
#
Good morning, Derek.
I’ve got important news for you.
As of last night, our advertisement calling on the Pentagon to stop airing Tucker Carlson Tonight, Hannity, and Ingraham Angle on Military bases is live. This happened thanks to support from people like you.
But to keep it up, we need your help. Each spot we’re airing costs about $140. All told, if we raise $12,000 by the end of the day we can keep it running.
[**Watch the ad here, and chip in $3 to make sure it stays live.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-fox.62eIaN&refcode=em230317-1-15&t=1&akid=7953%2E3013755%2EHP5shc)
| [WATCH AND DONATE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-fox.62eIaN&refcode=em230317-1-15&t=2&akid=7953%2E3013755%2EHP5shc)
---
We’re running the advertisement on Fox News — during the Carlson, Hannity, and Ingraham shows — specifically on the cable systems that serve large Military installations like Norfolk Naval Air Station in Virginia, Joint Base Pearl Harbor-Hickam in Hawaii, Fort Bragg in North Carolina, Fort Hood in Texas, Fort Benning in Georgia, and more.
The strategy is to go straight to the source.
I’ve trained troops at Fort Benning, and I can confidently say that lies like the ones peddled by these particular hosts have a corrosive effect. Their disinformation undermines our Constitution itself, not to mention the oath that members of the Armed Forces take to uphold it.
To defend that Constitution and protect our National Security, I’m asking you to back us up.
[**Donate $3, or any amount, to help us stop these anti-democratic, anti-American messages from spreading in the ranks. It’s not on us to police what our men and women watch on their own time, but there’s no excuse for it to be broadcasting on base.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-fox.62eIaN&refcode=em230317-1-15&t=3&akid=7953%2E3013755%2EHP5shc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-fox.spcF9t&refcode=em230317-1-15&t=22&akid=7953%2E3013755%2EHP5shc)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-fox.9pDIra&refcode=em230317-1-15&t=23&akid=7953%2E3013755%2EHP5shc)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-fox.Ultimv&refcode=em230317-1-15&t=24&akid=7953%2E3013755%2EHP5shc)**
---
****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-pac-em-fox.04TCDa&refcode=em230317-1-15&t=25&akid=7953%2E3013755%2EHP5shc)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $250 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2930?c0=vv-pac-em-fox.2Vs1-7&refcode=em230317-1-15&t=26&akid=7953%2E3013755%2EHP5shc)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-fox.cKouBw&refcode=em230317-1-15&t=27&akid=7953%2E3013755%2EHP5shc)**
---
****
Your support here is critical.
Thank you in advance.
Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, Ret.

name: Anthony Figliola
subject: Peter, Be My Guest

name: Bill
subject: Fwd: Kevin invited you 5 TIMES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I know that you follow politics and watch your fair share of news, so just thought that this membership might be of interest to you.

| |
---
| | |
Hey Friend,

I hope you're doing well! I know that you follow politics and watch your fair share of news, so just thought that this membership might be of interest to you. I received my carrying card yesterday, very high quality. This is a really good way to support the GOP and have some real impact on our country. Anyway, I don't think I'm really supposed to forward this, but if the link works then I'm sure it's ok!

Best,

Bill

This is important, Peter, and it's one of the reasons why I chose to reach out to YOU today.

Senate Democrats and the media want you to believe that support for conservative candidates is _fleeting_.

This is a scare tactic to keep Republican voters home so the left can HOLD their Senate majority. I'm not asking for anything special today - _**just that you use one of the secure links in this email to PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT FOR REPUBLICANS.**_

**[PLEDGE YOUR REPUBLICAN SUPPORT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445354:6eaE2zGNV:m:1:3331421248:CAB3D740D9B1262029D6AAD723D26B6A:r)**

I informed my team earlier that your response is critical and that I need to know Republicans still have your support.

As one of my most trusted allies and a strong conservative fighter, knowing I can still count on you is critical to my efforts of winning back the Senate.

Republicans are facing an uphill battle. The Democrat machine has outraised us repeatedly.

We can't win without knowing you're still on our side and that we have your support.

**[Please, pledge your support for Republicans and help me FLIP THE SENATE MAJORITY.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445354:6eaE2zGNV:m:1:3331421248:CAB3D740D9B1262029D6AAD723D26B6A:r)**

body:
We have a rare opportunity to win back the mayor's office in Fort Wayne for Republicans | | If you're having trouble viewing this email, you can [see it online](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpUA2g9mF84fWtwOMgD9LCpo= "View email online").

[ ](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpW-idGlZ4Pb7wc_ZB2bGtss= "Facebook") [ ](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpZcZTYux28TmmoTty2QQfRA= "Instagram") [ ](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpYhyKyCEnBnu8tAAS2UWobQ= "LinkedIn") [ ](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpbvmmsBpLlWxprqZB6A0Z34= "Spotify") [ ](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpSu4qQRVB7pmmhmWCuK00QI= "Twitter") [ ](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpc6ciDpWCUjeuox2Zo8n-lM= "YouTube") [](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpV0wZqLdFQdNhtTW37_OjsU= "Share")
---
---
# I need your help to make a difference in Fort Wayne!
We are close to accomplishing something that has not happened in over 27 years - elect a Republican mayor to lead Fort Wayne. You may have met me at the state convention, where I was entertaining guests at Lana Keesling's reception Friday evening. Singing is a big part of my life, it's how I have met so many people who live in Fort Wayne. I have sung at more funerals, weddings and community events than I can remember. For decades I sang the national anthem before Komets home games in Fort Wayne. It is one way I try to support community activities - by lending the gift God has granted me to entertain others.
---
---
| | [Support Tom Didier](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpVO59Hnn43gxJtkR4rJEUGs= "Support Tom Didier")
---
I knew taking on an incumbent mayor would be difficult so I started early. We have been campaigning for almost two years since I first announced my intention to run and I have made great progress since then. In fact, at the beginning of 2023 our [poll results showed that I'm practically in a dead heat with the incumbent](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpaQYePfn6jOuhg-bXVGdHJo= "poll results showed that I'm practically in a dead heat with the incumbent"), Mayor Tom Henry. Now unless you are an expert in Fort Wayne politics, you probably don't know that I'm the only person who has ever defeated Tom Henry in an election. When I first ran for city council he was the incumbent and it was a close race, but as a rookie politician I took on a 20-year incumbent and won. Four years later he ran for mayor and won. Republicans have run several good candidates against him, but have not had any luck defeating him.
---
| | [Donate to Tom Didier](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpcFPP7mk2R1sSZlj72Rg0MI= "Donate to Tom Didier")
---
This time around things are different. While the incumbent usually has an advantage when things are going well, over half the general election voters in my poll were ready to elect someone other than Tom Henry even though they felt like the city is on the right track. We have a real opportunity to make a difference this year! I wouldn't be reaching out to you for help if I didn't think I was in a strong enough position to fight this out. But winning this race will take funding so that I can make my case to the voters. While voters may be ready to elect someone new, I have to make my case to earn their votes. We are already walking, calling, mailing and connecting with people every day, but [with your financial help I know we can be successful](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpWbRQu-iyzPYL0wSbyZ1xEE= "with your financial help I know we can be successful"). God Bless,
Tom

P.S. - If you are not in a position to make a financial contribution, but you would like to stay up to date on what is happening on the campaign trail and learn about upcoming events, please [sign up for my email list](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpeJpcG3TQf2UTgJKXEqymB0= "sign up for my email list").
---
---
[](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpdiopD-qxwJ8UotYdBVr5TY=) | **Diamonds and Jazz Fundraiser** **Thursday, March 23rd
6:00 - 8:00 pm** 200 East Main St., Lobby
Fort Wayne, IN 46802 Everyone attending this event has an chance to win a custom diamond! More info: [Contact Rachel Birenbaum](mailto:rachel@simplestrategiesllc.com "Contact Rachel Birenbaum") | [Donate Now](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lTgci5SYnkrWJ7sZkaxAmEZ-hnXI3hDT289npxoGEb4=/zauKXWa1w6DxyFbtffFcpYC0wG9AHwyH4hoCypI-e78= "Donate Now")
---|---
| **3rd Annual Golf Outing** **SAVE THE DATE!
****Thursday, May 25rd** Chestnut Hills will again host our golf outing this year. I hope you can join us. More info: [Contact Rachel Birenbaum](mailto:rachel@simplestrategiesllc.com "Contact Rachel Birenbaum")
---|---

name: Retired Sheriff David Clarke
subject: This is a death sentence. Please help!
disclaimer_text: paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447325:6hBi2zGwN:m:1:3366222934:4DE06FB76AB129240D511B962EE398E0:r)
---
| | [**A progressive district attorney wants to put an innocent cop in prison for 99 years. This is a****death********sentence****. Please help!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447325:6hBi2zGwN:m:1:3366222934:4DE06FB76AB129240D511B962EE398E0:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447325:6hBi2zGwN:m:1:3366222934:4DE06FB76AB129240D511B962EE398E0:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447325:6hBi2zGwN:m:1:3366222934:4DE06FB76AB129240D511B962EE398E0:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447325:6hBi2zGwN:m:1:3366222934:4DE06FB76AB129240D511B962EE398E0:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447325:6hBi2zGwN:m:1:3366222934:4DE06FB76AB129240D511B962EE398E0:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447325:6hBi2zGwN:m:1:3366222934:4DE06FB76AB129240D511B962EE398E0:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447325:6hBi2zGwN:m:1:3366222934:4DE06FB76AB129240D511B962EE398E0:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke
---
[Help Josh!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447325:6hBi2zGwN:m:1:3366222934:4DE06FB76AB129240D511B962EE398E0:r)

name: Alaskans For Honest Elections
subject: RCV Debate / Discussion in front of 350 People Today @ Captain Cook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALASKANS FOR HONEST ELECTIONS
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Send them our website to sign up. | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6414a39f51756609ae76591d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6414776bb7506f4227e7dcd7%26ss_email_id%3D6414a39f51756609ae76591d%26ss_campaign_name%3DRCV%2BDebate%2B%252F%2BDiscussion%2Bin%2Bfront%2Bof%2B350%2BPeople%2BToday%2B%2540%2BCaptain%2BCook%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-03-17T17%253A30%253A45Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6414776bb7506f4227e7dcd7&l=en-US&s=s7LhinidWO5bpezRR-PLKUPQ8R0%3D)
---
|
#### **Alaskans For Honest Elections (Repeal Rank Choice Voting)**
#### **Vs**
#### **Alaskans For Better Elections (Pro-Ranked Choice Voting)**
#### **Today March 17th, at the Captain Cook Hotel in front of 350 People (Oil & Gas Alliance Invite Only)**
---
---
|
---
[“Ranked choice voting is the product of millions of dollars from non-Alaskan, dark-money advertisements, which were spoon-fed to Alaskans by a barrage of ads before the election.” ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6414a39f51756609ae76591d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.adn.com%2Fopinions%2Fletters%2F2023%2F03%2F05%2Fletter-end-ranked-choice-voting%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0rh087RsDvZkhljKpaIwKYLeJ90GPwpDxCSeDQ5wlOlobKQOs1WynmmiY&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6414776bb7506f4227e7dcd7&l=en-US&s=npPaLC6kX28znoiF3YquHZlb3JQ%3D) Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily NewsAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system [during a podcast appearance with Donald Trump Jr.](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6414a39f51756609ae76591d&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fv27a5jw-1-on-1-with-the-speaker-of-the-house-in-nancy-pelosis-former-office.html&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6414776bb7506f4227e7dcd7&l=en-US&s=PYSo0gZRtd_2lBgMZFpV3zTJsSg%3D) Business Insider["Someone could get the most votes, and not win!" said McCarthy. "So if you come in 3rd, you win. What? 'I got a lot of second votes, I got a lot of 3rd vote — what does that mean?'"](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6414a39f51756609ae76591d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6414776bb7506f4227e7dcd7&l=en-US&s=NMmGAsKsbmPfc47Wb-Gbf2fnzfs%3D) Business Insider

**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**

---
|

**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---

I hope you’ll read my entire message, but if you’re short on time, will you split a donation between me and the Democratic Party of Wisconsin before you log off? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60339512/396784058/-300295681?refcode=20230317_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjljMzk1My1lOWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZn3S9ZoRimkme0RN5Vg1tSCYGUh9tKBK7GdJv5EkYY=) Here’s what you need to know: – Next month, voters in Wisconsin will cast their ballot in one of the most important – and telling – elections this year. – The Wisconsin state Supreme Court election will shape decisions on voting rights, abortion access, election subversion, legislative district lines and so much more. [**– Extreme MAGA Republican-backed groups have now dropped $3.2 million into TV ads to defeat Janet Protasiewicz.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60339513/396784059/-300295681?refcode=20230317_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjljMzk1My1lOWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZn3S9ZoRimkme0RN5Vg1tSCYGUh9tKBK7GdJv5EkYY=) [_**With so much at stake, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you, Peter, to help WisDems fight back. I’m personally asking: Can you split a donation between me and WisDems right now to help us elect Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin state Supreme Court? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60339514/396784060/-300295681?refcode=20230317_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjljMzk1My1lOWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZn3S9ZoRimkme0RN5Vg1tSCYGUh9tKBK7GdJv5EkYY=) Reproductive freedom. Fair maps. Democracy. It’s all on the line right now. In an off-year election like this, voter turnout will determine this race. [**But MAGA dark money groups are willing to spend MILLIONS to crush our chances to pull off a historic victory.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60339515/396784061/-300295681?refcode=20230317_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjljMzk1My1lOWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZn3S9ZoRimkme0RN5Vg1tSCYGUh9tKBK7GdJv5EkYY=) [_**Peter, I need a massive surge of grassroots support – 2,000 donations before midnight – to prove extremists do not belong on the Wisconsin state Supreme Court. body:
We’re sorry politicians like Sinema have let us all down. Ruben won’t. You’ll be proud of him, and his votes, in the Senate.
#

Let’s just be real honest for a second.
Kyrsten Sinema takes huge amounts of money from hedge fund managers and votes to protect their financial interests.
She voted against raising the minimum wage in the most obnoxious way possible.
If she wasn’t in the Senate today, Democrats would have the votes to bypass the filibuster to expand voting rights, protect abortion, and make our communities safer from gun violence.
She claims to be above it all, but is a part of the problem in Washington, D.C.
We’re sorry politicians like Sinema have let us all down. Ruben won’t. You’ll be proud of him, and his votes, in the Senate.

We've known about Former CNN president Jeff Zucker's anti-Trump bias for years now, but I (almost) can't believe how far he was willing to go!

**Former CNN president Jeff Zucker told employees not to look too far into the "lab leak theory" concerning the origins of the Chinese coronavirus because he considered the story a _" Trump talking point."_**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445432:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)

A true journalist would've looked into it. _**But CNN l doesn 't employ true journalists.**_

My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.

I'm looking to add 500 new donors in the next 48 hours to bury CNN and bankrupt the corrupt media. But I can't do it without your help.

This is your chance to expose the media's bias against conservatives. **Click any link below to make the media pay! **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445433:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445434:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445435:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445436:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445437:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445438:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445439:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445440:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445432:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)

**There 's a reason why almost everyone we knew from CNN just a few years ago has been let go since.**

When Chris Cuomo used his position as a CNN host to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic and to LIE about Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations to keep him in elected office and save his career, we were quick to discover it.

**MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo 's coverage, EXPOSED his lies on social media, and ended his career.**

Brian Stelter devoted the entirety of his run as a CNN anchor to President Donald Trump's _ "criminal presidency"_ and questioning not only the sanity of Trump but also his _" cult"_ following of supporters. He often exposed his leftist bias in his criticisms of Republicans and news outlets (like Fox News) that refused to carry water for Obama and Biden.

**After we exposed his left-wing bias on several of our NewsBusters blogs, Brian Stelter was fired.**

And because of our work, CNN demoted Don Lemon, _one of the leading men in the Zucker-directed CNN-vs.-Trump mega-drama,_ from Primetime to Mornings.

And with your support, _we can FIRE at least 2 more CNN staff_ this year over their constant lying.

[_**It's time to make CNN pay for its dishonesty.**__**Click here to show the media that you 're tired of their lies **__**> >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445432:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)

MRC's proven three-step process has revealed the media's leftwing bias to the public. Here's how.

**STEP 1:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**STEP 2:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**STEP 3: MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, **sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The MRC also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

[_**Will you help us continue to expose the media for the liars they really are? Click here to send a gift of any amount today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445432:Jsag2zGNM:m:1:3365131770:E3E999BAD3EE7CDB8549E21D9C48F3E5:r)

Thank you for joining the fight.

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

_The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible._

name: Add Your Name via Left Action
subject: Bring criminal charges against Trump ASAP for trying to steal the 2020 election (Sign your name)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell Georgia Officials to Indict Trump ASAP >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf456809-af17-4b2a-ae36-4f4775afa96a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6869f773-f08f-41c0-aa4d-e4c0d4d769b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | We've all heard [the phone call](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2c774a5-e7d4-4e83-9830-76c765dafa4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) where Donald Trump pressured a Georgia election official to "find" enough votes to overturn the results and give him the state. And this was apparently just [one of multiple calls](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8601b2b2-7c24-4b5d-8bca-b1101a26f984/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to Georgia officials where Trump tried to steal the election and effectively end our democracy. **It's time for Georgia officials to bring criminal charges against Trump.[Add your name, and ask them to do it ASAP.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4aa6f5af-2df3-49a0-a83c-d61f25fdb906/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** A Fulton County (Atlanta) grand jury has been looking at the case, and DA Fani Willis indicated in January that a decision whether to indict was "imminent." We welcome this, and urge her to move against Trump. And we urge other Georgia officials to bring similar cases as appropriate. We need Trump to be held accountable for his many, many crimes – and an indictment in Georgia would be a great start! **But we can't afford to wait too long. Trump is an ongoing threat to our nation, and we need to move now.** [**Add your name, and tell Georgia to indict Trump ASAP.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5246b39c-7386-48d7-b0e2-4193097f7b44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8c2ff3a-47fb-465c-807b-8f70c185e7a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P.S. - if you no longer with to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4bc65d1-3be1-4174-bf71-089c73d1ddd6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58233c27-649f-45c9-95e4-a267bc73eb16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T250644f3-05c3-4b32-aedd-12d60acacd7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2202e715-0a72-4c8a-a51c-9d66808ac0af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Helen Gym
subject: I wanted to be the first to welcome you to our team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]
You’re receiving this message because we thought you’d be interested in learning more about Helen Gym’s campaign for Mayor of Philadelphia. Helen Gym is a mother, teacher, community activist, and former City Councilmember who continues to fight for a city that works for all of us. Our emails keep you informed about Helen’s work and her campaign to create a safer, more prosperous, and equitable Philadelphia. We’d be so grateful to have your support, but you have the option of receiving only our most important emails [https://secure.ngpvan.com/lCqlIi8wiEqQJh2aAmAtwQ2] or unsubscribing. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vi6mnRf0jkCnbZV_ILvlFQ2?unsubscribedata=Ncr%2F6F1qDOto2PplC7rW%2BB%2BvXGzl0etStZIJvs%2FSCrIoZo6jWplWSDJlu5fFGniOBKZTzjJDkKAS2yVASdJI6vMqEJVUkU3%2BhJ3m3WMN7w3PB%2BF5O88sxrc0pMZub2oKUgYZY3GWFEe3rww%2BStILNDYO86hUMcsYeEK7p5qNhnS%2B9TI9Cdl0kh98QBSBGZCOBH3rv8PxKbqfr%2Fng2%2FBoMFPdj%2Bmb%2BEj0TATJ1tjSctAD0UhffZ59%2BeBgowRMhJY0mg0tO8BRlmgHz8jwcx%2BuGNlBy%2F0KQOn6pFqPMttnaWkdzRFOSNk%2BelJpXEma0mqoBuNTEDxNdJu46FVdC2O7h6gqQUIhv1UziRB%2FR7xfYc3Uq4Y6AJYacD3Kt1%2B65wCBygtZbcIsKhEQt18T%2BaAHGlj1BUdkRtwd4S4FqXDgbjY2VSGc9PHzT%2FQKc0qGwbik]

Hello friend — I wanted to be the first one to welcome you to our team! I’m honored to have your support in our fight for a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia.

Before I ever held elected office, I knew the power of everyday people to transform our politics and our city.

I’m a mom who wouldn’t let children be cheated out of their education. I’m a teacher who believes in the transformative power of our schools. I’m an organizer who wasn’t afraid to take on powerful interests who would deny us affordable homes, safe communities, or a healthy and stable family.

Philadelphia needs a new kind of leader who can guide us through crisis and with a vision for lifting up the people of this city. Someone who has fought fearlessly and isn’t afraid to do what is hard.

With your help, it’s time to elect a real fighter to protect the city we call home. That’s why I’m running for Mayor of Philadelphia.

We need a leader who will take real action on community safety — one who will make sure the police show up when called, take guns off our streets, who will center victims and survivors with a focus on healing from trauma, and who will tackle the root causes of violence by reinvesting in employment, safe havens, and opportunity.

We also need a leader who understands that our schools are our future, and that it’s time for a Mayor to deliver the safe, quality education worthy of the dreams of every child and parent. We need a leader who will deliver a real anti-poverty agenda and a promise for economic opportunity and livability for all Philadelphians. We need a leader who will rebuild the infrastructure of our city with good union jobs and tackle the climate crisis.

I’ve worked tirelessly on this agenda before I ever held office. I had led massive grassroots movements to rebuild our neighborhoods, to invest in our schools, and to lead a city forward. And once in office, I led the boldest agenda on City Council for safer communities, stronger schools, and housing as a human right.Friend, I promise that as long as I am working to serve this incredible city, you’ll always have a champion in your corner fighting for you. Will you take the first step and endorse my campaign today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vRyggBa7ZEyEJ2Etg2uOQA2]

ENDORSE HELEN [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vRyggBa7ZEyEJ2Etg2uOQA2?contactdata=ucoG19RjsgR4G0gGyJluJIhiee/Pq1CWHGXWcGsfiekRl6rnsKJNgdbUvcAPqjSrlmOyl8U0vL11Q92nTOvvc1v0VzcPuZGta8p9ePdu2978jLzzlIJEVX2LFLsMJCgtuIjh5FpC8EusxEJBG1TCKDmsqXWsWEZ5iNPjIlxyjZ8=&quick=true]

Thank you so much for supporting this work.

Onward,

Helen Gym

Candidate for Mayor of Philadelphia
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vi6mnRf0jkCnbZV_ILvlFQ2?unsubscribedata=Ncr%2F6F1qDOto2PplC7rW%2BB%2BvXGzl0etStZIJvs%2FSCrIoZo6jWplWSDJlu5fFGniOBKZTzjJDkKAS2yVASdJI6vMqEJVUkU3%2BhJ3m3WMN7w3PB%2BF5O88sxrc0pMZub2oKUgYZY3GWFEe3rww%2BStILNDYO86hUMcsYeEK7p5qNhnS%2B9TI9Cdl0kh98QBSBGZCOBH3rv8PxKbqfr%2Fng2%2FBoMFPdj%2Bmb%2BEj0TATJ1tjSctAD0UhffZ59%2BeBgowRMhJY0mg0tO8BRlmgHz8jwcx%2BuGNlBy%2F0KQOn6pFqPMttnaWkdzRFOSNk%2BelJpXEma0mqoBuNTEDxNdJu46FVdC2O7h6gqQUIhv1UziRB%2FR7xfYc3Uq4Y6AJYacD3Kt1%2B65wCBygtZbcIsKhEQt18T%2BaAHGlj1BUdkRtwd4S4FqXDgbjY2VSGc9PHzT%2FQKc0qGwbik]

Hey Derek, As your Senator and a proud Democrat, I know firsthand the importance of electing strong Democratic leaders who will fight for our values and make a real difference in people's lives. That's why I'm reaching out to you today to ask for your support in helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Virginia. We have a crucial election coming up, and the stakes have never been higher. We need to elect leaders who will work tirelessly to create good-paying jobs, invest in education and infrastructure, and ensure access to affordable healthcare for all Virginians. But we can't do it without your help. The Republican opposition is already gearing up to pour millions of dollars into their campaigns, backed by big corporate donors and special interests. We need to fight back with the power of grassroots donations from people like you. [**Can you make a contribution today to help elect Democrats in Virginia, split between DPVA and my team?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60315329/396727063/150936960?refcode=dpva-em-221107-warner-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2RkODc3My1jYWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sw51odrES_KMEFeYTZwGZ6B5ec4T4Y8hgr7DbXD8u9o=)Your support will go directly towards helping our candidates get their message out to voters, mobilizing volunteers, and ensuring we have the resources we need to win in November. We have a chance to make real progress for Virginia families, but we can only do it if we stand together and fight for our values. [**Please join me in supporting Democrats up and down the ballot by splitting a contribution between my team and the Democratic Party of Virginia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60315330/396727064/150936960?refcode=dpva-em-221107-warner-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2RkODc3My1jYWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sw51odrES_KMEFeYTZwGZ6B5ec4T4Y8hgr7DbXD8u9o=) There’s a great deal of work left to be done – protecting access to abortion rights, creating an economy that works for all, and improving our public education system – and Democrats are poised to get it done.
