name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: 31 Consecutive Months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _31 Consecutive Months_
---
On Monday the Bureau of Labor Statistics released January unemployment figures, showing Indiana with a 3.1% unemployment rate, the same as December and lower than the national rate of 3.4%. This marked the 31st consecutive month that Indiana's unemployment rate was lower than the nation's, a streak longer than that of states like Florida and Texas. With our results-driven focus, we've created an economic environment that allows entrepreneurs and businesses of all sizes to thrive, leading to more growth and more opportunity for all Hoosiers. Don't forget — in 2022, Indiana had its highest level of capital investment ever, with 218 companies committing to locate or expand here while investing more than $22.2 billion in operations and creating 24,059 new jobs. And this year, Governor Holcomb has set an ambitious goal to reach $23 billion! It's clear that the "Indiana Way" is working — and that's in spite of the disastrous Biden administration, not because of it. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer **P.S.** Happy St. Patrick's Day and best of luck to Purdue and IU!
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend?[Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/90319a57a41b9e3dc3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Celebrating Development in Lake, Union County_
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** speaks during the Union County economic development announcement in Liberty on Thursday._
---
On Wednesday, **Gov. Eric Holcomb** joined local officials and community leaders in Gary to announce $10 million of Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI) funding will be used to support the $30 million Tolleston Opportunity Campus, which will increase access to childcare, health care and other community programming. “Indiana’s strong fiscal foundation has placed us in a position of strength and has enabled us to make unprecedented investments in our rural, urban and suburban communities,” said **Gov. Holcomb**. “This historic initiative in Gary will provide critical services for Hoosiers, increase quality of place and position the city and surrounding region for continued success.” Then on Thursday, **Gov. Eric Holcomb** joined local officials and executives of Full Throttle Fulfillment Solutions, a woman-owned, third-party logistics provider, as the company announced plans to establish operations in Union County, creating up to 50 new jobs by the end of 2026.

“Indiana’s economic momentum continues to accelerate thanks to entrepreneurs and successful small businesses like Full Throttle Fulfillment Solutions,” said **Gov. Holcomb**. “As a state, we have a long history of entrepreneurship and innovation thanks to our strong Hoosier work ethic backed by forward looking leaders. It’s clear our vision and entrepreneurial spirit will continue to drive both our local communities and economy forward for years to come.” This marked the first economic development win in the county in nearly 30 years _._ _— Indiana Economic Development Corporation news releases_
---
| | |
---
# _House Republicans Further 'Commitment to America,' Introduce H.R. 1_

---
This week, U.S. House Republicans officially introduced**** H.R. 1, the [**Lower Energy Costs Act**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/2679a775a80e66a9c3d6b838967d376c/40313), a signature piece of the House Republicans' "Commitment to America" that contains reforms to speed up construction and energy production throughout the United States. H.R. 1 would unleash American energy and lower costs for families by:
* Increasing domestic energy production
* Reforming the permitting process for all industries
* Reversing anti-energy policies advanced by the Biden Administration
* Streamlining energy infrastructure and exports
* Boosting the production and processing of critical minerals

Included in H.R. 1 is [H.R. 1140](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/fbcfbd0234fe2dedc3d6b838967d376c/40313), authored by **Rep. Greg Pence** , to unlock critical energy minerals, and [H.R. 1068](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/748b1e705c1ff14fc3d6b838967d376c/40313), the Securing America’s Critical Minerals Supply Act, authored by **Rep. Larry Bucshon**. To read more about H.R. 1, click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/23c51d0ac46c6c5bc3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
# _This Week at the Statehouse_
---
Bills are once again moving from committees — some for the last time — while others have more to go through and others are headed to the governor's desk. _Priority Bills of Governor Holcomb_ All bills have been assigned to a committee, while [SB 4](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/82eafbd0cbabb8b7c3d6b838967d376c/40313) received a hearing in the committee on Public Health. _Priority Bills of House Republicans_ All bills have been assigned to a committee, with [HB 1003](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/d95259c933cbd535c3d6b838967d376c/40313) passing one of two committees this week, and [HB 1007](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/8fd37c8d5d4ecf15c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and [1009](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/d3b4abb8bbcabfd4c3d6b838967d376c/40313) both on second reading. _Priority Bills of Senate Republicans_ All bills have been assigned to a committee, while [SB 4](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/6b18da6782549fb6c3d6b838967d376c/40313) received a hearing in the committee on Public Health. To stay up-to-date, visit [iga.in.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/9b15c2493e72e37fc3d6b838967d376c/40313) and the governor's bill watch page [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/44b46849670c4894c3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
# _ICYMI: National Review: Biden’s Budget Includes $5.5 Trillion in Tax Hikes_

---
As the _New York Times_ put it, President Biden's proposed budget **["doubles down on the power of government."](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/b103d8705fb0ee48c3d6b838967d376c/40313) **It also increases IRS funding by an [additional 15%](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/2ba5f052aa9c6f58c3d6b838967d376c/40313) on top of the additional **$80 billion** it received in the so-called "Inflation Reduction Act." From _[National Review](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/fcec6a5968c31103c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_ : President Biden on Thursday unveiled a budget that has a staggering $5.5 trillion in tax hikes to help finance an expansion of Obamacare, Medicaid, and housing subsidies, as well as a slew of other federal programs. Though the budget claims $3 trillion of deficit savings, that is only when measured against the budget that was already inflated by his first two years in office. While the budget is not going anywhere, given Republican control of the House of Representatives, it does represent Biden’s opening salvo in upcoming negotiations over the budget and raising the debt ceiling._
Story continues._
---
|
---
# __Now Hiring Interns__
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/005844530eeedf69c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
If you know a college student that's interested in stepping into the world of Hoosier politics, **we've got them covered**. We're looking for young, talented Hoosiers to join us at our headquarters in Indianapolis. This opportunity allows them to get hands-on experience working for Indiana's largest and most successful political organization, providing administrative support to staff and taking on special projects (and more) while helping build their resume, gain insight into the political and legislative processes, and make valuable connections. And we'll do this all while helping them earn college credit. **Have someone in mind? Send them to[this link](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/922a105757b7346e/7dbf3e15cd75b3bcc3d6b838967d376c/40313) for more information and to apply!**

clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | 31 Consecutive Months On Monday the Bureau of Labor Statistics released January unemployment figures, showing Indiana with a 3.1% unemployment rate, the same as December and lower than the national rate of 3.4%. This marked the 31st consecutive month that Indiana's unemployment rate was lower than the nation's, a streak longer than that of states like Florida and Texas. With our results-driven focus, we've created an economic environment that allows entrepreneurs and businesses of all sizes to thrive, leading to more growth and more opportunity for all Hoosiers. Don't forget — in 2022, Indiana had its highest level of capital investment ever, with 218 companies committing to locate or expand here while investing more than $22.2 billion in operations and creating 24,059 new jobs. And this year, Governor Holcomb has set an ambitious goal to reach $23 billion! It's clear that the "Indiana Way" is working — and that's in spite of the disastrous Biden administration, not because of it. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely, Chairman Kyle Hupfer P.S. Happy St. Patrick's Day and best of luck to Purdue and IU! | Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Celebrating Development in Lake, Union County | | Governor Eric Holcomb speaks during the Union County economic development announcement in Liberty on Thursday. On Wednesday, Gov. Eric Holcomb joined local officials and community leaders in Gary to announce $10 million of Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI) funding will be used to support the $30 million Tolleston Opportunity Campus, which will increase access to childcare, health care and other community programming. “Indiana’s strong fiscal foundation has placed us in a position of strength and has enabled us to make unprecedented investments in our rural, urban and suburban communities,” said Gov. Holcomb. “This historic initiative in Gary will provide critical services for Hoosiers, increase quality of place and position the city and surrounding region for continued success.” Then on Thursday, Gov. Eric Holcomb joined local officials and executives of Full Throttle Fulfillment Solutions, a woman-owned, third-party logistics provider, as the company announced plans to establish operations in Union County, creating up to 50 new jobs by the end of 2026. “Indiana’s economic momentum continues to accelerate thanks to entrepreneurs and successful small businesses like Full Throttle Fulfillment Solutions,” said Gov. Holcomb. “As a state, we have a long history of entrepreneurship and innovation thanks to our strong Hoosier work ethic backed by forward looking leaders. It’s clear our vision and entrepreneurial spirit will continue to drive both our local communities and economy forward for years to come.” This marked the first economic development win in the county in nearly 30 years . — Indiana Economic Development Corporation news releases | | | House Republicans Further 'Commitment to America,' Introduce H.R. 1 This week, U.S. House Republicans officially introduced** H.R. 1, the , a signature piece of the House Republicans' "Commitment to America" that contains reforms to speed up construction and energy production throughout the United States. H.R. 1 would unleash American energy and lower costs for families by: Increasing domestic energy production Reforming the permitting process for all industries Reversing anti-energy policies advanced by the Biden Administration Streamlining energy infrastructure and exports Boosting the production and processing of critical minerals Included in H.R. 1 is , authored by Rep. Greg Pence , to unlock critical energy minerals, and , the Securing America’s Critical Minerals Supply Act, authored by Rep. Larry Bucshon. To read more about H.R. 1, click . | This Week at the Statehouse Bills are once again moving from committees — some for the last time — while others have more to go through and others are headed to the governor's desk. Priority Bills of Governor Holcomb All bills have been assigned to a committee, while received a hearing in the committee on Public Health. Priority Bills of House Republicans All bills have been assigned to a committee, with passing one of two committees this week, and and both on second reading. Priority Bills of Senate Republicans All bills have been assigned to a committee, while received a hearing in the committee on Public Health. To stay up-to-date, visit and the governor's bill watch page . | ICYMI: National Review: Biden’s Budget Includes $5.5 Trillion in Tax Hikes As the New York Times put it, President Biden's proposed budget It also increases IRS funding by an on top of the additional $80 billion it received in the so-called "Inflation Reduction Act." From : President Biden on Thursday unveiled a budget that has a staggering $5.5 trillion in tax hikes to help finance an expansion of Obamacare, Medicaid, and housing subsidies, as well as a slew of other federal programs. Though the budget claims $3 trillion of deficit savings, that is only when measured against the budget that was already inflated by his first two years in office. While the budget is not going anywhere, given Republican control of the House of Representatives, it does represent Biden’s opening salvo in upcoming negotiations over the budget and raising the debt ceiling. But for the last **_TWO DECADES_ ,** presidents utilized the resolution to justify military operations in more than 20 countries and against groups that did NOT exist before 9/11. We accomplished a lot last cycle. Now, we're working to hit even _bigger_ goals in the next one.

To finish strong, we've set an ambitious goal of 150,000 total new or renewed 2023 members before midnight tonight. As you know, more EMILYs List members means more support for our candidates, so this is an all-hands-on-deck effort. I'm happy to tell you that we now only need 8,425 members to hit this goal! As I plan for the 2023-2024 election cycle, I want to get a baseline for the level of support we can expect. So I pulled our current records to see where you stand: EMILYS LIST 2023 MEMBERSHIP RECORD Prepared for: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2023 Member Status: No, not yet! It's time to think about all we can achieve in the coming election cycle. There is a lot of work to do and a lot at stake. That's exactly why we set our 2023 goal at 150,000 members before this drive is over. Hitting this goal means far-reaching candidate recruitment, the best training and political advising in the business, and supporting a robust pipeline of successful EMILYs List women in 2023 and 2024. These races may seem far out, but investing now means expanding the Senate majority, taking back the House, flipping state legislatures, and electing Democratic pro-choice women governors who will protect abortion access no matter what in the coming years. We accomplished a lot last cycle. Now, we're working to hit even bigger goals in the next one. name: Team Baldwin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hey Peter — After Roe v. Wade was overturned last year,
Wisconsin turned back the clock and sent reproductive rights back to 1849.

Millions of Wisconsinites are deprived of their right to make decisions
about their own bodies, and Tammy is leading the fight to reverse this
rule.

Last week, she reintroduced the Women’s Health Protection Act, which
protects both those seeking abortions and those performing them. She also
wrote an op-ed on the topic highlighting all the ways our country has
turned back the clock on women’s rights and harmed countless women and
families in the process ([ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1895?t=1004&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]click here if you want to read it).

Peter, it’s 2023,
and abortion access should be protected, not stripped away.

[ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1924?t=1005&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]Tammy is leading the charge, and we’re hoping you can chip in to
support our campaign so she can keep up the hard work to protect and
re-establish reproductive rights here in Wisconsin and across the country.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1925?t=1006&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1926?t=1007&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1927?t=1008&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1928?t=1009&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1929?t=1010&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1930?t=1011&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

The overturning of Roe v. Wade last year was devastating. Tammy turned her
anger and sadness into action, just as so many of us did in the wake of
the Supreme Court’s decision. She protested and marched alongside us, and
she also got right back to work in the Senate to pass protections for
abortions.

Getting the Women’s Health Protection Act across the finish line and onto
President Biden’s desk won’t be an easy feat — but Tammy isn’t going to
back down from the challenges ahead.

After all, she never gave up the fight to protect marriage equality, and
her hard work paid off when the Respect for Marriage Act became federal
law last year.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1930?t=1012&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]When there’s a tough fight ahead, there’s no one better to have on your
side than Tammy — which is why we’re hoping you can support her campaign
and her efforts to protect our reproductive rights. Peter, can
you pitch in to support our campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1925?t=1013&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1926?t=1014&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1927?t=1015&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1928?t=1016&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1929?t=1017&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1930?t=1018&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for stepping up. Tammy’s not giving up the fight to protect
abortion access, and she’s glad to have your support.

— Team Baldwin

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1002&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1003&akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

http://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=60%2E35263%2EYsDKwB

Friend,
Together, we’re taking huge steps forward to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect.
**We’re holding opioid manufacturers accountable for the death and destruction they caused in our communities, putting money back into the pockets of victims of wage theft, protecting reproductive freedom across the country, and so much more.**
We can’t get complacent though. Republicans are attacking our rights and obstructing our agenda at every chance they get. And with our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year right around the corner on March 31, it’s more important than ever that Keith has your support.
Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset in January. **That means you can make a contribution right now, and get up to $50 (or $100 for couples) FULLY REFUNDED.**
[**We can’t afford to slow down for one second, friend. Will you take advantage of your PCR and make a refundable contribution right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60318277/396738345/1170083154?refcode=body&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZlOTUxYS1jZWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PebTrQ9diRqpD2ANXUlK5puGgUrEdmX4JCN1J_Ej-rY=)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8usesa7ncjhesgqqqri7bumm1g6k5sl6f8ap8s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It 's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z813s6pc6qfif1lbsgr49j4nehh615m3vikpp76o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers ' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children. "**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4cj14a0k7bdrrsbq739lk28lrvau3hj4sd7sau0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoms587pkrqr852ei9jnsm7g418cnpjb5g6mupfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $25**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ur9bfjvmnh2jefmd08uri5f7fcrkc45s4b5vj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3mtibq0dqe11gp1u4kqul221pg4gt6c5839ukd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znjt3k03qgn01bplh3ogdt8vp93r66l5hhsaoc2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaqtp55qqg3mhckkk3vjks9rojvv8oe2km71cue8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9pnoajn266f5014pgnha075esrvuocnuv7ojmao_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl4nd7ntbb5om5hcjar70sh8mofm9so9mqa0ag4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq8v0ub8jkt8v4imfru3phccbr2s6pj3e7fm674o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1jm6o36c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

ICYMI News

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: John Bisognano
subject: ICYMI: Exciting news for the NDRC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
this is a huge moment for our grassroots movement
|
---

Team, I wanted to make sure you did not miss the exciting news: I’m honored for the opportunity to serve as president of the NDRC alongside my colleague, Marina Jenkins, who will be our new executive director.

**President Obama said recently that our work, “has meant the difference between victory and defeat, and our democracy is in stronger shape because of what they have accomplished.”** Marina has been with the NDRC since the beginning as our Director of Litigation and Policy, and her tireless work has been crucial to that success. I can’t wait to partner with her as we continue this vital fight.

[**_Together, I’m confident we can build on our solid foundation and secure more victories in the ongoing fight for fair maps. Will you join us in recommitting to this democracy-saving work with a donation of any amount today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60318321/396738421/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230317_FR_3O_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiZmU5NTFhLWNlYzQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VC1O6nNQV6jK9TJa08SnIHHeczEk9RHjJAdrWdslwRw=)

Thank you for being part of this grassroots team.

– Biz

John Bisognano

clean_body: this is a huge moment for our grassroots movement | Team, I wanted to make sure you did not miss the exciting news: I’m honored for the opportunity to serve as president of the NDRC alongside my colleague, Marina Jenkins, who will be our new executive director. President Obama said recently that our work, “has meant the difference between victory and defeat, and our democracy is in stronger shape because of what they have accomplished.” Marina has been with the NDRC since the beginning as our Director of Litigation and Policy, and her tireless work has been crucial to that success. I can’t wait to partner with her as we continue this vital fight. = Thank you for being part of this grassroots team. – Biz John Bisognano President | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: BREAKING NEWS - CNN Insider leak
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445403:6G6EozGzN:m:1:3331421248:45F1F09FF19AB39811B3E623C2BA7FDA:r)

Peter,

We've known about Former CNN president Jeff Zucker's anti-Trump bias for years now, but I (almost) can't believe how far he was willing to go!

**Former CNN president Jeff Zucker told employees not to look too far into the "lab leak theory" concerning the origins of the Chinese coronavirus because he considered the story a _" Trump talking point."_**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445403:6G6EozGzN:m:1:3331421248:45F1F09FF19AB39811B3E623C2BA7FDA:r)

A true journalist would've looked into it. _**But CNN l doesn 't employ true journalists.**_

My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.

I'm looking to add 500 new donors in the next 48 hours to bury CNN and bankrupt the corrupt media. But I can't do it without your help.

**There 's a reason why almost everyone we knew from CNN just a few years ago has been let go since.**

When Chris Cuomo used his position as a CNN host to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic and to LIE about Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations to keep him in elected office and save his career, we were quick to discover it.

**MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo 's coverage, EXPOSED his lies on social media, and ended his career.**

Brian Stelter devoted the entirety of his run as a CNN anchor to President Donald Trump's _ "criminal presidency"_ and questioning not only the sanity of Trump but also his _" cult"_ following of supporters. He often exposed his leftist bias in his criticisms of Republicans and news outlets (like Fox News) that refused to carry water for Obama and Biden.

**After we exposed his left-wing bias on several of our NewsBusters blogs, Brian Stelter was fired.**

And because of our work, CNN demoted Don Lemon, _one of the leading men in the Zucker-directed CNN-vs.-Trump mega-drama,_ from Primetime to Mornings.

And with your support, _we can FIRE at least 2 more CNN staff_ this year over their constant lying.

[_**It's time to make CNN pay for its dishonesty.**__**Click here to show the media that you 're tired of their lies **__**> >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445403:6G6EozGzN:m:1:3331421248:45F1F09FF19AB39811B3E623C2BA7FDA:r)

MRC's proven three-step process has revealed the media's leftwing bias to the public. Here's how.

**STEP 1:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**STEP 2:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**STEP 3: MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, **sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The MRC also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

[_**Will you help us continue to expose the media for the liars they really are? Click here to send a gift of any amount today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445403:6G6EozGzN:m:1:3331421248:45F1F09FF19AB39811B3E623C2BA7FDA:r)

Thank you for joining the fight.

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

body:
With effective state legislatures, a future free from gun violence is within our reach
#

Friends -
Earlier this week, I was proud to stand alongside advocates, survivors, students, and lawmakers at the Michigan State Capitol demanding that legislators take action on gun safety.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230317-1-subs&t=1&akid=4434%2E3935704%2EqkL_ma)
The Michigan state legislature is considering a package of commonsense gun safety measures that the majority of Michiganders support. These measures include universal background checks, extreme risk protection orders (aka red flag laws), and safe storage requirements.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230317-1-subs&t=2&akid=4434%2E3935704%2EqkL_ma)
Michigan communities, like so many others, have time and time again been torn apart by gun violence. Last year, we watched in horror as the tragic mass shooting at Oxford High School unfolded. Just about a month ago, we witnessed more tragedy at Michigan State University. There were students who spoke at the rally who had been impacted by both shootings. No young person should have to experience this type of trauma even once, let alone twice.
We rallied to honor the victims of these horrific acts of violence and to say enough is enough. It’s long past time for Michigan lawmakers to pass legislation to protect communities from gun violence.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230317-1-subs&t=3&akid=4434%2E3935704%2EqkL_ma)
Michigan serves as a model for how important it is to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot. After the 2022 elections, the Michigan state legislature flipped from red to blue. Now, both the state House and Senate are filled with lawmakers who have the courage to act and protect their communities from acts of senseless gun violence.
Yesterday, the Michigan Senate passed the majority of this historic legislative package. Now, it’s the Michigan House’s turn to act so we can get this legislation to Governor Whitmer’s desk.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230317-1-subs&t=4&akid=4434%2E3935704%2EqkL_ma)
I am proud to stand with Michiganders. This package of gun safety legislation will save lives. We won’t back down until it’s passed, and we’ll keep fighting until every state takes such important steps to protect us.
In solidarity,
Gabby Giffords

* * *

**Giffords PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates up and down the ballot who will fight for safer gun laws.**
[**Please, make a contribution to Giffords PAC today to help us continue our work in states all across the country to keep our communities safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230317-1-subs&t=5&akid=4434%2E3935704%2EqkL_ma)
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230317-1-subs&t=6&akid=4434%2E3935704%2EqkL_ma)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=4434%2E3935704%2EqkL_ma) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:

# Friends,
# Our Honorary Chairman, Bill Spadea, is working hard to promote the common sense message! His latest article appeared on NJ.com and we wanted to share it with you. [Click here](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/7bfe30a2ecd016194be87f31cee7c719/eJyNkMFOwzAMht8l57rZ2nWH3qZpmqqOHRCcUdRaJKN1osQjlKnvTgbTTiBxtT9__u2LYCRF3PSiFh_8WRSlyITHzjiDxFtLrLrvblGtluUyE4Oht723Zyfqy6_Dd-BaXq_LTPDkMBFPj5tt2xz3L4fm2CbQKZ9W_EtTraq7ZvewaQ5inv_04mh4957UQdTsz3i9pzfpJn72Q-I1swu1lDHGnE55Z0dpnSFjSRaLopSLUnrVGwtB2wjaBoaY4gFb6LSiVwTCCCf0ASfAIXkhOUZLEJACgrODYdMZRQFu4lzzOKRoyjmk_vbVFqefgPMXisSDKw==) to see what he had to say or check it out below. Our efforts to restore accountable government and common sense to Trenton are just getting started! We need your help as we move forward. Please sign up today to join our Common Sense Team!
---
| | [Join Elect Common Sense Today!](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/7d7e2a9f46667e6cd9e195984b3fd303/eJyNkD0LwkAMhv9LZmuxWoduIlJK1UF0lqMX8LDNHXepWqX_3fiBk4JbSJ484c0NGEkRFxoyuPA1ScYwAI-VcQaJ55ZYVc9pkk5G49EAakPH3NvWQXb7uvwBHu3pVFa4cyjEdjObl8U63y-LdSmgU15O_KVJJ-lHs1jNiiX0_U8vNoYXJ1EHyNi3-MijjWTina-FPzC7kMVxwKr1ODwbkvmwsk2MtUCRVI2lKCAFjLUlxRix1aoTt3IOSb_fUmL3utDfAXLxbJQ=)
---
|
---
| Radio show host: Want to change New Jersey?
Elect common-sense politicians.
By Bill Spadea
I love my job. For four hours every weekday, New Jerseyans call my radio show to tell me what’s on their mind. They remind me daily why I love this state: because nowhere in the country will you find tougher, more authentic, more passionate people. Every call is different, but recently there’s been a common theme. Increasingly, New Jerseyans are concerned about the future. They feel ignored, and most of all, generally fed up. Callers tell me they’re worried about affording property taxes while also paying for basic expenses. They’re concerned about what’s taught at their child’s school and hope every night their kid doesn’t become another victim of the opioid epidemic. For many, New Jersey has become a place that spends their money everywhere but their hometown. They feel like the system is rigged to ignore them while lining the pockets of special interests and political allies of the elites. A lot of people who call just feel burned by the political status quo. Of course, that might just be a part of what is our New Jersey DNA. We do love a good grievance! But this isn’t that. This is a genuine feeling of anger and loathing aimed at the politicians they’ve elected to supposedly fight for them in Trenton. I mentioned that New Jerseyans are tough, authentic and passionate — let me add one more to that list: they’re right. Often I’ve thought that our state’s politicians should sit in my chair for a bit. If they did, they’d hear what I’m often asked: “don’t politicians have any common sense?” While our state’s problems are obvious, so are the solutions. Woke, soft-on-crime policies have made us less safe. It’s time we suspended “bail reform” and let’s immediately cooperate with federal immigration enforcement detaining illegals accused of serious crimes. And let’s impose life sentences on fentanyl dealers killing our loved ones. Newsflash ... taxes in New Jersey are too high. Instead of raising taxes and driving billions in annual income out of Jersey, let’s lower tax rates to incentivize people to stay, or even come back to our state. That’s how we start alleviating tax burdens on the middle class, by growing the tax base. Think it won’t work? See what Gov. Ron DeSantis is doing in Florida. Let’s cut business taxes to help small businesses recover and thrive. Let’s revamp school funding. Like you, I’m tired of taxpayers in Bridgewater and Berkeley paying more while Trenton pours countless dollars into Newark and Jersey City with no positive results. Let’s support our teachers who are paying for expenses out-of pocket, while the NJEA elites rake in dollars and perks. Let’s revamp the Department of Education ending the curriculum sexualizing grade schoolers and we should always involve parents in school decisions. Let’s restore cost-of-living adjustments for police and firefighters who sacrifice so much for our communities. Let’s get skilled trade workers back to work repairing our energy and transportation infrastructure. It’s simple common sense. And it’s not just me saying it. I hear this every day from New Jerseyans who call my show. And that’s one of the big problems with most politicians: they talk to people but never listen. Trenton politicians are counting on you saying, “that’s just the way it is, what are you gonna do...” It’s time to end the “culture of acceptance” which comes right before the “exit plan.” For me and my family, we’re “Diggin’ In with YOU.” And that’s why I’m proud to serve as honorary chairman of [Elect Common Sense](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/61a17439cb47448f2e07a5f13b646eac/eJyNj08LgkAQxb_LnCXxX9DeRERE8xB1DtGBlnRd1jEy8bs3VngqCOYwvHnvN7wJCFWpKK1BwJ0eruuBBQYrqSUqijpFZfW6uoHveI4FjVTXxHSDBjF9Da-GRd4GOwto1MiO4yGMsrRIznlaZGzUpeEXf2ECP1gx8T5Mc5jnn1xsJcU3RvcgyAy49Kkld6KTadh_IdK9sG1sWKq6tu1Ujzwb3m3Ol1qjqj_VMxzflPkJJVBiCw==), a group focused on changing the broken status quo by supporting candidates in 2023 who stand for OUR common sense values. We don’t have to accept our state’s high taxes, rising crime, radical school curricula and busloads of illegal border crossers. And, we don’t have to accept Republicans losing elections, November after November. _[**Bill Spadea**](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/edb2c89f59b875b64fa9258ef949aa1f/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW4viV4E7ERHRXEStY9IHDek4jM_MxP_eWOGqoO27557HnYBQMEFpBQHc6eE4LhigsOSSo6CoFcTKV-r4nu3aBtRcXBPV9hKC6Wt5BZbzxt8aQKNETRz2YZSlRXLK0yLToGRKv_hL43v-qol3YZrDPP_0YsMpvml1BwGpHpc9Fdeb6KhqzV-IZBdY1jAM5pnXdSdZhcws28bSbSYliuozPMPx7ZifVHBg-Q==) is the honorary chairman of Elect Common Senses. He also is a morning radio show host on 101.5 FM and is a former host on Fox Television._
---
| | [Join Elect Common Sense Today!](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/606dcd318c2f85ba5880690d6b1f4d4d/eJyNkMGKwkAMht8l59ZitXvoTURKqfYg61mGTsDBNjPMpO7W0nc3uotedsFbSL584c8IjKSISw05fPM1TRcQgcfGOIPEa0usmsc0zZbzxTyC1tC58LZ3kI9_Lj-Be_sjyyLgwaEQn_vVuirr4rgt60pAp7yceEuTLV-azW5VbmGa_vViZ3hzEXWAnH2P9zzaSCY--Fb4E7MLeZIEbHqPsy9DMp81tkuwFSiWqrMUB6SAibakGGO2Wg3iVs4h6d-3VDj8XJhudZ9slw==)

# The Elect Common Sense Team

There is an important runoff election for the Phoenix City Council District 6 on March 14. Conservative Sal DiCiccio (R) is term limited and will be replaced by the winner of this race. The two candidates are Republican Sam Stone and Democrat Kevin Robinson. **If you live in District 6 (**[check here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/321a63ed51d8c110/f118125381fd0406c3d6b838967d376c/35693)**), you either received a mail-in ballot or you must vote in person (see below).

****This is a very important race that will determine the balance of power on the City Council.** Phoenix, like many large cities in conservative states, has tended blue with the consequences many cites suffer from with progressive governance. Have you noticed the growing homeless problem in our city?

**Conservative Sam Stone is the strong choice of The Prickly Pear** and we urge our readers in District 6 to mail your ballots in immediately and cast your vote for Sam Stone. [Learn about Sam Stone here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/321a63ed51d8c110/ca2eea0127aac7a4c3d6b838967d376c/35693).

body:
Make your voice heard. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60321318/396749098/17860314?refcode=ea.ebda465f-d4c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.ebda465f-d4c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWJkYTQ2NWYtZDRjNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4H889UMVIhcuNw52PxTWODshFDktMRqwbz67xWLM33c=)
---
We’re ticked off, Peter.

Outrageous water bills. Low water pressure. No sign of drinkable water for days on end. Families forced to wait in long lines to be able to drink, cook, bathe, and flush toilets.

The list goes on.

Jackson residents are struggling to live with this water crisis as a result of our corrupt and incompetent state government.

**Tate Reeves had a chance to allocate state funding and fix Jackson’s failing water infrastructure, but he rejected it.** Now he’s going around pointing the finger at everybody but himself.

Peter, the bottom line is we need new leadership. We can’t trust Reeves to deliver results for Mississippians. But we CAN replace him with Brandon Presley, a leader we can trust.

Brandon is counting on supporters like you to join him in holding Tate accountable. Families forced to wait in long lines to be able to drink, cook, bathe, and flush toilets. The list goes on. Jackson residents are struggling to live with this water crisis as a result of our corrupt and incompetent state government. Tate Reeves had a chance to allocate state funding and fix Jackson’s failing water infrastructure, but he rejected it. Now he’s going around pointing the finger at everybody but himself. Peter, the bottom line is we need new leadership. We can’t trust Reeves to deliver results for Mississippians. But we CAN replace him with Brandon Presley, a leader we can trust. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Pekau to school board candidates: "Stay Home"
body:
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau advocates skipping debates, the latest hypocritical move in the countdown to the consolidated elections.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c0d63b83ef6d/alert-pekau-to-school-board-candidates-stay-home?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Keith Pekau Rages Against "Progressive" School Board Candidate Forum Despite Honoring "Progressive" Liberal Rep. Marie Newman Who Supports Vaccinating Children (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/keith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Wednesday evening, the League of Women Voters of Palos-Orland Area, in partnership with Orland135 Parents for Education (https://www.orland135.org/Page/103?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , hosted a forum for local school board candidates in what was a respectful and civil conversation about the future of school district 135.

Six candidates were expected to attend the forum, but as a large group of parents were taking their seats – one couldn’t help but notice that only half of the candidates showed up to participate, leaving three empty seats in the front of the room.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/keith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
The League of Women Voters school board candidate forum showing three empty chairs. (Facebook/League of Women Voters Palos-Orland Area)

Who were the candidates that skipped the forum?

The three that Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau has endorsed: Patti Thanos, Ryan Valon and Iwona Piwowarczyk – who make up his People Over Politics slate.

Earlier in the day, Pekau went to
Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/KeithPekau4Mayor?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to complain about the candidate forum hosted by the League of Women Voters, calling them “progressives” and posting in all capital letters,

“...NOBODY CAN HONESTLY say that this is a non-partisan group. HAVING A FORUM MODERATED BY THEM IS THE DEFINITION OF PARTISAN.”

But with so much at stake, and Gov. JB Pritzker funneling $500,000 to school board candidates that support his extremist, liberal agenda, the forum represented a perfect opportunity to stand up and defend the rights of parents in front of a diverse crowd for candidates with limited funds to get their messages across.

The parents and children of district 135 expect their school board members to fight in the trenches during school board meetings; to stand up for what they believe in, in the face of opposition – and yet, Pekau is advising his candidates to only participate in discussions from friendly moderators and like-minded audience members.

If only life was that easy – when you can fast forward to only the good parts of your day and skip the rest.

The moderator announced that this is her 60th year with the League of Women Voters.

And the questions were not a trap – in fact, they were pretty basic. Questions during the forum included,

What’s your top 3 priorities for the district?

What’s your plan to make sure all schools are treated equally?

What’s your view on standards-based grading?

What’s your involvement in the community?

But for Pekau to rage on social media about the “progressive” Democrats hosting and supporting the forum is laughable.

In fact, it’s hypocritical.

During the January 16, 2023 Orland Park
Village Board Meeting (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyFime2PoLw&t=268s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Pekau had a special VIP guest in the room – La Grange resident and former US Rep. Marie Newman, a “progressive” Democrat who was in town to receive the Orland Park Community Appreciation Award (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/gop-mayor-keith-pekau-compliments-liberal-rep-marie-newman-an-ally-of-aoc-says-they-agree-both-of-them-can-do-a-better-job-casten.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) from Pekau.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyFime2PoLw&t=268s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau praises and honors former US Rep. Marie Newman, a Democrat and member of the Progressive Caucus in Congress with a Community Appreciation Award during a board meeting on Jan. 16, 2023.

Pekau spent the last year attacking Newman on social media, even tweeting,

“Anti-police rhetoric & attempts to defund the police by radical leftists like Sean Casten & Marie Newman have put our communities at risk. As mayor of Orland Park, I’ve stood with law enforcement & kept our community safe. I’ll continue to do so as your congressman.”
https://twitter.com/KeithPekau/status/1486433613617184768?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1486433613617184768%7Ctwgr%5Eb8fb66de831498fa5bdf335b04bfd8cfffe80d66%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F03%2Fkeith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

But a year later, Pekau is publicly showering Newman with praise and honoring her with an award.

During her time in Congress, Newman was a member of the
Progressive Caucus (https://progressives.house.gov/caucus-members?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , even posting on Twitter a photo standing between New York Rep. Jerry Nadler and Minnesota Rep. Ilhan Omar, tweeting,

“The Congressional Progressive Caucus. Working every day to pass proven, practical and popular policies for the American people.”
https://twitter.com/RepMarieNewman/status/1417478874242355209?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1417478874242355209%7Ctwgr%5Eb8fb66de831498fa5bdf335b04bfd8cfffe80d66%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F03%2Fkeith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

During the pandemic, Newman and her husband Jim Newman owned shares in Moderna (https://www.businessinsider.com/lawmakers-bought-sold-covid-19-related-stocks-during-pandemic-2021-12?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – the manufacturer of the Moderna COVID-19 vaccines and boosters.

And so it is no surprise that Newman was supportive of vaccinating children during the pandemic, writing in a Facebook post,

“The COVID-19 vaccine is now authorized for kids ages 5-11 in addition to everyone 12+. Vaccines are widely available across Illinois. Get vaccinated.”
https://www.facebook.com/MarieNewmanIL06/posts/4907784745899500?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Pekau also rewarded one of his largest campaign contributors and close personal friends, Ramzi Hassan, President of Orland Park-based Edwards Realty, with a six-figure consulting agreement (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/mayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to develop village-owned property along one of Orland Park’s busiest corridors.
https://twitter.com/edwardsrealtyco/status/1300938721957679106?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1300938721957679106%7Ctwgr%5Eb8fb66de831498fa5bdf335b04bfd8cfffe80d66%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F03%2Fkeith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

But the biggest surprise is while Hassan is advising Pekau and his village board on a new development project, and sponsoring political events for his best friend, Hassan is also meeting with Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot and donating $5,000 to her failed re-election campaign.
https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=VPOJ9GWMYlby0qiS9zAjdQ%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=AhOf2YTJ89yCIxT0wQkR7Q%3d%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
On Dec. 27, 2022, Edwards Realty president and friend of Mayor Pekau contributed $5,000 to Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s campaign. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/keith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Ramzi Hassan from Edwards Realty and Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot. Hassan is a campaign contributor to both Pekau and Lightfoot’s campaigns, and he advises Pekau and the Village of Orland Park Board of Trustees.

And while Pekau is advising his slate of school board candidates to attend “friendly” forums only, on Tuesday, he’s hosting a Get Out The Vote Rally – featuring – and not surprisingly, his slate of candidates, including school board – at a $50 per person event where they can control the guest list.

Featured speakers include Jeanne Ives, a close confidante and senior political advisor to Pekau, who endorsed (https://patch.com/illinois/orlandpark/orland-park-mayor-congressional-candidate-scores-key-endorsement?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his campaign for Congress on November 23, 2021.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/keith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Keith Pekau and Jeanne Ives during Pekau’s congressional campaign announcement on Nov. 23, 2021. Ives is a close confidante and senior advisor to Pekau, and she endorsed his campaign for Congress.

Ives was also key to securing financial support from conservative billionaire Richard Uihlein and his wife Elizabeth, who each personally donated $2,900 (https://localtoday.news/il/which-candidates-are-supported-by-suburban-mega-donors-richard-and-elizabeth-uihlein-26225.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to Pekau’s congressional campaign.

https://localtoday.news/il/which-candidates-are-supported-by-suburban-mega-donors-richard-and-elizabeth-uihlein-26225.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

In 2018, Uihlein bankrolled Ives’ campaign for governor, donating $2.5 million (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/dick-uihlein-illinois-governor-primary-ives-rauner/139996/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Also joining Pekau and Ives on stage Tuesday is Republican National Committeeman for Illinois Richard Porter, the architect of the Richard Irvin campaign slate, and the
co-chairman (https://capitolfax.com/2022/01/18/irvin-rolls-out-over-60-gop-endorsements/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of Irvin’s failed campaign for Illinois governor.

Recent revelations show that Porter’s law firm, Kirkland & Ellis, where he is a
senior partner (https://www.kirkland.com/lawyers/p/porter-richard-w-pc?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , donated to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2020, during the height of the pandemic and lockdowns.

In
2020 (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/kirkland-ellis/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000000811&toprecipcycle=2020&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , partners of the firm donated $680,670 to Joe Biden; $164,536 to Kamala Harris; and $80,400 to the Republican Party of Illinois.

In
2022 (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/kirkland-ellis/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000000811&toprecipcycle=2022&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , partners of the firm donated $269,100 to US Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi, D-IL; $144,719 to Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-NY; and $69,000 to the Republican Party of Illinois.

Kirkland & Ellis also represents Pritzker family interests, including
Pritzker Private Capital (https://www.kirkland.com/news/press-release/2021/09/kirkland-advises-pritzker-on-nai-group?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

In 2014, 2016 and 2020, Irvin pulled
Democratic Primary ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ; and in 2020, he spoke at a Black Lives Matter rally shouting, “I can’t breathe! (https://youtu.be/QOyFraLPPLo?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ”

And Irvin spent years praising Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker, referring to him as a, “great friend and a great leader.”
https://twitter.com/DemGovs/status/1483091889607909379?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1483091889607909379%7Ctwgr%5Edc246bf05ed89baf2861d1e64c538cd3090f285d%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F03%2Fkeith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

During an Illinois Republican State Central Committee meeting in December, when conservative grassroots activists started heckling Porter about his support for Irvin during the primary, and questioning his Republican credentials, Porter shouted back, “Richard Irvin is a great Republican!”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/keith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Republican candidate for governor Richard Irvin, left, and Richard Porter, co-chairman of the Irvin for governor campaign sitting in Porter’s personal seats at the Cubs game in May of 2022. (Photo credit: Facebook/Mark Weyermuller)

Irvin, Porter and the IL GOP would lose the primary to conservative grassroots candidate and former State Senator Darren Bailey, who would beat Irvin by a stunning 43 points (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/chicago-politics/illinois-primary-election-results-republican-darren-bailey-to-face-jb-pritzker-in-race-for-illinois-governor-in-november/2869100/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

The Tuesday event is at the Silver Lake Country Club in Orland Park and begins at 5:30 pm.
https://youtu.be/5nulsDNb0Yc?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas joins Newsmax this week to discuss New York City's most recent #1 ranking: Most Congested City.
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e5fbf75a4d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e5fbf75a4d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: State Supreme Court Alert [AOTL WI]
subject: We can not afford to ignore this race.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Join AOTL Wisconsin for Voter Mobilization Virtual Text Bank!
|
---

* * *
**2023's Biggest, Most Unusual Race Centers on Abortion and Democracy**
_"The election for a swing seat on Wisconsin's Supreme Court... will determine the fate of abortion rights, gerrymandered legislative maps ... and perhaps even influence the state's 2024 presidential election."
\-- New York Times_
* * *
Experts are calling the Wisconsin Supreme Court election the most high-stakes race so far of 2023. **Democracy is on the line and we can not afford to ignore this race.**
**The outcomes of this race could determine:**
➡️ Whether Wisconsin conservatives will be allowed to enforce an abortion ban,
➡️ Whether the court will uphold maps that are so gerrymandered,
➡️ And, crucially, whether conservative lawmakers can ignore the will of Wisconsin voters by overturning the state’s 2024 presidential election results.
You can take action today and get involved ahead of the election.
**[Join an Upcoming All On The Line Wisconsin Volunteer Voter Mobilization Virtual Text Bank:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60343109/396798075/179589765?utm_campaign=20230317_AOTL_O_WITextResend_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMTUxMWIyLWY2YzQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8CPqH_P4cSJpqW6QviAKgiD9dsz0Ye8u6OwQO2U50J8=&emci=7bd4dee4-dbc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cd1511b2-f6c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8431045)**

That’s the thing: **This was never about protecting life. It has ALWAYS been about controlling women, plain and simple. ** This headline is incredibly disturbing. 21 people being in favor of the death penalty for women seeking abortions is 21 too many — but the fact that those 21 people are elected officials? With positions of power? It’s disgusting. We need to **VOTE. THEM. OUT.** We need to find every single legislator who thinks like this, acts like this, votes like this, and replace them with a smart, fierce, amazing woman who will stand up for our rights and our bodies. That’s the thing: This was never about protecting life. It has ALWAYS been about controlling women, plain and simple. This headline is incredibly disturbing. 21 people being in favor of the death penalty for women seeking abortions is 21 too many — but the fact that those 21 people are elected officials? With positions of power? It’s disgusting. We need to VOTE. THEM. OUT. name: Casey Given
subject: Starvation, tear gas, and secret police
body:
What do high school students imagine when they hear the word “socialism”?

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01996%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=epAdvBdlH%2fCYqsASrU11tA&sysid=1)
Hello Friend,

What do high school students imagine when they hear the word “socialism”?

I bet they do not imagine starvation, inflation, secret police, and violence like we’ve seen in countries like North Korea.

**_The Dissident Project is addressing the issue head-on_. **

The Dissident Project brings survivors of authoritarian socialist countries to high schools around the United States to share their experiences and give students a new appreciation for the freedom we have in America.

Our speakers come from places like China, North Korea, Eritrea, Hong Kong, and Venezuela and have firsthand experience with the dangers of socialism.

To help our Dissident Speakers travel across the country as they speak to students, I need to raise $17,000 by the end of the week.

[_**Friend, will you support a Dissident Speaker with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift to fight socialism >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01997%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vbo%2b9ZMXgaZfD20Q3KDumA&sysid=1)

One of our speakers, Grace Jo, has experienced growing up in North Korea.

_“During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world’s worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about 1 meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. **My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight.** We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his “crime” was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped, and it turned into the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but most were murdered by the regime.” _

This is just a small part of her story, Friend. You can help her share her experience with high school students across the country.

[_**Please support Grace Jo and the rest of the Dissident Project speakers today >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01998%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BymEAuLjliVe5swcPPKqyA&sysid=1)

Another one of our speakers, Frances Hui, is the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America.

_“I grew up in Hong Kong, a city that was once free. When I was 13, I got involved in social movements as an international advocate and student leader for Hong Kong.

Then the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) cracked down and started stealing our freedom.

**At 14, I faced tear gas and pepper spray while fighting for my home. **

The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong. Offenders could face penalties of up to life in prison.

Friend, the CCP is the ultimate surveillance state. They are known for silencing the opposition, human rights abuses, and persecuting people for their religion.

Their takeover of Hong Kong left no family, town, or life untouched.”_

Friend, the Dissident Project has already reached over 3,000 students, and each one has walked away with a new appreciation for our freedom and an understanding of how easily we can lose it.

Will you give high school students a lesson they will carry with them for a lifetime? **Click below to show your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01999%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1QpPICBzVYQ2Epi6cP4YXg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01990%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d4dypT%2b63Q1OHhLWKg9hIw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01991%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jucrkLL4FlDQUHdO6a1fiw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01992%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3gSHraE8QDq0ZHLvy2JR0A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01993%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FdN8rWKjMzXLr5jBLCqy5w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01994%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Aub7Fvc1ixd3IynpXDDy2g&sysid=1)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,000 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01905%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GbJc0cj1nXMeK7IC4H1q8g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01906%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CGMbNPB1EAz0jT6GFpr7XA&sysid=1)
Thank you,

Casey Given

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

Your America News

Election Day is closer than you think. | | | Hey Peter – **Local elections for towns and cities across the country are coming up sooner than you think.** From Anchorage to El Paso to New Orleans, public officials are running to determine who will lead cities, schools, police departments, and other crucial offices. Check out this helpful calendar to see if an election is coming up in your area. **[UPCOMING ELECTIONS CALENDAR](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWvo1Xb3axgKdmpVe6fZoQX8REsfgiw3aVTKNUSU_kFAwf3UNOdVmLB_yAWBRJ90BqRwOGH2W7vOkkMJmO0svptlRPmjI0AxzWi7YAutpEIA53CXfYWao5xFhQ7hS4x0KFi-_DO0MND_KHQXA0LGKnI-jbRzMUVSE3KtsU5LHxMeUt2AkC0-_YK0jTqDCf-mlqs9LMiYDTci9Mdm87yBgbPusx-j8y7qREAkh4_5DZp8z5goncg3UEDcWZsOylmH9MrsZSOdooeGyDLBw1Dj3Bnly9UBZwRWUBmPHCxIQQWbQjzhQre85Mg13v_tkjPfDBQ/3uk/yhGryHzCSBiP3qod3RdX1g/h0/Ek0T6-6qnam92LnUy8KUvxFhViQjM48bMNv8K8jQgAU)** **United Rural Democrats is committed to helping Democratic candidates run for office up and down the ballot.** We know that local offices hold sway over crucial issues that Republicans have long been campaigning toward. clean_body: Election Day is closer than you think. | | | Hey Peter – Local elections for towns and cities across the country are coming up sooner than you think. From Anchorage to El Paso to New Orleans, public officials are running to determine who will lead cities, schools, police departments, and other crucial offices. Check out this helpful calendar to see if an election is coming up in your area. United Rural Democrats is committed to helping Democratic candidates run for office up and down the ballot. We know that local offices hold sway over crucial issues that Republicans have long been campaigning toward. We're talking about issues like anti-Black and anti-LGBTQ+ policies in schools, anti-abortion policies, unjust policing, and undemocratic voting systems. Peter, we need to elect Democrats to local offices to block these discriminatory policies and ensure that Americans in towns, cities, and states across the country have their rights protected. Thank you for your support, Peter – United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?
