name: Casey Given
subject: Starvation, tear gas, and secret police
body:
What do high school students imagine when they hear the word “socialism”?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zun7evr2mcn1odqatp70vlu7agmfibsc2hak0leo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)
Hello Friend,

What do high school students imagine when they hear the word "socialism"?

I bet they do not imagine starvation, inflation, secret police, and violence like we've seen in countries like North Korea.

**_The Dissident Project is addressing the issue head-on_. **

The Dissident Project brings survivors of authoritarian socialist countries to high schools around the United States to share their experiences and give students a new appreciation for the freedom we have in America.

Our speakers come from places like China, North Korea, Eritrea, Hong Kong, and Venezuela and have firsthand experience with the dangers of socialism.

To help our Dissident Speakers travel across the country as they speak to students, I need to raise $17,000 by the end of the week.

[_**Friend, will you support a Dissident Speaker with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift to fight socialism >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3s04eblb9prlc4idqqc3177ggjuksligqomfhfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)

One of our speakers, Grace Jo, has experienced growing up in North Korea.

_" During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world's worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about 1 meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. **My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight.** We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his "crime" was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped, and it turned into the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but most were murdered by the regime." _

This is just a small part of her story, Friend. You can help her share her experience with high school students across the country.

[_**Please support Grace Jo and the rest of the Dissident Project speakers today >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs6cflvfr7gk7shcl2pqm53noauv2t443d2udvdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)

Another one of our speakers, Frances Hui, is the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America.

_" I grew up in Hong Kong, a city that was once free. When I was 13, I got involved in social movements as an international advocate and student leader for Hong Kong.

Then the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) cracked down and started stealing our freedom.

**At 14, I faced tear gas and pepper spray while fighting for my home. **

The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong. Offenders could face penalties of up to life in prison.

Friend, the CCP is the ultimate surveillance state. They are known for silencing the opposition, human rights abuses, and persecuting people for their religion.

Their takeover of Hong Kong left no family, town, or life untouched."_

Friend, the Dissident Project has already reached over 3,000 students, and each one has walked away with a new appreciation for our freedom and an understanding of how easily we can lose it.

Will you give high school students a lesson they will carry with them for a lifetime? **Click below to show your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7uhjrh3hha4n4mkqo1jigk0rgup8c7iiupuq968_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsqgg05gp0op4lm0ngeho6gevmnte3gjqcrmfmdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf89id4lth8nhk8ld1nbqnf2ibg83fg8pd70fpp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zep6l05qavn0ge87unlniootagae4e1jk7eq420o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0qdm8ah8k2870uigiqnjevk0qsbmf67ed90nap0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq485g1e22mcgb163p86007c7tlj4llhge4o8a8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,000 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zla523eab7oid9nrkndn3fg4c6p4fe8tf6feqqgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfk8jul5uool2sjc816ug3j0l4bpe1sb8n5q0nfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge8ob6cph2bs)
Thank you,

Casey Given

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

name: Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
Friend, I wanted to follow up on this urgent message from my team. **Unfortunately, last night, we fell just $3,382 short of our $25,000 mid-month goal.**
---
Mitch McConnell just needs to flip two seats to retake the Senate — and his far-right megadonors will spend _hundreds of millions_ to do it. With everything from reproductive rights to voting rights at stake, we cannot afford to miss crucial goals like this one.
I'm counting on a huge surge in grassroots support right now to turn things around so that we have the resources we need to fuel this people-powered campaign. **That's why I'm reaching out to a select group of my strongest supporters to personally ask for your help:[Please, will you rush a grassroots donation — $5, $15, whatever you can spare — before midnight tonight to make up the gap and save our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60344722/396803736/-1386043057?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3982-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDk3NThlNC1mY2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGTFhfhacN4-U35Sl9jewabcDmF-rsoyldZSDziEovM=)**

[If you're ready to chip in now, click here to rush your donation and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60344724/396803765/-1386043057?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3982-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDk3NThlNC1mY2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGTFhfhacN4-U35Sl9jewabcDmF-rsoyldZSDziEovM=)**

* And in 2022, Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York to retake the House majority — and **now they're targeting my seat** so that they can take back the Senate too.

* We need to build a strong foundation in the early days of this campaign to stop the GOP from gaining any more ground in New York — **but without a huge surge in grassroots donations right now, I'll fall short of my mid-month goal!**

|

| | | |
---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: It's time for common sense gun safety legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
There have been more mass shootings than days in 2023. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60324858/396761883/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjhlY2NjMy1kY2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PNNM4dwKtwMSiaHGDCEYpiiIfG0-E8iTUIEqd96o6h4=&emci=24644c2d-1bc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cf8eccc3-dcc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

So far in 2023, there have been more than 110 mass shootings, and over 3,500 lives have been taken due to acts of gun violence. This is a tragic and uniquely American epidemic – so Kim is working to ensure no more lives are lost.

Last year, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in Congress passed the first meaningful gun safety legislation in three decades. It was a huge step forward, but they knew it wasn't enough to end the violence in our communities. That's why Democrats in Congress introduced more gun safety legislation this year – including a bill to close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks.

Kim is fighting to protect our communities from gun violence, but she wants to know you have her back.

**[If you're with Kim in the fight to end gun violence, add your name now to call on Congress to pass common-sense gun safety legislation →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60324859/396761884/1457732826?ms=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=IeL3Vpdmv/fYcbctNUKg8I15dSkiJqqHRhpOjEdtBAFWCsat3EdJ9AuQYUjnsIQ6t/LppFZw5LVT+Ae4CG6FiAtBwBx1m7PeXXckobjVqPX2zdVgdppSyGhKJd85eA/gmMIc6+0Phuw2LM5sezAmyti+NtxAWGoQyNaeKnxa7dY=&refcode2=cf8eccc3-dcc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjhlY2NjMy1kY2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PNNM4dwKtwMSiaHGDCEYpiiIfG0-E8iTUIEqd96o6h4=&emci=24644c2d-1bc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cf8eccc3-dcc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60324860/396761885/1457732826?ms=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=IeL3Vpdmv/fYcbctNUKg8I15dSkiJqqHRhpOjEdtBAFWCsat3EdJ9AuQYUjnsIQ6t/LppFZw5LVT+Ae4CG6FiAtBwBx1m7PeXXckobjVqPX2zdVgdppSyGhKJd85eA/gmMIc6+0Phuw2LM5sezAmyti+NtxAWGoQyNaeKnxa7dY=&refcode2=cf8eccc3-dcc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjhlY2NjMy1kY2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PNNM4dwKtwMSiaHGDCEYpiiIfG0-E8iTUIEqd96o6h4=&emci=24644c2d-1bc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cf8eccc3-dcc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---

As a mom, a pediatrician, and a member of Congress, Kim knows we need common sense legislation that keeps our communities safe from gun violence. This includes universal background checks for gun ownership, federal red flag laws to keep guns out of the hands of people perceived to be a danger to others, and policies to ensure that children cannot get access to firearms.

The health and safety of our communities will always be a top priority for Kim. That's why she's working to pass gun safety legislation to save lives, but she wants to know if you're with her in this important fight.

**[Add your name now to call on Congress to pass common-sense gun safety legislation now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60324861/396761886/1457732826?ms=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=IeL3Vpdmv/fYcbctNUKg8I15dSkiJqqHRhpOjEdtBAFWCsat3EdJ9AuQYUjnsIQ6t/LppFZw5LVT+Ae4CG6FiAtBwBx1m7PeXXckobjVqPX2zdVgdppSyGhKJd85eA/gmMIc6+0Phuw2LM5sezAmyti+NtxAWGoQyNaeKnxa7dY=&refcode2=cf8eccc3-dcc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjhlY2NjMy1kY2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PNNM4dwKtwMSiaHGDCEYpiiIfG0-E8iTUIEqd96o6h4=&emci=24644c2d-1bc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cf8eccc3-dcc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)**

Thanks,

Team Schrier

Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024.
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60324862/396761887/-1430019318?refcode=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230317_gunsaf_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cf8eccc3-dcc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjhlY2NjMy1kY2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PNNM4dwKtwMSiaHGDCEYpiiIfG0-E8iTUIEqd96o6h4=)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Tucker Carlson says Josh Hawley isn’t a fraud and a coward…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18908?t=1001&akid=3061%2E346206%2EjdXStf ][IMG]

Some folks on cable news tried to claim Josh Hawley didn’t actually show
us he was a fraud and a coward on January 6th. So let’s get this straight,
Peter.

Josh Hawley didn’t just run away from the Capitol. He ran away from the
same people he raised his fist and claimed to be fighting for just hours
earlier.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18908?t=1002&akid=3061%2E346206%2EjdXStf ]CHIP IN →

As a U.S. Marine, I took an oath to defend our democracy — just like Josh
Hawley when he was sworn into the U.S. Senate. But unlike him, I didn’t
break mine.

That’s why I’m running to replace him — so Missourians will have a real
warrior for working people standing up and fighting for them in
Washington. And it’s why I need your help today, Peter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18909?t=1003&akid=3061%2E346206%2EjdXStf ]We don’t need any more frauds or cowards like Josh Hawley in the U.S.
Senate. Will you split a donation of $25 or anything at all between my
campaign and Charles Booker right now so we can defeat him, flip this
seat, and stand up for our democracy?

Thanks for standing with me,

— Lucas Kunce

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18908?t=1004&akid=3061%2E346206%2EjdXStf ]CHIP IN →

Donald J. Trump March 16th, 2023
"President Donald J. Trump is completely innocent, he did nothing wrong, and even the biggest, most Radical Left Democrats are making that clear. From Russia, Russia, Russia, to the Mueller Hoax, to Impeachment Hoaxes 1 and 2, and even the Unlawful Mar-a-Lago Raid, Democrats have investigated and attacked President Trump since before he was elected – and they’ve failed every time. Now Democrats are at it again, pushing the “Nuclear Button” and attacking a President because of a disgraced extortionist. This is happening because President Trump is leading in the polls by a large margin against both Democrats and Republicans, and there’s never been anything so blatant in American political history. If the Democrats can do this to President Trump, they can do it to you.

"The latest Witch-Hunt is being brought on by George Soros-backed Radical Left Democrat prosecutor Alvin Bragg. Bragg has made political donations to fellow Radical Democrats like Raphael Warnock, and now Bragg is making a political donation of a different kind to Joe Biden. Everyone knows it’s a sham. In fact, the Department of Justice stocked the DA’s office with top people from DC to help “Get Trump” at a local level.

"Americans will not tolerate Radical Left Democrats turning our justice system into an injustice system to influence a presidential election, which is all they want to do. Donald J. Trump March 16th, 2023
**Mar-a-Lago, FL** — In a new Agenda47 video released today, President Donald J. Trump explains the difference between the globalist establishment class, and those who are truly committed to stopping the Ukraine war and dismantling the entire neo-con nation-building industrial complex in Washington, D.C.

[Watch the new Agenda47 video from President Trump](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMtugzAQRb_G7EB-YcOCRVIaVYpUqV30kU1ksA1ObUBgQvP3NSipZFmac309c0cViPEcspzlNJJFijWCkSkwxAQSxBFDlJKEsConSFW6ziRJCQIUSjX99Fr2nbDy4sfZDUndu6gt6oqmsuYpzXSVZ4LTCjItoERMCZ0zFdmi9X6YANkBfAgneCurVncorljqfOlj0ahOCsrjYVRX1XnTNfHSj1bGixhjY0zSemcBOczenZ2SZnaAlMoJYwFmK5z6eaxVgLU5izurhRuEabpAHwkfSt_50CYIGYUowHNnjQxls5za55ds_q022BoZJi8_3q8XjZq3UzQWcliMtWZiPKylWSfYNhFaWaNvBeB7gPHmw3gLjY90__XKjp_HMv5eShGXLKXLquKncPvboP6f3n9J7skw4OUfx6KHRw)

“Every day this proxy battle in Ukraine continues, we risk global war,” President Trump said. “We must be absolutely clear that our objective is to IMMEDIATELY have a total cessation of hostilities. All shooting has to stop. This is the central issue. We need PEACE without delay.”

“There must also be a complete commitment to dismantling the entire globalist neo-con establishment that is perpetually dragging us into endless wars, pretending to fight for freedom and democracy abroad, while they turn us into a third-world country and a third-world dictatorship right here at home. The State Department, the defense bureaucracy, the intelligence services, and all the rest need to be completely overhauled and reconstituted to fire the Deep Staters and put America First.”

In the latest Agenda47 announcement, President Trump slams the corrupt globalist class for dragging our country through endless foreign wars, while destroying our homeland.

“These globalists want to squander all of America's strength, blood and treasure, chasing monsters and phantoms overseas—while keeping us distracted from the havoc they're creating right here at home. These forces are doing more damage to America than Russia and China could ever have dreamed.”

TRANSCRIPT

We have never been closer to World War III than we are today under Joe Biden. A global conflict between nuclear-armed powers would mean death and destruction on a scale unmatched in human history. It would be nuclear Armageddon. NOTHING is more important than avoiding that nightmare. We will avoid it. But we need new leadership.

Every day this proxy battle in Ukraine continues, we risk global war. We must be absolutely clear that our objective is to IMMEDIATELY have a total cessation of hostilities. All shooting has to stop. This is the central issue. We need PEACE without delay.

In addition, there must also be a complete commitment to dismantling the entire globalist neo-con establishment that is perpetually dragging us into endless wars, pretending to fight for freedom and democracy abroad, while they turn us into a third-world country and a third-world dictatorship right here at home. The State Department, the defense bureaucracy, the intelligence services, and all the rest need to be completely overhauled and reconstituted to fire the Deep Staters and put America First. We have to put America First.

Finally, we have to finish the process we began under my Administration of fundamentally reevaluating NATO's purpose and NATO's mission. Our foreign policy establishment keeps trying to pull the world into conflict with a nuclear-armed Russia based on the lie that Russia represents our greatest threat. But the greatest threat to Western Civilization today is not Russia. It's probably, more than anything else, ourselves and some of the horrible, U.S.A. hating people that represent us. It's the abolition of our national borders. It’s the failure to police our own cities. It’s the destruction of the rule of law from within. It's the collapse of the nuclear family and fertility rates, like nobody can believe is happening. It's the Marxists who would have us become a Godless nation worshipping at the altar of race, and gender, and environment. And it's the globalist class that has made us totally dependent on China and other foreign countries that basically hate us.

These globalists want to squander all of America's strength, blood and treasure, chasing monsters and phantoms overseas—while keeping us distracted from the havoc they're creating right here at home. These forces are doing more damage to America than Russia and China could ever have dreamed. Evicting the sick and corrupt establishment is the monumental task for the next president. And I'm the only one who can do it. I'm the only one that can get the job done. I know exactly what has to be done.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4347ac66726149e8af1fd0a6551d584b&_e=N94K5IujblEN5pDL0diy7y3-4OiAejS_fFzawhNk1qrNsQIm6mEn-ts3pAa2GxxEzodtxoDs_j4W97yTWZqWdiBlcWLjq5ms1TVuqpKb8mEmuhZCAeQJSpgJIaXN5ecxwyrM2eFApM21I7U22el69sOk7XUXhTK693CNUlDQWX5C27K1MQYCFFlX0lxsC3eriGYnaF0KGbPehFNgWapLzIJkZFSOXidXJaNjqumSCfjms-LMXJ9F8gtbbel9vmiLnAh_K0djaVOvmutLzjxVwp_Kcm8JPp0GLwKLX2JPlmDLovX6k7X6R_s6iU9Z5PZik077wFvwkRTOxzCHaQiIdrcsSJ39htijqAjR92E5Vi85yitaiJdZj1IKJH3s5z1l_fMAlD_jZCraX86FHFJvOg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4347ac66726149e8af1fd0a6551d584b&_e=N94K5IujblEN5pDL0diy7y3-4OiAejS_fFzawhNk1qrNsQIm6mEn-ts3pAa2GxxEzodtxoDs_j4W97yTWZqWdiBlcWLjq5ms1TVuqpKb8mEmuhZCAeQJSpgJIaXN5ecxwyrM2eFApM21I7U22el69sOk7XUXhTK693CNUlDQWX5C27K1MQYCFFlX0lxsC3eriGYnaF0KGbPehFNgWapLzIJkZFSOXidXJaNjqumSCfjms-LMXJ9F8gtbbel9vmiLju8c6K-8J3jrVd31unUAopggls3aJCvwAApzQta6O23LqHiR5UW3F1pZgtwx10jFfC6_j35-bey-6QLZ6mwsMyJ1y3_zRiCe6AyR1-v0uddKVZ16Bx7Zl1-6lLbbyBtDdHLOWcyMK0A1sl4gChxefQ%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4347ac66726149e8af1fd0a6551d584b&_e=N94K5IujblEN5pDL0diy7y3-4OiAejS_fFzawhNk1qrNsQIm6mEn-ts3pAa2GxxEzodtxoDs_j4W97yTWZqWdiBlcWLjq5ms1TVuqpKb8mEmuhZCAeQJSpgJIaXN5ecxwyrM2eFApM21I7U22el69sOk7XUXhTK693CNUlDQWX5C27K1MQYCFFlX0lxsC3eriGYnaF0KGbPehFNgWapLzIJkZFSOXidXJaNjqumSCfjms-LMXJ9F8gtbbel9vmiLc6K8qzxxa5sfF-ObQv-da7ubDllHqtsB-B_xJEG0Wssy2N11HOR1SsvU4sVkpYBx7nRJ_g5yplj5tLXMCA0EHIxuN_gG8OVpfLoRuICboUuFDisUymG1kBplR7Am4IzOu-uAj80r63bIG2SxCyBJsQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=4347ac66726149e8af1fd0a6551d584b&_t=RVoJSYSBh3Qoy0uswbDwDum_7gM0vPR_jLho7peO7qwAp2UTfpvyT9ArsOh0C9pyqn7xwyGi-XBYc4DVjIwTD1WaWRyeIUcHDlLGvI8_G3E%3D)

subject: 35% increase in homicides

---
Peter,
---
The U.S. Senate voted 81 to 14 to strike down a District of Columbia law that would have reduced mandatory prison sentences for violent crimes such as carjacking, armed robbery, and murder. Crime rates in major cities have skyrocketed since the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic and show no signs of improving without government intervention. **How did the D.C. City Council conclude that it would be a good idea for them to reduce penalties for violent crime in the middle of a crime wave?** ** ** I asked my team to compile a short questionnaire to help us tailor our messaging on crime as we prepare to go on offense in next year’s midterm elections. [**Do you have a moment to take our short 5-second survey right now?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=df1c047c2d414cecaf65840ce2853359&_e=08Otd0KfOHaGWgkPO430TWaoMYxxjesBt_F9T6BC5xnSw9Z3C60Ehx7XaiyP_pTCYWLGx_ABbW4XZGqXWrNkuLuPiw4xZpAsl_FLuooF3T8Fxp8OA-YOqYIOGxzgB7CdK84KClXJXre4sEJ72t3w4EpiWI7QbSsoMFuspZDLJFtSMO2-eYoX7lwNKmmfJWOcE14GMNh1a-Woxpwp4tGb2sJ49QVENOrHzOBAvnjx-9Qa5cRUxLLmYlMv5PfLe7vdhtaQPigsr3uhMUteJih-MwS6IcJ_9PwiQIR1R2-jgoOvTpsWVP79fxKUmlcy_sndjzRKboyWX0RimkccNOJR207sDaIj5y5wIP8GZNKMZSAKbK4ryZPSHrPDUYF3KlWoFEvh9NS-YfAMqwfedX_VhwBM03Y1pwdMVKKHWGbamEsFkB3dtdxs6rbT3v1f9t65)** ** Thank You, Sen. Steve Daines Chairman, NRSC **WHERE DO YOU STAND ON CRIME?**
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: "The Genesis Story" Online Course Now on DVD
body:
Hillsdale College's popular online course, "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is available on DVD.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj0bqp03popvvg4a02fk2aj2i2hro542tujb1r0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge2oj3c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College's popular online course, **" The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,"** is available on DVD.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5fpekrdfarhr6pf7l9tvf0krs9c6c1idsippe0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge2oj3c3h2bs)In this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

"The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education.
Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you 'll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8khd1jj9ccau9l6l28mqsib1hmk12v8s9scj1u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s1ge2oj3c3h2bs)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That's why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College's national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation's youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as "Genesis."
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty.
* Establish and guide classical K-12 schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale's educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **" The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives."**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: Update on family detentions
body:
This is breaking news. | | | Hi Peter, This is what Joe Biden tweeted 3 years ago while he was running for president: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8Az2_2cnFNQ32U7ndHy9Wpg0LpqrXRPUIesxIQ8ULHEmLJXefO5r6fjjn1b9fWF1ObTS0UP0hdqKAMhyQuF6jjlq3OCHiP7lDI_qZ6UzHljh9zrub2syWNvCPfnzuCKVpr7UOVw1aMfVtH0n_-EsAJUqdFDRVjX9fjIULhw6cx8qhrgLoQGNi48iKra1FjzwQYfxu_ZC46z8L7MAfW1eBteYie7rw2io0ioYKmLuKgyfCQIpE3olSjXEZQL4EGUg5z0BQYdlqplyON6xAqLXNSX1Egu9TRCWFT71orYcFL98jseTjjxc3wNIGyDI9zRUvSPtGSOOqY2OZB36NOdSqJzJUMPA7dkka3R0YYY1EUjA/3uk/wKzKUNuoQ9StfbhOY8Ug1Q/h0/3te9dvr8SmOM9RANlePhW-ahcv_KPuUkEulmc75zvss) **But earlier this month, it was reported that his administration is considering a return to the policy of family detentions.** Bringing back family detentions means returning to inhumane Trump-era policies; It means inflicting devastating harm on children and families; It means abandoning promises made to immigrant communities. United We Dream Action is mobilizing members and allies across the country to speak out against this proposal — and we’re not the only ones raising our voices... Officials from within Biden’s own administration have even expressed concerns over how a potential policy reversal would impact immigrant families. We need to resist and hold President Biden accountable to his commitment to end family detentions — but we’re counting on your support to fuel our fight. **Peter: Make a donation today to help UWDA keep the pressure on President Biden to permanently end cruel, inhumane practices like family detentions.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8Az2_2cnFNQ32U7ndHy9Wpg0LpqrXRPUIesxIQ8ULHEmLJXefO5r6fjjn1b9fWF1ObTS0UP0hdqKAMhyQuF6jjv4b0m9-8yC8NVvu5S8CiGnKRjaVo0Lmvn3F04JudvLbSsB5B67KhVtwct_QdH5P7eLwo3jNfiPZuP3C3pKteGDdbRqXfV6aCoU0B3Bpx4B5_CBKurxM0B835MCoQzHZ3gxEGhGLrmHr1CmvJPo9q6ePG1WHExyqKY5eg7FaUJz_FEsC-ei9SrZuZtbui_Jmt5DP643yE5zB2qKJ6StaYPhyV2I7E1ahJn7rPdeSNAotSDo1hoHbskQmu-_yfn0vh4-686__WV6ORiAVxGJxF0ix5VoNPVBzoztFXR5C-CywrX5eIoJvl0hOn9o27TuNlA/3uk/wKzKUNuoQ9StfbhOY8Ug1Q/h1/U0wH3m_pQB_eQZpG0PRGGVJAId03fpYmgWAza5QXvfQ)

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Fumigate the Federal Government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445453:JuIwIzGNI:m:1:3331421248:29B81889649619710A3F91B7568D6ADC:r)
---
Peter, I have a simple question for you: [**Does our federal government need to be fumigated?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445453:JuIwIzGNI:m:1:3331421248:29B81889649619710A3F91B7568D6ADC:r)
| [ **RESPOND NOW!** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445453:JuIwIzGNI:m:1:3331421248:29B81889649619710A3F91B7568D6ADC:r)
---
There is so much corruption in Washington, DC in the current administration and our federal agencies like the FBI and DOJ.

I've always said that sunlight is the best disinfectant - especially when it comes to exposing the corruption and the criminals in our government. [**Do you agree?

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445453:JuIwIzGNI:m:1:3331421248:29B81889649619710A3F91B7568D6ADC:r) We're seeing bureaucrats in the Department of Justice, FBI, and Department of Homeland Security, engaging in blatantly illegal acts.

I think it's time to clean house and start over.[ **What do you think?

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445453:JuIwIzGNI:m:1:3331421248:29B81889649619710A3F91B7568D6ADC:r) I'm reaching out to true patriots like you to see what you think. [**Click here to let me know your thoughts.

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445453:JuIwIzGNI:m:1:3331421248:29B81889649619710A3F91B7568D6ADC:r) I look forward to seeing your response.

Thank you, Harriet Hageman
| **PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
---

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: No one expected me to run for elected office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
and not many people expected me to win either | Folks, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. **[My work is made possible by this grassroots team so, if you're able, I hope you split a contribution of any amount between myself and Michael Bennet to help me keep going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60328076/396770085/-1990244395?refcode=X_031723_Klobuchar_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWY0MzRmNC1lMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7W7yCy5SIcqfoB2uVOD5grMrAV0eYor0ltGTbXIuzPM=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60328077/396770086/-1990244395?refcode=X_031723_Klobuchar_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWY0MzRmNC1lMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7W7yCy5SIcqfoB2uVOD5grMrAV0eYor0ltGTbXIuzPM=) Every day, I'm reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60328079/396770087/-1990244395?refcode=X_031723_Klobuchar_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWY0MzRmNC1lMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7W7yCy5SIcqfoB2uVOD5grMrAV0eYor0ltGTbXIuzPM=) **But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota. That’s the American dream in action. ** Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know: **I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families. ** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60328081/396770088/-1990244395?refcode=X_031723_Klobuchar_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWY0MzRmNC1lMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7W7yCy5SIcqfoB2uVOD5grMrAV0eYor0ltGTbXIuzPM=)**[**But I can’t do it alone,****friend****. That's why I'm so thankful to have grassroots supporters like you by my side. If you can, I’m asking you to split a quick donation between myself and Michael Bennet today to help me continue this fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60328083/396770089/-1990244395?refcode=X_031723_Klobuchar_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWY0MzRmNC1lMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7W7yCy5SIcqfoB2uVOD5grMrAV0eYor0ltGTbXIuzPM=) Thank you so much -- this team has never let me down. \-- Amy |

clean_body: and not many people expected me to win either | Folks, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. = = Every day, I'm reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either. = But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota. That’s the American dream in action. Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know: I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families. = Thank you so much -- this team has never let me down. \-- Amy | Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: A Final Note
body:
| | | |
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
Dear Central Committee members, extraordinary volunteers, and ardent supporters:
Thank you to those who placed their trust and confidence in me, inspiring me with words, actions, and prayers, and the hope that I would be the next Chairman of the Colorado GOP. It is my honor and privilege to strive for the future of the Republican Party, Colorado, and our still great nation. I will continue to work for a brighter future, ever toiling to build that Shining City on a Hill, albeit along another avenue.
I am grateful to all of you who work for the common good, defending our freedom, upholding the US Constitution, seeking positive, just ways to elevate the human spirit and to make Colorado and our country greater. I am convinced that our founding principles are time-tested, virtuous, and proven to lift society to ever greater heights, so we must continue to hold them dear, and courageously embody them in our daily walk. Truth will win the day.
To those Republicans who resorted to outright deceptive tactics and lies to defeat me, I must admonish you, for you undermine our cause and erode any moral high ground we might have. The ends do not justify the means, and I reject this idea that it's simply politics, as though anything goes in this arena. Immoral behavior is never justified, and if we adopt it to win, we are no better than our Democrat opponents.
I know that good wins in the end, and I will continue to labor for what is right, ever seeking to build a brighter future for our children. I look forward to working with all of you again soon!
Sincerely yours,
|

|
---
|

---

name: JoshShapiro.org
subject: did you see this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
don't skip this email

Hey Derek, did you see this email?

Josh Shapiro’s wasted no time getting to work for Pennsylvania, but with right-wing extremists trying to stand in our way and rip away our fundamental freedoms, we need your help.

The reckless spending habits of Joe Biden and the Democrats have drastically harmed every American. At a time when our country is already grappling with a mounting debt crisis, they continue to push for even more spending that we simply cannot afford...!

| The looming debt ceiling is a clear and present danger to our economy. Yet, instead of taking responsible steps to address this issue, the Democrats are pushing to raise the debt ceiling, which would only exacerbate our financial problems!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: Happy St. Patrick’s Day!
body:
\- - - | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/427894e8da8c/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8119695?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=c2bbee6916&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| [ ](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=7ba4cb60f2&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

As we celebrate St. Patrick's Day this year, I want to extend my warmest wishes to all of you in Oregon. Whether you are of Irish heritage or not, this holiday is an opportunity to come together and celebrate the rich culture and traditions of Ireland.

St. Patrick's Day is a day to reflect on the values that the Irish hold dear: community, family, and faith. It's a time to celebrate our shared heritage and the contributions that Irish Americans have made to our great country.

I am proud to represent such a diverse and vibrant community here in Oregon, and I hope that you all have a wonderful St. Patrick's Day filled with joy, laughter, and good company.

Happy St. Patrick's Day!

Sincerely,
[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=3f3534d5c2&e=c87c5d8d97)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05

clean_body: \- - - | | | | | | | | Peter, As we celebrate St. Patrick's Day this year, I want to extend my warmest wishes to all of you in Oregon. Whether you are of Irish heritage or not, this holiday is an opportunity to come together and celebrate the rich culture and traditions of Ireland. St. Patrick's Day is a day to reflect on the values that the Irish hold dear: community, family, and faith. It's a time to celebrate our shared heritage and the contributions that Irish Americans have made to our great country. I am proud to represent such a diverse and vibrant community here in Oregon, and I hope that you all have a wonderful St. Patrick's Day filled with joy, laughter, and good company. Happy St. Patrick's Day! Sincerely, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. | | Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: | If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 mailto:?subject=Support%20Congresswoman%20Lori%20Chavez-DeRemer&body=Hey!%20Congresswoman%20Lori%20Chavez-DeRemer%20needs%20our%20support!%20Go%20to%20her%20website%20and%20show%20your%20support%20today!%20lorichavezderemer.com Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | ** | | |

subject: Our Voices were Heard in Hartford
body:
Very proud of everyone who submitted testimony on so many far left election proposals | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e23c563176cc/stand-up-or-shut-up-its-time-to-find-your-voice-13528620?e=8763c56857)
---
# From the Desk of Dominic Rapini
|
---
# Legislation must do good, not just feel good?
**Why it matters:**
On the table at the Capital is bill **2023SJ-00035-R00-SB** a proposal to allow for preregistering 16 year olds to vote and automatically make them registered to vote on their 18th birthday. This is an expansion of the law affording 17 year olds the same privilege. While it may seem noble to expand the registration process to the TikTok generation it is based on the premise that today’s youth are not trusted with the traits or responsibility to register to vote on their 18th birthday.
The graph shows that the preregistration of 17 years has been a dismal failure. Presumably Connecticut should should have seen a windfall of youth registrations, when in fact, 2022 showed a poor turnout of 18 year olds who only represented 0.004% of the electorate.
**Considerations:**
Lawmakers have a responsibility to study the data and judge the effectiveness of comparable laws before adding or expanding what is on the books. Instead this proposed bill has no grounding in data or a reasonable prospect of achieving a goal.
The real issue lies in the question that is not being asked; Why are the youth of this state not engaged, not registering to vote and mostly just not voting?
**The Takeaway**
Voter engagement comes from candidates connecting voters to real issues, inspiring voters to step -up and vote, by ensuring that our elections are trusted events where everyones voice is heard. Until we answer these questions let’s forget the bandaids and focus on solving the core issue, voter enthusiasm or lack there of.
**Recap and Principles:**
1) There is no basis for success for bill **2023SJ-00035-R00-SB** 2) Data shows that preregistering 17 years did not impact the youth vote in 20223) Do not expand legislation without clear, achievable goals

# Take Action and email the GAE Chairs your position on the proposed election legistlation

Why it matters: On the table at the Capital is bill 2023SJ-00035-R00-SB a proposal to allow for preregistering 16 year olds to vote and automatically make them registered to vote on their 18th birthday. This is an expansion of the law affording 17 year olds the same privilege. While it may seem noble to expand the registration process to the TikTok generation it is based on the premise that today’s youth are not trusted with the traits or responsibility to register to vote on their 18th birthday. The graph shows that the preregistration of 17 years has been a dismal failure. Presumably Connecticut should should have seen a windfall of youth registrations, when in fact, 2022 showed a poor turnout of 18 year olds who only represented 0.004% of the electorate. Considerations: Lawmakers have a responsibility to study the data and judge the effectiveness of comparable laws before adding or expanding what is on the books. Instead this proposed bill has no grounding in data or a reasonable prospect of achieving a goal. The real issue lies in the question that is not being asked; Why are the youth of this state not engaged, not registering to vote and mostly just not voting? The Takeaway Voter engagement comes from candidates connecting voters to real issues, inspiring voters to step -up and vote, by ensuring that our elections are trusted events where everyones voice is heard. Until we answer these questions let’s forget the bandaids and focus on solving the core issue, voter enthusiasm or lack there of. Recap and Principles: 1) There is no basis for success for bill 2023SJ-00035-R00-SB 2) Data shows that preregistering 17 years did not impact the youth vote in 20223) Do not expand legislation without clear, achievable goals Take Action and email the GAE Chairs your position on the proposed election legistlation | | mailto:Matt.Blumenthal@cga.ct.gov | | | | | | ---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 Dominic For CT. All rights reserved. You have signed up to be a support of mine. Our mailing address is: Dominic For CT4 Mariners WayBranford, CT 06405-4481 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: No freedom, no rights, no due process…IN AMERICA!
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445425:6Q0fwzGwN:m:1:3331421248:111A00CC5B7FC8DA66FD7CC896A60E46:r)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445425:6Q0fwzGwN:m:1:3331421248:111A00CC5B7FC8DA66FD7CC896A60E46:r) Hi Peter,

[Please give a critical donation IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445425:6Q0fwzGwN:m:1:3331421248:111A00CC5B7FC8DA66FD7CC896A60E46:r)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake).

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights... no due process... IN AMERICA!

**That's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

**" They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."
**
That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift RIGHT NOW.
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445425:6Q0fwzGwN:m:1:3331421248:111A00CC5B7FC8DA66FD7CC896A60E46:r)
I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift more right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62445425:6Q0fwzGwN:m:1:3331421248:111A00CC5B7FC8DA66FD7CC896A60E46:r)

---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 9, 2022.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people. I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this. You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th. We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL! name: Mike Pompeo
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446365:J0umvzGjN:m:1:3365131770:FDB994EAE514DD2487D4ACA1F1BC3841:r)
---

Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed.

When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study.

They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ.

**Since then, faith has been central to my life.** I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446365:J0umvzGjN:m:1:3365131770:FDB994EAE514DD2487D4ACA1F1BC3841:r)
---

Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. _**So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day.**_

Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating.

If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, __**[we must elect more faith-driven leaders.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446365:J0umvzGjN:m:1:3365131770:FDB994EAE514DD2487D4ACA1F1BC3841:r "we must elect more faith-driven leaders.")**__

---
| | [ELECT FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446365:J0umvzGjN:m:1:3365131770:FDB994EAE514DD2487D4ACA1F1BC3841:r)
---

We are less than a week away from the upcoming midterm elections, so it is critical we have the resources to elect more faith-driven leaders who love America. Time is of the essence!

If you agree, _**[please consider donating today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446365:J0umvzGjN:m:1:3365131770:FDB994EAE514DD2487D4ACA1F1BC3841:r "please
consider donating today")**_ to support Christian conservatives who will let God be their guide - _**not self-interest**_.

God Bless,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446366:J0umvzGjN:m:1:3365131770:FDB994EAE514DD2487D4ACA1F1BC3841:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

Championing Our American Values")

clean_body: | | | | | | | Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed. When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study. They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ. Since then, faith has been central to my life. I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book. | Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day. Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating. If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, "we must elect more faith-driven leaders." | | We are less than a week away from the upcoming midterm elections, so it is critical we have the resources to elect more faith-driven leaders who love America. Time is of the essence! If you agree, "please consider donating today" to support Christian conservatives who will let God be their guide - not self-interest. name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Philadelphia Laborers Endorse Nina Ahmad in Democratic Primary for Philadelphia City Council at Large
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
I am honored to receive this endorsement of the Laborers District Council of the Metropolitan Area of Philadelphia and Vicinity which adds momentum to my critical labor backed campaign.

I'm proud to have earned the endorsement of one of the most diverse unions in Pennsylvania. I thank them for their leadership, and I'm honored to have the backing of nearly five thousand members whose professionalism and dedication to driving our region's economic engine is critical.
Deeply gratifying to receive this vote for confidence from Laborers District Council Business Manager Ryan N. Boyer, "Nina is an inspiring leader and a true champion for the underdogs of our city. I know she'll throw her heart - as she always does - into finding innovative solutions to Philadelphia's biggest problems."
[Please donate $25, $50, $100, $1000 or more to keep our Momentum going to help Democrats continue protecting our fundamental rights, ensuring every eligible voter has their voice heard, and investing in critical programs. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/IsHvlSkjwCqq7Oo6ygLgS5FLGsk-X21eJvPYl575RHQ=/6P6CNqd-xw7Na5iAzVeGUYY1eMO9HqxXc73wErjYjO8=)

name: Lori Chavez-DeRemer
subject: Parental Bill of Rights
body:
| |

---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447382:6lVDvzGNp:m:1:3391001263:ABBF8312215610B98DF4520DB8BA8F71:r)
---
| Peter,

_**As a member of the Committee on Education and the Workforce, I am thrilled to announce that I have recently signed onto the Parents Bill of Rights as a cosponsor. This proposal seeks to promote children 's well-being and success by empowering parents and ensuring they have a seat at the table in their child's education.**_
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447382:6lVDvzGNp:m:1:3391001263:ABBF8312215610B98DF4520DB8BA8F71:r)
---
| As a mother of two, I understand firsthand the importance of parental involvement in education. No one understands a child's interests and needs better than their parents, and the Parents Bill of Rights ensures that parents can speak up without fear of retaliation. This bill contains five key pillars that seek to empower parents and keep children safe:
* Parents have the right to know what their children are being taught.
* Parents have the right to be heard.
* Parents have the right to see the school's budget and spending.
* Parents have the right to protect their child's privacy.
* Parents have the right to keep their children safe.

These pillars are crucial to ensuring that parents are aware of what their children are being taught and are able to provide input and feedback. By supporting the Parents Bill of Rights, we can help to create a more transparent and equitable education system that puts the needs of parents and students first.

I believe in the power of parental involvement to drive student success. However, I also recognize that this is a bipartisan issue that affects families across the political spectrum. [_**That's why I'm committed to working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to ensure that every parent has a voice in their child's education.**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447382:6lVDvzGNp:m:1:3391001263:ABBF8312215610B98DF4520DB8BA8F71:r)

Together, we can create a brighter future for our children and families.

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447382:6lVDvzGNp:m:1:3391001263:ABBF8312215610B98DF4520DB8BA8F71:r)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62447382:6lVDvzGNp:m:1:3391001263:ABBF8312215610B98DF4520DB8BA8F71:r "CONTRIBUTE")
---

Parents have the right to see the school's budget and spending. Parents have the right to protect their child's privacy. Parents have the right to keep their children safe. These pillars are crucial to ensuring that parents are aware of what their children are being taught and are able to provide input and feedback. By supporting the Parents Bill of Rights, we can help to create a more transparent and equitable education system that puts the needs of parents and students first. I believe in the power of parental involvement to drive student success. However, I also recognize that this is a bipartisan issue that affects families across the political spectrum. Together, we can create a brighter future for our children and families. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | "CONTRIBUTE" | | ** | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system February 17, 2023. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb80db91c42342e6bc0b5ceedec6e044&_e=OASN6Xt1JGzZZnRxDS-FEl5jMEK-BB8r8pgNyCax-tWqNZ3DRr3CDW7ekMifOt25hSq6H-iLdUXtp_Hnaz9mU86GEq9hVVOZZ3G4RrZpyqwWeY-CgCA8ShlCL-EtcratEwm7h1NEM05xWKA0vZakj6U5vWGkb5JhkrgzWPTW_auHIf1viIud4nJjRo9o0U86OmQszX1DApjMVTDISpu5sJNWMG7nKuvYCduAIwMQU1cUFiPibOIU_ZoNufHSTWK5WxrG2cnbonIY3DtqQutMEhwF_nLHEPaGRMj6L_Z35pnPMV5zpdxCX6F2RxdI2NIRQZ6MAI4hHYfImJiDXLbQrBv6rQfnz6iYW8mh0SnToCphlrjNqiQ0JQgw2XRVtAu7sbEVfjVJw71hGTPtD9OY4Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb80db91c42342e6bc0b5ceedec6e044&_e=OASN6Xt1JGzZZnRxDS-FEl5jMEK-BB8r8pgNyCax-tWqNZ3DRr3CDW7ekMifOt25hSq6H-iLdUXtp_Hnaz9mU86GEq9hVVOZZ3G4RrZpyqwWeY-CgCA8ShlCL-EtcratEwm7h1NEM05xWKA0vZakj6U5vWGkb5JhkrgzWPTW_auHIf1viIud4nJjRo9o0U86OmQszX1DApjMVTDISpu5sJNWMG7nKuvYCduAIwMQU1cUFiPibOIU_ZoNufHSTWK5IPtdaraMhTivsw0tnj_mZ__dA3ssBconbxV_guZ9onBuuqNpKFHItZ9KGZ5rdx5Er83PqBAfuOjykGWDi8oj2VeaSuMRsJpJY9_Hm1R5oYTMO1o1RQvsDXtBxtAzkrjk3rQJFMTF5Wykj0BUtpFtEQ%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb80db91c42342e6bc0b5ceedec6e044&_e=OASN6Xt1JGzZZnRxDS-FEl5jMEK-BB8r8pgNyCax-tWqNZ3DRr3CDW7ekMifOt25hSq6H-iLdUXtp_Hnaz9mU86GEq9hVVOZZ3G4RrZpyqwWeY-CgCA8ShlCL-EtcratEwm7h1NEM05xWKA0vZakj6U5vWGkb5JhkrgzWPTW_auHIf1viIud4nJjRo9o0U86OmQszX1DApjMVTDISpu5sJNWMG7nKuvYCduAIwMQU1cUFiPibOIU_ZoNufHSTWK5anN25GeVCtKYNby3YoyVsqB_ym4Qq7OBpJ7XRTYEBsSTCc_Y5abhFAEDgS6ad-ql8c3lPzmg4vli3bmPeP3sFpOfurSdtbtspboSG3_TVMVwgM4cb03DE_ct6ic4QnQoAfDyMOIR3ZDGwOyAiSVsiw%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

subject: I’m hoping that I can rely on you.

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c1a03112376470a8ba86c61a2a0582a&_e=JFij3CukGGQ_HBjJzsFZWVN35yO3yKPOGaJ-Eq3CaqW6SbiI81AYICy5Z_zMukTz2RyJ_ApnKtjxPhv0abS3SkSrrHH66SwfrJJGsEI71yVMdx74eDS-e2pyFJggB-gKwCwc-ScJefR47CMqiOFVN61jK0DV9JZ9N8hejXHC69oU3DIheCWU7aP-489KcFbapjTfc6rdA_-9JhvfhQiicuK3OHwCeMAT72eTfTSfb6WlIYp377MEstxs4TlHH-xsdFDKKd03yhz-4Re9XQPvSmOCIW2MRzjylVMb4tTknR19tFZmyoWgPQ4uWN0K7u9Bz4mJJeJAZ4o_9prEo-Xk21WEi0dEuQCacCtjQgc9gmMXpv5EgWVUo3YKAvDQLR9o-qdsGNl8q4JRhYl_53L_lJfm2vQmbnLaod-6VeGC0Wegxc-9DJxNRSW5IwNbUCPWQC_gyU2f48BcCIfnpcuyCQ%3D%3D)

Peter, I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Harriet Hageman, and I’m the current Congresswoman from the great state of Wyoming. I decided to run for Congress because I firmly believe we need strong leaders who represent our country’s conservative values and have our nation’s best interests at heart. **And in 2022, I won the highest-profile congressional primary election in my race against the Uniparty Establishment, who have turned their back on our conservative values.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c1a03112376470a8ba86c61a2a0582a&_e=JFij3CukGGQ_HBjJzsFZWVN35yO3yKPOGaJ-Eq3CaqW6SbiI81AYICy5Z_zMukTz2RyJ_ApnKtjxPhv0abS3SkSrrHH66SwfrJJGsEI71yVMdx74eDS-e2pyFJggB-gKwCwc-ScJefR47CMqiOFVN61jK0DV9JZ9N8hejXHC69oU3DIheCWU7aP-489KcFbapjTfc6rdA_-9JhvfhQiicuK3OHwCeMAT72eTfTSfb6WlIYp377MEstxs4TlHH-xsdFDKKd03yhz-4Re9XQPvSmOCIW2MRzjylVMb4tTknR19tFZmyoWgPQ4uWN0K7u9Bbm3JjlM36ZjR-SDA9SbvJnwojg79PadJ_c3MPVDcwfRU1w14mkqMsSW4IExhpNwP8RQ1sHwJn2D0L4c-PlzBtZTVHqegF6jNU9o12O-mOCaPaofUjzfqpFPSmSXqGRYfk3p86-B4V77-lbq5U884dg%3D%3D)

| | [**SUPPORT OUR CONSERVATIVE VALUES!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c1a03112376470a8ba86c61a2a0582a&_e=JFij3CukGGQ_HBjJzsFZWVN35yO3yKPOGaJ-Eq3CaqW6SbiI81AYICy5Z_zMukTz2RyJ_ApnKtjxPhv0abS3SkSrrHH66SwfrJJGsEI71yVMdx74eDS-e2pyFJggB-gKwCwc-ScJefR47CMqiOFVN61jK0DV9JZ9N8hejXHC69oU3DIheCWU7aP-489KcFbapjTfc6rdA_-9JhvfhQiicuK3OHwCeMAT72eTfTSfb6WlIYp377MEstxs4TlHH-xsdFDKKd03yhz-4Re9XQPvSmOCIW2MRzjylVMb4tTknR19tFZmyoWgPQ4uWN0K7u9Bn5cnfXsoPuZvYXw-wbxood_xKPo3ArBHL6HwLe71rnQn4sNTmDD-Vb69MjlhobeW9-5R083DiLV7zSnUP_6Saw3AkHwL-zVkSFyrGAnOEigwTaPDK-0OVpmXwUhPMJE7toiRnI_bpmsH_eKnLrfOcg%3D%3D)
---
Despite my short time in Congress, I’ve already gained a reputation for standing up to federal overreach, protecting private property and water rights, working to curtail and expose the failures of federal land and wildlife mismanagement, and challenging unconstitutional acts by both federal and state agencies. I’m committed to always upholding our Constitution, our conservative values, and putting our country first. That’s why I serve, and it’s why I’m asking you to [**become a part of our team.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c1a03112376470a8ba86c61a2a0582a&_e=JFij3CukGGQ_HBjJzsFZWVN35yO3yKPOGaJ-Eq3CaqW6SbiI81AYICy5Z_zMukTz2RyJ_ApnKtjxPhv0abS3SkSrrHH66SwfrJJGsEI71yVMdx74eDS-e2pyFJggB-gKwCwc-ScJefR47CMqiOFVN61jK0DV9JZ9N8hejXHC69oU3DIheCWU7aP-489KcFbapjTfc6rdA_-9JhvfhQiicuK3OHwCeMAT72eTfTSfb6WlIYp377MEstxs4TlHH-xsdFDKKd03yhz-4Re9XQPvSmOCIW2MRzjylVMb4tTknR19tFZmyoWgPQ4uWN0K7u9BNwzuJggaseTwIcscmyl99M9e93ILR-nVHl5gKXsiDZBe42-jopOAytU9jb_JtoY22NfGblZGhzoNeVGJ9ZDhCNfprhMr2tpjlVV7px6v2Z_0rFntEieqnDehCoja8HYwouxizLsegA1DDWKyW9xgvg%3D%3D) As an unyielding conservative, I will always uphold and support our traditional conservative values - especially when it comes to defending our great nation against the excess of government. And during my time in Congress, I pledge to always focus on and fight for what is in the best interest of the United States and in the best interests of true patriots like you. That’s why I’m asking you to [**stand with me and ensure that we ALWAYS have strong Republican leaders fighting in Washington, DC.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c1a03112376470a8ba86c61a2a0582a&_e=JFij3CukGGQ_HBjJzsFZWVN35yO3yKPOGaJ-Eq3CaqW6SbiI81AYICy5Z_zMukTz2RyJ_ApnKtjxPhv0abS3SkSrrHH66SwfrJJGsEI71yVMdx74eDS-e2pyFJggB-gKwCwc-ScJefR47CMqiOFVN61jK0DV9JZ9N8hejXHC69oU3DIheCWU7aP-489KcFbapjTfc6rdA_-9JhvfhQiicuK3OHwCeMAT72eTfTSfb6WlIYp377MEstxs4TlHH-xsdFDKKd03yhz-4Re9XQPvSmOCIW2MRzjylVMb4tTknR19tFZmyoWgPQ4uWN0K7u9BA6-ITDXKW5MkQjW_MK0mubZ9uz1hsuwPqKJvOyHR5s0GjUa3RMVhHLSrOOgrlqbAHXGnbKhmhN_CWfF4j5AOdJBAseFU-rj3KrH-WI_bPra-P47ddzn94u_YQiMztlUfEMJs0jO8RXqvZAYYo3crNA%3D%3D) I live my life by these guiding principles: Integrity, honesty, and accountability - all of which are rarely found in the liberal and Uniparty circles of Congress. And make no mistake: I will always fight for true conservatives like you all across the country throughout my time in Congress. [**Will you support me in that fight?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c1a03112376470a8ba86c61a2a0582a&_e=JFij3CukGGQ_HBjJzsFZWVN35yO3yKPOGaJ-Eq3CaqW6SbiI81AYICy5Z_zMukTz2RyJ_ApnKtjxPhv0abS3SkSrrHH66SwfrJJGsEI71yVMdx74eDS-e2pyFJggB-gKwCwc-ScJefR47CMqiOFVN61jK0DV9JZ9N8hejXHC69oU3DIheCWU7aP-489KcFbapjTfc6rdA_-9JhvfhQiicuK3OHwCeMAT72eTfTSfb6WlIYp377MEstxs4TlHH-xsdFDKKd03yhz-4Re9XQPvSmOCIW2MRzjylVMb4tTknR19tFZmyoWgPQ4uWN0K7u9BsEDVvAgmH2ZFkp-nmN8W8Qn6p8RVrLmUwc1dKaym9AiYNqZWE22H7nnn3AldkMd-W22VdqqA5B4dIEZe-sKhyd55dKkHkWNeKJ6iOuJIdylCRhQYMiL__GOlSqFino5kQtiWFD308QSTcxXah9WWUA%3D%3D)

I hope that you’ll [**join our team,**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7c1a03112376470a8ba86c61a2a0582a&_e=JFij3CukGGQ_HBjJzsFZWVN35yO3yKPOGaJ-Eq3CaqW6SbiI81AYICy5Z_zMukTz2RyJ_ApnKtjxPhv0abS3SkSrrHH66SwfrJJGsEI71yVMdx74eDS-e2pyFJggB-gKwCwc-ScJefR47CMqiOFVN61jK0DV9JZ9N8hejXHC69oU3DIheCWU7aP-489KcFbapjTfc6rdA_-9JhvfhQiicuK3OHwCeMAT72eTfTSfb6WlIYp377MEstxs4TlHH-xsdFDKKd03yhz-4Re9XQPvSmOCIW2MRzjylVMb4tTknR19tFZmyoWgPQ4uWN0K7u9BloMQ8LT2b2vbSjruQdzlGq2Dl27uRMsl_RS2C6gHWznCkm7dJxQbp8QaaRKwrtAYNj-Zx-EBQoyZ7KZG-t-nmliNGKLTzxYW4YDQkwB4GLox-MwOnPWHH1j-al51uZFUuZ7HqvPEH6p_9aPpuSJk9Q%3D%3D) and I hope that you’re ready to join the fight to bring true conservative values back to our country. Thank you, Peter. True patriots like you are the reason I chose to run for office in the first place. \- Harriet Hageman

Peter, I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Harriet Hageman, and I’m the current Congresswoman from the great state of Wyoming. I decided to run for Congress because I firmly believe we need strong leaders who represent our country’s conservative values and have our nation’s best interests at heart. And in 2022, I won the highest-profile congressional primary election in my race against the Uniparty Establishment, who have turned their back on our conservative values. | | Despite my short time in Congress, I’ve already gained a reputation for standing up to federal overreach, protecting private property and water rights, working to curtail and expose the failures of federal land and wildlife mismanagement, and challenging unconstitutional acts by both federal and state agencies. I’m committed to always upholding our Constitution, our conservative values, and putting our country first. That’s why I serve, and it’s why I’m asking you to As an unyielding conservative, I will always uphold and support our traditional conservative values - especially when it comes to defending our great nation against the excess of government. And during my time in Congress, I pledge to always focus on and fight for what is in the best interest of the United States and in the best interests of true patriots like you. That’s why I’m asking you to I live my life by these guiding principles: Integrity, honesty, and accountability - all of which are rarely found in the liberal and Uniparty circles of Congress. And make no mistake: I will always fight for true conservatives like you all across the country throughout my time in Congress. I hope that you’ll and I hope that you’re ready to join the fight to bring true conservative values back to our country. Thank you, Peter. True patriots like you are the reason I chose to run for office in the first place. \- Harriet Hageman | | PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING | |

name: Team AOC
subject: We’ve taken a break from fundraising for our own campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Will you make a contribution right now to power our work and help ensure Alexandria can continue to lead during these moments?
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230317-4016-header&t=1&akid=4016%2E2526796%2E4ccgUv)
In recent weeks, we’ve taken a necessary break from our campaign’s fundraising efforts to make space for the communities and organizations who need direct support right now:
* In February, after a freight train carrying hazardous materials derailed in the small town of East Palestine, Ohio, **together our movement raised more than $15,000 for direct relief organizations in the community** helping to provide assistance to families affected by the toxic train derailment.
* Then, in response to the announcement that President Biden expelled over 2,400,000 asylum seekers, **we fundraised for two immigrant-rights organizations: New York Immigration Coalition and New York State Youth Leadership Council**.
* Lastly, in response to the more than 375 bills targeting LGBTQ+ rights in the U.S., **together we raised thousands of dollars for the Equality Federation** , an advocacy accelerator focused on building power for state-based LGBTQ+ advocacy organizations.

**We’re so grateful to have a community like ours when moments like these happen — people who are willing to step up, meet these moments, and provide critical support in whatever ways they can. That includes you.**
We put fundraising for our campaign on the back burner during this time because we knew the strength of our movement was needed elsewhere. But now, we need your help to close the gap and hit our Q1 goal of 5,780 contributions.
[**As we approach the first FEC deadline of the year, will you make a $3 contribution right now to power our work and close our fundraising gap?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230317.rM24-1&refcode=em20230317-4016-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4016%2E2526796%2E4ccgUv)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230317.rM24-1&refcode=em20230317-4016-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4016%2E2526796%2E4ccgUv)**
Every contribution allows our team to not only coordinate more solidarity efforts like these, but also to fight for legislation to protect asylum seekers, strengthen safety measures for our rail system, safeguard LGBTQ+ rights, and more.
Thank you,
Team AOC
