clean_body: Will you make a contribution right now to power our work and help ensure Alexandria can continue to lead during these moments? In recent weeks, we’ve taken a necessary break from our campaign’s fundraising efforts to make space for the communities and organizations who need direct support right now: In February, after a freight train carrying hazardous materials derailed in the small town of East Palestine, Ohio, together our movement raised more than $15,000 for direct relief organizations in the community helping to provide assistance to families affected by the toxic train derailment. Then, in response to the announcement that President Biden expelled over 2,400,000 asylum seekers, we fundraised for two immigrant-rights organizations: New York Immigration Coalition and New York State Youth Leadership Council. Lastly, in response to the more than 375 bills targeting LGBTQ+ rights in the U.S., together we raised thousands of dollars for the Equality Federation , an advocacy accelerator focused on building power for state-based LGBTQ+ advocacy organizations. We’re so grateful to have a community like ours when moments like these happen — people who are willing to step up, meet these moments, and provide critical support in whatever ways they can. That includes you. We put fundraising for our campaign on the back burner during this time because we knew the strength of our movement was needed elsewhere. But now, we need your help to close the gap and hit our Q1 goal of 5,780 contributions. Every contribution allows our team to not only coordinate more solidarity efforts like these, but also to fight for legislation to protect asylum seekers, strengthen safety measures for our rail system, safeguard LGBTQ+ rights, and more. Thank you, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Doug Mastriano's Values Are NOT What We Fought For
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BKu85n8r2HUKBHXWOtn0q_bTjnx7LrNQdRbWe9ahs=/f8oqChGDSr8VfxRcIgsz2_S6EFN02xY2O4JVsrEfWEM=)
Peter,

Today I was on national television talking about St Patrick's Day and the discriminatory history Irish Americans faced - 'Irish Need Not Apply' & the 'Day of the Rope' when twenty Irish miners were hanged for allegedly being Molly Maguires.

Today, it's young trans Americans who are facing historic discrimination and it's making an impact: A study by the Trevor Project last year found that, in America, 50% of transgender young Americans contemplated taking their own life via suicide.

Please pass along this clip on social media & know how grateful we are for you for being part of our Kennedy Democrats family. May your luck always be Dublin!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BKu85n8r2HUKBHXWOtn0q_bTjnx7LrNQdRbWe9ahs=/Jt5p-9l7w32wsPq6u87Xn-N5xYJFhV6lFQb0UE7_iEc=)

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Former U.S. Congressman
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BKu85n8r2HUKBHXWOtn0q_bTjnx7LrNQdRbWe9ahs=/f8oqChGDSr8VfxRcIgsz2_S6EFN02xY2O4JVsrEfWEM=)

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BKu85n8r2HUKBHXWOtn0q_bTjnx7LrNQdRbWe9ahs=/HwrO6lzNfmO5sW4OYCvw9u9aUTm-6y7fhpTs0rImhh4=).
clean_body: = Peter, Today I was on national television talking about St Patrick's Day and the discriminatory history Irish Americans faced - 'Irish Need Not Apply' & the 'Day of the Rope' when twenty Irish miners were hanged for allegedly being Molly Maguires. Today, it's young trans Americans who are facing historic discrimination and it's making an impact: A study by the Trevor Project last year found that, in America, 50% of transgender young Americans contemplated taking their own life via suicide. Please pass along this clip on social media & know how grateful we are for you for being part of our Kennedy Democrats family. May your luck always be Dublin! = Hon. Patrick J. Murphy 32nd Under Secretary of the Army Former U.S. Congressman = Paid for by Kennedy Democrats Kennedy Democrats PO Box 2134 Bristol PA 19007 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Team Lori
subject: Lori is fighting for economic growth
body:
| |

---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446461:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
---
| Peter,

With prices on the rise and the cost of goods and services skyrocketing, families are struggling to make ends meet. We know that this is an issue that affects all Americans.

Lori has always been a commonsense voice and knows the importance of bipartisan solutions that benefit all Americans. That's why she is committed to finding practical solutions to address inflation and help hardworking families get ahead.

She needs your support.

[_**Your contribution will help Lori fight for policies that will help mitigate the effects of inflation and help hard-working families get back on their feet. >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446461:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446461:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r "CONTRIBUTE TODAY")
---
| With your help, we can advocate for economic growth, support small businesses, and provide relief for struggling families. Every dollar counts, and your contribution will make a real difference in the fight against inflation.

Thank you,

Team Lori
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446461:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r "CONTRIBUTE")

---
| Even as a Congresswoman, Lori's most important title is mom. That's how she knows the issues your family faces, and that's why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American.
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446457:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
---
| Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she's fighting for in Congress:
* [Restoring our Economy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446456:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
* [Parental Choice in Oregon Schools](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446456:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
* [Low Taxes, Balanced Budgets](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446456:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
* [Keeping our Communities Safe](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446456:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
* [Putting America and Oregon First](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446456:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
* [Supporting our Veterans and Armed Forces](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446456:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
* [Empowering Farmers and Ranchers](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446456:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
* [Improving Transportation and Infrastructure](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446456:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
* [Fighting Homelessness](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446456:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)

---
| If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, [_**please consider making a contribution today. >**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446457:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)
If you'd prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress
13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399
Happy Valley, OR 97086 [Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America ->](mailto:?subject=Support%20Congresswoman%20Lori%20Chavez-DeRemer&body=Hey!%20Congresswoman%20Lori%20Chavez-DeRemer%20needs%20our%20support!%20Go%20to%20her%20website%20and%20show%20your%20support%20today!%20lorichavezderemer.com)

| ** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446460:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446459:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62446458:6SaA-zGN1:m:1:3365131770:448C4DE33774C261094AB41E05F87FEF:r)**

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Then, national Republicans announced that they were adding our members to their target list in 2024. Republicans are gearing up to target our Frontline members and spend whatever it takes to defeat them. Here at Democrats Serve, we’re working hard to make sure our public service pros have the resources they need to fight back. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thanks, Democrats Serve | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. |

name: Jason Miyares
subject: ZERO tolerance for woke schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
This is a blatant violation of Virginia’s Human Rights Act. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=30afbdd621534047b0269a070d0dd83d&_t=m8Y25QXP45X2V4ECfYgFBxMQFARRLz9xO6-bleP_WSoO6gBXeVAAxpR97RVtSCVzBXhFxBxIDdOTYHmZuOcamhsi_CKm5-A1V7zivOPIJA4%3D)_.

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=30afbdd621534047b0269a070d0dd83d&_e=olFyQaTF4o28myq8Qm-E-D_JeuYXCPWcB5RV0oiWQczWgGajB44u0OzqYpw3z5PH6dpatP1CgB-YHpltX7_rwM-tC63P0-qdbT32YbBWZZqbmgD0q-4EBS8U_Uzx0NeWI-RXMSc8AahfUL3vGjzpYR3CihQJXoVGWl2t-vwDbun3ralJTFrBYilaZxeiR3guXlCnckn7qXlZANBDo82nBcOGRey2cvBUBM6RrvZa3EgpwfQiNHF-UGNalw-LmOdI2Dmz2EDYlVRse6k6ssyx3W0he01fzJkISB2se1m5xFIA_rDEHKfSiaajMAmW7Zb3MbOJIa0BAUynwVvR8QA-piA9rT8YVfLgqP9T1InuZqx_P4yuZkIXPPzxmYdgxFopH8PUSRiLK65o9TupzVon1g%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Every student should be able to apply for a college prep program and have the same opportunities as their peers, regardless of race. _[**_I AGREE >>_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=30afbdd621534047b0269a070d0dd83d&_e=olFyQaTF4o28myq8Qm-E-D_JeuYXCPWcB5RV0oiWQczWgGajB44u0OzqYpw3z5PH6dpatP1CgB-YHpltX7_rwM-tC63P0-qdbT32YbBWZZqbmgD0q-4EBS8U_Uzx0NeWI-RXMSc8AahfUL3vGjzpYR3CihQJXoVGWl2t-vwDbun3ralJTFrBYilaZxeiR3guXlCnckn7qXlZANBDo82nBcOGRey2cvBUBM6RrvZa3EgglYFVWtr1gbvQ9cQQ5nLbN-syebQpNShX87uUUuEycKdNMVtxS13w23LnN6kla7ecqt-TbAtRIaxk0VeGyUWMpHERejaGXhCFyGGEGajF10Aqh5OthHnxCHEH8jrySPFGQWaamXpk7yCIS3B78x-1AcdmrTgVgtf7fOg2fffilQ%3D%3D)_ But recently, it was revealed that a Fairfax County middle school is engaging in conduct that violates the Virginia Human Rights Act, something my office takes __very seriously_._
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=30afbdd621534047b0269a070d0dd83d&_e=olFyQaTF4o28myq8Qm-E-D_JeuYXCPWcB5RV0oiWQczWgGajB44u0OzqYpw3z5PH6dpatP1CgB-YHpltX7_rwM-tC63P0-qdbT32YbBWZZqbmgD0q-4EBS8U_Uzx0NeWI-RXMSc8AahfUL3vGjzpYR3CihQJXoVGWl2t-vwDbun3ralJTFrBYilaZxeiR3guXlCnckn7qXlZANBDo82nBcOGRey2cvBUBM6RrvZa3Eh6dEfESOPO9JeB_PJp1Gl9nHA50fkz0nDPLLoqt9a-3UOBqOe4B9zpieWaE0h2wlcXTv47PrW22kquhlxqildTLKQmsMch0-JJNGytn4wpiQ-oJ1uzXxvObN64RSKLuN4A3DsifxcQiJcTsYeGyjZIFIVbUF-3XynSumD_DTkjrQ%3D%3D)
---
**_These stories are deeply personal to me, Peter._** Education is the doorway to American success, especially for the children of immigrants like me. It’s important every child has the same opportunity, regardless of their race or background. Children of immigrants that came to the United States are living out the dreams that were denied to their parents – and education is the pathway to achieving the American Dream.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=30afbdd621534047b0269a070d0dd83d&_e=olFyQaTF4o28myq8Qm-E-D_JeuYXCPWcB5RV0oiWQczWgGajB44u0OzqYpw3z5PH6dpatP1CgB-YHpltX7_rwM-tC63P0-qdbT32YbBWZZqbmgD0q-4EBS8U_Uzx0NeWI-RXMSc8AahfUL3vGjzpYR3CihQJXoVGWl2t-vwDbun3ralJTFrBYilaZxeiR3guXlCnckn7qXlZANBDo82nBcOGRey2cvBUBM6RrvZa3EjMcRA54xxIdTc341FthKZW_8rLTIvKPWjgcqBfW8VoozpuS0tczT3UhMmKyCCrbTfHxdNC4BbIrg9362HX6USK_Jr1BOwSkbbUqPu8P0wfj8_XslTQDFIMSN20f2hvqBDhPAIgfQV0Ju1a6pmAcOkZAM0h8E2aw57hR2DKSTchGA%3D%3D)
---
50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General.****_[**KEEP THE AMERICAN DREAM ALIVE >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=30afbdd621534047b0269a070d0dd83d&_e=olFyQaTF4o28myq8Qm-E-D_JeuYXCPWcB5RV0oiWQczWgGajB44u0OzqYpw3z5PH6dpatP1CgB-YHpltX7_rwM-tC63P0-qdbT32YbBWZZqbmgD0q-4EBS8U_Uzx0NeWI-RXMSc8AahfUL3vGjzpYR3CihQJXoVGWl2t-vwDbun3ralJTFrBYilaZxeiR3guXlCnckn7qXlZANBDo82nBcOGRey2cvBUBM6RrvZa3EhwJt0lFczSmZSj4PzGfGIC3muogCWeywsR_C15w6uyEVtAgg-WKo43UaGOHc5KuKPLg_sJNrqPn7yLh8jb6tzy3NurNvOWbkvzApfuoaadbTwqaAr4lGUT11fFr4t4TyEGj6HsNO2MFORGxtURY0KXyYmnvN6YYnFOeto7A7mJbQ%3D%3D)_ **Peter, as the people’s protector, it’s my responsibility to ensure every Virginian is being treated fairly, regardless of their race, religion, or creed, especially for the Commonwealth’s future leaders.** **_[Will you join me in upholding the rule of law and keeping woke policies out of our schools?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=30afbdd621534047b0269a070d0dd83d&_e=olFyQaTF4o28myq8Qm-E-D_JeuYXCPWcB5RV0oiWQczWgGajB44u0OzqYpw3z5PH6dpatP1CgB-YHpltX7_rwM-tC63P0-qdbT32YbBWZZqbmgD0q-4EBS8U_Uzx0NeWI-RXMSc8AahfUL3vGjzpYR3CihQJXoVGWl2t-vwDbun3ralJTFrBYilaZxeiR3guXlCnckn7qXlZANBDo82nBcOGRey2cvBUBM6RrvZa3Eh76WHSd2CVjZm5x1bMaDoiUpwPNCLQCScI1d_lXPELOoJ5IC--GcxOJu0-iVN5uq3LPGESyFPnIHobtl1UsjB5W2u3pyecdxvcmv49dul-Iw24s1g83pklYf9tGxrfbfXDmbp9qA-GoANLuBgfRYI4JOXH6xqs1R9ocDNq8kdKJw%3D%3D)_ **

name: Shape of Things [AOTL]
subject: Could we lose this fair district in North Carolina?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Learn about the barriers to fair representation in local communities like NC-06
|
---

**The Shape Of Things: NC-06**
**The district:** North Carolina’s 6th congressional district includes all of Guilford County and a portion of Forsyth County, keeping the Triad largely unified in a single congressional district. In 2021, the state supreme court overturned the congressional map that split Guilford into three congressional districts. In 2023, the newly elected justices in North Carolina decided to rehear part of _Harper v. Hall_. This landmark redistricting case had previously struck down the 2021 congressional map as an unconstitutional partisan gerrymander. That watershed ruling clarified that state courts could and will intervene when the legislature violates voters' rights.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60350791/396827206/394929392?refcode=20230317_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThings2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ZDkyNjcyLTE3YzUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tl6TM8QLv8u_E3-yciD7BPuHExEFAWNA2QU6-4R4H7w=)
---
**History of the District:** This region has a long history of gerrymandering, from the snake-like 12th district that packed Black voters into one long district from Charlotte, through the Triad and into Durham, to the infamous maps drawn in 2016 that split the Greensboro-based campus of NC A&T State University -- one of the largest HBCUs in the United States -- into two congressional districts. That map, a 10R-3D GOP plan, was declared unconstitutional partisan gerrymander. The legislature then drew a remedial plan that ceded two GOP seats for an 8R-5D split, creating strongly Democratic seats in the Greensboro and Raleigh areas. Democratic Rep. Kathy Manning first won this Piedmont Triad seat in 2020.
Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities like Guilford County, North Carolina. It provides an opportunity to support our fight for their representation. **[Will you support All On The Line with a recurring donation of any amount to support our work to advocate for fair maps in places like North Carolina and other target states?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60350793/396827208/394929392?recurring=1&refcode=20230317_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThings2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ZDkyNjcyLTE3YzUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tl6TM8QLv8u_E3-yciD7BPuHExEFAWNA2QU6-4R4H7w=)**
**What’s next?**
On March 14, the North Carolina Supreme Court reheard significant portions of the landmark case, _Harper v. Hall_ , that has made the maps in the North Carolina fair. If the court overturns recent precedent and allows the General Assembly to gerrymander with impunity, they will remove a fair map that allows voters of both parties an opportunity to elect their preferred candidates and revert to a map that divides heavily Democratic Guilford County into three different congressional districts, grouping each section with much redder, rural areas and distant suburbs -- effectively drowning out the voices of Guilford county voters.
---
On March 3rd, the Harper plaintiffs, a group of North Carolina voters supported by our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), submitted a supplemental brief in _Harper v. Hall._
This comes after conservative legislators seeking political opportunity petitioned the NC Supreme Court to reconsider the case. These legislators may believe that a change in judicial officers grants them permission to rewrite the law in their favor. But we know that is not how our judicial system works. Neither the law, precedent, nor the facts have changed. And we must not allow extremist conservatives in North Carolina to obstruct the redistricting process that will impact communities in CD-06 and across the state.
Our organization is working tirelessly to ensure voters in North Carolina are supported by a grassroots army fighting to restore our democracy.**[In order to protect fairness in districts like NC-06, we must take action now to help All On The Line advocate for fair maps. Can you help our efforts across the nation by making a donation today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60350795/396827210/394929392?refcode=20230317_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThings2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ZDkyNjcyLTE3YzUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tl6TM8QLv8u_E3-yciD7BPuHExEFAWNA2QU6-4R4H7w=)**

clean_body: Learn about the barriers to fair representation in local communities like NC-06 | The Shape Of Things: NC-06 The district: North Carolina’s 6th congressional district includes all of Guilford County and a portion of Forsyth County, keeping the Triad largely unified in a single congressional district. In 2021, the state supreme court overturned the congressional map that split Guilford into three congressional districts. In 2023, the newly elected justices in North Carolina decided to rehear part of Harper v. Hall. This landmark redistricting case had previously struck down the 2021 congressional map as an unconstitutional partisan gerrymander. That watershed ruling clarified that state courts could and will intervene when the legislature violates voters' rights. = History of the District: This region has a long history of gerrymandering, from the snake-like 12th district that packed Black voters into one long district from Charlotte, through the Triad and into Durham, to the infamous maps drawn in 2016 that split the Greensboro-based campus of NC A&T State University -- one of the largest HBCUs in the United States -- into two congressional districts. That map, a 10R-3D GOP plan, was declared unconstitutional partisan gerrymander. The legislature then drew a remedial plan that ceded two GOP seats for an 8R-5D split, creating strongly Democratic seats in the Greensboro and Raleigh areas. Democratic Rep. Kathy Manning first won this Piedmont Triad seat in 2020. Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities like Guilford County, North Carolina. It provides an opportunity to support our fight for their representation. = What’s next? On March 14, the North Carolina Supreme Court reheard significant portions of the landmark case, Harper v. Hall , that has made the maps in the North Carolina fair. If the court overturns recent precedent and allows the General Assembly to gerrymander with impunity, they will remove a fair map that allows voters of both parties an opportunity to elect their preferred candidates and revert to a map that divides heavily Democratic Guilford County into three different congressional districts, grouping each section with much redder, rural areas and distant suburbs -- effectively drowning out the voices of Guilford county voters. On March 3rd, the Harper plaintiffs, a group of North Carolina voters supported by our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), submitted a supplemental brief in Harper v. Hall. This comes after conservative legislators seeking political opportunity petitioned the NC Supreme Court to reconsider the case. These legislators may believe that a change in judicial officers grants them permission to rewrite the law in their favor. But we know that is not how our judicial system works. Neither the law, precedent, nor the facts have changed. And we must not allow extremist conservatives in North Carolina to obstruct the redistricting process that will impact communities in CD-06 and across the state. Our organization is working tirelessly to ensure voters in North Carolina are supported by a grassroots army fighting to restore our democracy.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = ** **** **All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Andy Kim
subject: True patriotism is supporting our troops, not spreading misinformation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60343127/396798165/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWUzMTJkMy1mNmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8n86S64nNmAEItNtfHSy_iJRRZYHtQZKwJC7oFLxn4=&emci=847f9fa9-27c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fae312d3-f6c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **Recently, Republicans in Washington have disparaged our military service members for being too "woke."** They've claimed that efforts to diversify the ranks have weakened our armed forces, and accused our military leaders of advancing some undefined political agenda. But last week we learned that's not at all the case. **When we**** _actually speak_****with our military leaders, they are clear that these efforts are helping recruitment and in no way hindering the strength of our military.** They said as much. Over and over. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60343128/396798166/1951589253?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWUzMTJkMy1mNmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8n86S64nNmAEItNtfHSy_iJRRZYHtQZKwJC7oFLxn4=&emci=847f9fa9-27c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fae312d3-f6c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) During my time in Congress, I have had the honor and privilege to meet with many veterans and servicemembers living in New Jersey's Third Congressional District and working on our Joint Base as well. All of them are dedicated to serving our country, defending our constitution, and protecting the people who call this country home – regardless of their personal political beliefs. Seeing my colleagues talk about our troops like this, with such divisive language, makes me angry. **These brave people are putting their lives on the line in order to serve. Using their patriotism to score political points is, in a word, disgusting.** Though I am glad to see military leaders speaking out to counter Republican attacks on our service members, I'm frustrated and sad that there is a need for them to do so. As the ranking member of the military personnel subcommittee, I'll always support those who step up to defend our constitution and country. _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.
---
| This email was sent by **[Andy Kim](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60343129/396798167/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWUzMTJkMy1mNmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8n86S64nNmAEItNtfHSy_iJRRZYHtQZKwJC7oFLxn4=&emci=847f9fa9-27c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fae312d3-f6c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=26261389)**

name: Dan Kildee
subject: we’re facing our first attack ad of the 2024 race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi there,

Did you see this note from my team? I’ve already been labeled a top target by National Republicans for 2024, and an out-of-state group just launched a misleading attack ad against our campaign, even though Election Day is nearly two years away.

**[Our campaign has been preparing for another competitive race in 2024. We’re one of a few Democrats who represent a Republican-leaning district, and we were just named to the list of the most competitive races in the country. Now we need to pick up the pace to fight back against this misleading attack ad. body:
When the conservative-majority Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year, we knew there were more attacks on abortion access coming soon.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60343559/396800184/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230317-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ2MTJkNi1mOGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vBvk1lnRi0YC9RHRnsJ0bIWokxWXmcJ8PsfCWF2qH8=)

| This is urgent, Peter.

We are on the cusp of mifepristone – one of two medications most commonly used in medication abortion in the United States – being yanked off shelves nationwide by a single judge’s unprecedented decision. [_**I’ll explain more in a moment, but first, I’m asking you to rush a split contribution to my re-election campaign and Planned Parenthood to protect abortion access nationwide.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60343561/396800186/481886242?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230317-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ2MTJkNi1mOGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vBvk1lnRi0YC9RHRnsJ0bIWokxWXmcJ8PsfCWF2qH8=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60343564/396800188/481886242?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230317-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ2MTJkNi1mOGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vBvk1lnRi0YC9RHRnsJ0bIWokxWXmcJ8PsfCWF2qH8=)
---
Here are the facts:
* Since being approved by the FDA over 20 years ago, mifepristone has been used by more than 5 million people in the United States to safely end their pregnancies.

* Mifepristone is used in more than half of all abortions nationwide.

* This court case is part of ongoing efforts by anti-abortion activists to dismantle reproductive health care nationwide.

When the conservative-majority Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year, we knew there were more attacks on abortion access coming soon. We need to take back the House majority for Democrats so that we can make reproductive health care access the law of the land. [_**My promise to you is that I will always advocate for all Americans to make their own health care decisions, without politicians having a say. That’s why I’m asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Planned Parenthood today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60343567/396800192/481886242?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230317-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ2MTJkNi1mOGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vBvk1lnRi0YC9RHRnsJ0bIWokxWXmcJ8PsfCWF2qH8=)

name: Greg Landsman
subject: The story behind our first bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Friend, I wanted to make sure you heard the news from me, personally: I just introduced my first bill, the Making Insulin Affordable for All Children Act, to cap the cost of insulin for children across the country.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60344308/396802385/-373411488?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.17_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjExMWQzYS1mYmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEmob43JOUkAGQ_egxBE2WTuE0ku9Fw492_2euiMwRM=)

Friend,

I wanted to make sure you heard the news from me, personally:** I just introduced my first bill, the _Making Insulin Affordable for All Children Act_ , to cap the cost of insulin for children across the country.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60344309/396802386/-373411488?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.17_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjExMWQzYS1mYmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEmob43JOUkAGQ_egxBE2WTuE0ku9Fw492_2euiMwRM=)
I’m proud to say our bill was inspired by, and introduced to help, kids like Isaiah Gentry. I had the honor of getting to know Isaiah when he joined me at last month’s State of the Union address, but allow me to share his story with you.

A proud Cincinnati native, Isaiah is a 7th grader living with Type 1 diabetes.

From the moment he was diagnosed, Isaiah’s family has struggled to afford the high cost of insulin. The financial burden became so severe that his mom, Tara, had to place her career on hold to take a lower-paying job – _just to ensure her son’s life-saving medication would be covered by Medicaid._

Isaiah’s story is unfortunately not unique. Countless families across America are being bankrupted by the high cost of insulin.

**Enough is enough. Children like Isaiah deserve to receive the life-saving care they need, without breaking the bank.**_And I couldn’t be prouder to introduce legislation that aims to do just that._

I know we have a long road ahead to get this passed, but as I told WCPO Cincinnati ([**article**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60344310/396802387/153129693?_amp=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjExMWQzYS1mYmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEmob43JOUkAGQ_egxBE2WTuE0ku9Fw492_2euiMwRM=&emci=ad55e2da-d9c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f6111d3a-fbc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10283101)), I think my colleagues will do the right thing for our children. Our future depends on it.

I’m honored to share this moment with you, team. Thank you for everything.

With appreciation,

Greg | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60344311/396802388/-373411488?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.17_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjExMWQzYS1mYmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEmob43JOUkAGQ_egxBE2WTuE0ku9Fw492_2euiMwRM=)
---

name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: bumping
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
Hi friend,
I wanted to make sure you got this message my campaign sent out earlier this week. With less than 100 days until our Primary Election, we're in a make-or-break moment for this campaign. Is there any way you can make a quick donation to help us mark this critical milestone? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
I am running because I want real investment in public education, better healthcare for all Virginians, criminal justice reform focusing on rehabilitation rather than punishment, and an economy that works for everyone. But to make these goals a reality, I need you with me.
Your contribution of any amount will help us spread our message across our district and energize voters with our vision for a better commonwealth that puts our families front and center. I know we can win this election, and I am confident that your support will ensure our community is better served.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Thank you for all you do,
Lashrecse Aird
– Begin Forwarded Message –
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Hi friend,
We're just 100 days out from our June Primary Election -- and we have our work cut out for us!
Want to help? Donate now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
We're fighting every day to ensure the issues that matter most to Virginia families stay at the forefront of this election. Together we can build a stronger economy that works for all of us, ensure access to reproductive freedom, and hold MAGA extremists in our State Capitol accountable.
That's why Lashrecse is running to be your next State Senator, friend -- because that work needs to be done.
But to win this nomination, we must ensure our campaign has the funding to meet our goals and effectively communicate Lashrecse's vision to our district.
So, friend, as we mark the last 100 days until this primary and approach our upcoming end-of-quarter deadline, we're hoping we can count on you to get us over the finish line. We have big plans, and we know that our grassroots campaign can deliver -- but only if we all work together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Thank you again for having our backs,
-Team Lashrecse
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.17.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

|
Greetings!
Could you please make a donation today? Our next fundraising deadline is exactly 2 weeks away. And I really need your help.
The Republican Primary is less than 3 months away on Tuesday, June 20, and we have our biggest campaign expenditures in the next couple of weeks to let voters know about the Republican Primary.
Our NEXT BIG fundraising deadline is Friday, March 31 at midnight, and I need YOUR help.
Would you please give your most generous donation today?
You may donate online or by mail. body:
Sorry to bother you, friend – but your insight is so important that I had to reach out one more time before we finalize our next steps for March.
---
**Will you take just one minute to complete our new 2023 Priorities Survey? I had my team create this personalized link just for you:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/brown-2023-march-prio/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60345485/396809073/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk59-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjRiYWRmZC1mZWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JGWikTRNRa6YhOMaUx3l4gjOFyTa0Szes3OHPKOV9Xw=&emci=f75dc0c7-0bc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=af4badfd-fec4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)**
In solidarity,
Sherrod
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sherrod Brown**
Date: Fri, Mar 3, 2023
Subject: I’m asking you to weigh in
| | |
---
Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this:
I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure _your_ __ voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor.
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made in the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. **But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking folks like you to weigh in.**
I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since I can only be in one place at a time, our 2023 Priorities Survey is the next best thing:
[**So please, friend, will you take just a moment now to share your thoughts with me in our new priorities survey? Your unique perspective is critical to helping us defend this seat, keep the Senate blue, and continue making progress for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60345486/396809074/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk59-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjRiYWRmZC1mZWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JGWikTRNRa6YhOMaUx3l4gjOFyTa0Szes3OHPKOV9Xw=&emci=f75dc0c7-0bc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=af4badfd-fec4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60345487/396809075/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk59-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjRiYWRmZC1mZWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JGWikTRNRa6YhOMaUx3l4gjOFyTa0Szes3OHPKOV9Xw=&emci=f75dc0c7-0bc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=af4badfd-fec4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)

name: Team Kunce
subject: Our best line of defense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
GOP insiders + Hawley’s campaign have attacked Lucas from the moment he got into this race — and we need your support to fight back.
#
Peter,
There’s a reason Josh Hawley + national Republicans keep attacking Lucas Kunce. **They’re scared — and they should be.**
From the moment he got into Missouri’s U.S. Senate race, exactly two years after Josh Hawley ran away from the rioters he raised his fist for outside the Capitol on January 6th, Lucas has exposed Hawley as the fraud he really is — on cable news, on social media, and directly to Missouri voters.
**[HELP US KEEP IT UP »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29265?refcode=em20230317-2867&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2867%2E614464%2E2xgKte)**
**GOP insiders know Lucas has a real shot to defeat Josh Hawley in 2024.** And they know his message of taking back power for everyday people can win in Missouri. So they’re doing everything they can _right now_ , while it’s still early, to slow down our grassroots momentum.
First, insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee called Lucas “unhinged” for wanting to take on a coward like Hawley. Then DC special interests + Hawley’s campaign teamed up to attack Lucas’ voice — criticizing him for sounding like... a man from Missouri?
With so much time between now and Election Day, who knows what other kinds of weird + desperate attacks they’ll use to tear Lucas down. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we stay prepared to fight back at any moment. So Peter:
**[Can you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you think is best toward our movement to elect Lucas Kunce right now? Early support from real people like you is our best line of defense from GOP attacks and gives us the resources to reach voters with Lucas’ message in the early months of this campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29265?refcode=em20230317-2867&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2867%2E614464%2E2xgKte)**

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m a farmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families

|
---
| Can I explain something, Peter?

I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.

In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.**

Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.

I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.

The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.

**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**

[_**That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $5 between BACKROADS PAC and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60345596/396810350/1999187487?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230317-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWFiNTJkNi1mZmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AJV7EdlsFMf3zB_C2iaAtAS7X_EGXxpfIjmnwp4ygbk=)

name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: Headlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
This is why Cori’s leadership is so necessary right now.
#
Peter,
It may be what many consider the “off-year,” but for those whose lives are disproportionately affected by the decisions of elected officials, we know there is no off-year.
Just look at the way Republicans are attacking Black and Brown majority-cities and their ability to self-governance:
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230317.tk2cnS&refcode=em20230317-2348&t=1&akid=2348%2E1082990%2Ej5JCSi)
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230317.tk2cnS&refcode=em20230317-2348&t=2&akid=2348%2E1082990%2Ej5JCSi)
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230317.tk2cnS&refcode=em20230317-2348&t=3&akid=2348%2E1082990%2Ej5JCSi)
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230317.tk2cnS&refcode=em20230317-2348&t=4&akid=2348%2E1082990%2Ej5JCSi)
From the Texas Education Agency taking over the Houston Independent School District with no inclusion of local officials to Mississippi and Missouri’s state governments taking control of the water and criminal justice systems in Jackson and St. Louis, respectively, the GOP’s national assault on our communities is clear.
**They are intentionally undermining the will of the people in these communities and placing the power of health, education, and criminal justice in the hands of state-appointed white officials.**
Organized political assaults on Black and brown communities by Republicans is nothing new, Peter, but that’s why Cori’s leadership is so necessary right now. As a life-long community organizer and the first activist from the movement in defense of Black lives elected to federal office, we need to keep Cori on the frontlines of this fight.
**[Please make a donation of any amount today towards supporting Cori and she takes on injustice on behalf of the people in St. Louis and beyond. Your grassroots support keeps our movement strong.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230317.tk2cnS&refcode=em20230317-2348&t=5&akid=2348%2E1082990%2Ej5JCSi)**
**[Rush $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230317.tk2cnS&amount=5&refcode=em20230317-2348&t=24&akid=2348%2E1082990%2Ej5JCSi)**
Thank you for your support. We’ll keep you updated as Cori and our movement work together towards justice.
In solidarity,
Adrastos, Campaign Manager
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230317?refcode=em20230317-2348-footer&t=25&refcode2=2348_1082990_j5JCSi&akid=2348%2E1082990%2Ej5JCSi) **

name: Ro Khanna
subject: What can we learn from the SVB collapse?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
No one should have to forego medical care for the sake of financial stability.
#
Friend,
The collapse of Silicon Valley Bank is a reminder of the need to impose strong regulations on banks. Because the thing is, we could’ve easily avoided this disaster.
SVB is in my district. Years ago, when they lobbied for Donald Trump’s bill to weaken Dodd-Frank, the Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act, I flat-out told them no and voted against the measure. However, despite the warnings from progressives like myself and Senator Bernie Sanders, Republicans went ahead and eviscerated Dodd-Frank.
Powerful special-interest groups hold the lion’s share of the blame. [Lever News recently reported](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11311?t=7&akid=2653%2E946728%2EVvKfPp) on the banking lobby’s successful efforts to avoid paying more into the Deposit Insurance Fund, which protects depositors from banking failures.
**This is shameful.** [**Sign if you agree: It’s time to reverse these disastrous Trump-era policies to protect the American people.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11312?t=8&akid=2653%2E946728%2EVvKfPp)
In addition to risking the financial stability of bank customers, failing to properly restrict large and mid-size banks harms small hometown banks that serve as lifelines for their communities. These are the banks that provide loans for mortgages, small businesses, construction, and so much more. Without these banks, wealth and financial services would be concentrated in megabanks like Citigroup, JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, and Wells Fargo, with a long history of taking advantage of their customers.
Congress has the power to keep this from happening again. Senator Elizabeth Warren of Massachusetts and Representative Katie Porter of California have introduced the Secure Viable Banking Act, which would restore the restrictions on mid-size banks repealed by the Trump administration.
The economic collapse of 2008 showed us that destroying safeguards and eliminating repercussions that would have prevented the collapse of banks like SVB can only cause harm to everyday Americans.
**Robust regulations will prevent future instability.**[**Tell Congress: Pass the Secure Viable Banking Act.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11312?t=9&akid=2653%2E946728%2EVvKfPp)
In solidarity,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230317-2653-footer&t=10&refcode2=2653_946728_VvKfPp&akid=2653%2E946728%2EVvKfPp)**
---

Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto: info@rokhanna.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Ro for Congress, PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051.

body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c39326fecb834bcabef87775a4a7d346&_e=f8Ppd9hTX99MnVpD6S9Q51yljZIbAOYzjkhqgrh9xFfUSOaSiP8XLpNZx0Vqj0bUmsjdhAXyJ1JYOqZ6iiL1j10FW-px7Q10x6AHOifSEhtr-tILimiMDAFdxWus7QGHSjL0vPyJ-EveKj3PfZ3JtF8_yidq3ONn8jG55qZrj3wgvrgnTliOHzN7KbTNXvnAYVu2vw_pesrhqIUfAQUohkH4ZMWGnIfeecRkyaFvPUuR_4z3gVma8QZYo5NkJs-BTr_w_d35AXuR8gfuD1b8m9sxN-F1AAw4KMezDnHyfGlsRq6p9-GBEe8VmVi7Yzr_ViinZp2krmbzg32JJ9im2g%3D%3D)

---
| | **Border Chaos Continues 🚨**
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c39326fecb834bcabef87775a4a7d346&_e=f8Ppd9hTX99MnVpD6S9Q54eAHUw8xe0B1BJALndd951hgAuA8R6e3lwuOh0GYUVk4gSWlenLpYgc9wkCGFWsFgoDv6WwHnXx_vm0Uiwc5Q--sv5FYvhyndhkL46frAlmrMcZnJl0aohSdnWJQ8quhmt8dfpj8-vYo2QIqcxTnGrAc1jWLvgI8Y6CqohNSG0ewUA01YdciI5XR_J3-rIpXG5QCvYFRRl-ItlYstNtjmI%3D)
---
Well folks, I have bad news for you. I can now confirm that the southern border crisis is much worse than you think it is. I spent some time on the banks of the Rio Grande earlier this week, and the craziness unfolding is downright stomach-turning. I was in Eagle Pass, Texas ([a hot spot for illegal border crossings](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c39326fecb834bcabef87775a4a7d346&_e=f8Ppd9hTX99MnVpD6S9Q54eAHUw8xe0B1BJALndd95371-_S4XpDYTTsLEpNffJK43QZJFPd4sobYFGfWLghUS0Ll_9QmU9SKJbHLX4uZjqZL32h76eMzH7UHSf6uWaPCRVlsdFYO1xNLArNrNJ4m6Yl4dAA9eSTg26BeJPVWtPupVOx3wluyTfnu_mi7S1MTxihshLPJgDwntCD8dSKkoHBOG7s0KoFNmgd1jOeS9A%3D)) to get a closer look at the pure lunacy the Biden administration has allowed to go down. Border agents are overwhelmed and don’t even have the [critical resources](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c39326fecb834bcabef87775a4a7d346&_e=f8Ppd9hTX99MnVpD6S9Q57iRkVZMLmIQE4W4YCKAiJY0HPPTYU-25AbrkBH425aNEpRKRq_nAe_XHFQanXNTZj-NyFezMMj3BGpvInJ1CyHbrh4AXBIhEOZW2rB4t4Qk9TIvhEuCSA61x8k1B-ycP4Lvw2jqTsyxWopGqIRdYCGUVul1UCUHhO9Zu5BMi-WbAs4ReaA2Ts5049qVS4p0tT63yzASJQN4-R0Vu86ZxsdYCIGFyshhNA43e4lpDvAAGTbJpQiPEp-cwH-rZQ4oZ-QINv1HLAMaz7vhdp1Ug_F6la5PyioVmWS8KLMkI1u0sxT6z2CFwXtrFOdQtUMdmali2m5L-tZz6r5Yjs8x6bk0dbNHvq8IJt68HEKd2XdU) they need. What a complete slap in the face for the men and women who have the harrowing job of protecting our national security daily. There’s a lot at stake, but one thing is true: We must come together and fix this mess. Democrats need to check their egos at the door and call it what it is—a major problem at a border that needs to be closed. As usual, the United States will have to take the reins and [help these countries create jobs](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c39326fecb834bcabef87775a4a7d346&_e=f8Ppd9hTX99MnVpD6S9Q5zsG2LUkdPzMJE7nHq6O3y6eJf5E4vlvOnsQ8ndvgpGILmw0Ksx9roC9Kt94TpF1OSAMVs7xU06NgwX_Iu3pYVvyQ2amo2V6XSTtJ2WqChsWUBmmx5Rom46rzlgRdR5mn3LoB00ZXiRoHKcEIC78KZENS60akbj9rE32QhqLOHs8fVSOq8PgRPN9QXxIplrG_gO9utxlXgD5LxONfdCCDmj0ScJHpB7OcbWPaSUCKdSpU9Ab7WvaivX7LKc9PMDOTQ%3D%3D) that encourage their citizens to stay put. And to be clear, I’m not talking about sweatshops. I’m suggesting we find god-honest ways to attract profitable businesses to go down there and employ people for the long haul. In the meantime, let's rally around Republicans who support strong border security, so we can send a message to the Biden administration that they are accountable for their destructive open border.
---
| | |
---
| | **Caring For Our Nation’s Heroes 🇺🇲**
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c39326fecb834bcabef87775a4a7d346&_e=f8Ppd9hTX99MnVpD6S9Q5wEMSJDtBMaEENR7UbRC4JTDCQDWctd4onsKzgBBpubzlAFa939Wj8J5QiVmELtTOqz31-3yH4CIYapvZoER2VMTKY8T-oag6KDG6jDGsq3X7-GwUOmCP0FuFnHZYx9rMixmOdVrr11LaHJDlVKeyhiRZvLam-3ibkatdHAHyUKqwfCN-z6CgyY7ys3mzb84ElmoffoyIbim9UzGhJNuK0AvfPdSrtm5E0RQIikv8h_iWisd_eEvHtxp3Ko0g-kQEfyUXEU3XojHE3OXey4r00g%3D)
---
The fine folks of Tennessee know that taking care of our veterans is essential—and [one Knoxville woman](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c39326fecb834bcabef87775a4a7d346&_e=f8Ppd9hTX99MnVpD6S9Q5wEMSJDtBMaEENR7UbRC4JTDCQDWctd4onsKzgBBpubzlAFa939Wj8J5QiVmELtTOqz31-3yH4CIYapvZoER2VMTKY8T-oag6KDG6jDGsq3X7-GwUOmCP0FuFnHZYx9rMk9QiEQU7itmu9y-PzRW7Bt3eWXlNk5Qy2bPJJyXKwvUgQ1oYhbVjN6KYg5YofmJEY-SxtajwZXb49iUCvOBn17cW8Alnl8ljjAemjd-dbpdCyRWD_-0_cPD7HyKmFXrh3RSfOBGQDnKxqv3Y-4v7AQ%3D) has committed her life to do just that. From meal prep to shopping and cleaning, there are tasks that are hard to tackle as we age. But many people, especially our resilient veterans, want to be independent. That’s where Vickie Haberbosch (a veteran and former registered nurse) comes in. She founded [Family Home Care Services](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c39326fecb834bcabef87775a4a7d346&_e=f8Ppd9hTX99MnVpD6S9Q533S6jwporqolhnhkUT5w9I82idyAF13FYwThftlRKL0lwSO3hfojz0DYAbpCjp08HpoF7LSekf0N_6dTHLsCvO4IYruV-iEQLLcaoPHRTsSIqq2h_ldy7EQBYyJvQueNJBuNXY9n7YFaaKZE3dGvolVz4tlk7ZhuDPbqttcKmJMtzHEx60zJey8id8I5MgBIg%3D%3D) to provide top quality, non-medical home care services to those who proudly served our country. The small business is even providing trauma recovery services at a local church. There’s nothing better than seeing our veterans get the help and resources they need. This is just another example of the great things Tennesseans are doing to make a difference!

subject: Good news, bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=64%2E35263%2E0FDj1W ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter,

We’ve got some bad news and some good news:

We’ll start with the bad: Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is
rapidly approaching, and with a Senate seat up for grabs here in
Wisconsin, national Republicans will be watching our numbers closely. They
have tens of millions of dollars stashed in their war chest ready to
attack us if they think we look weak.

But here’s the good news: If everyone reading this message pitched in even
just $1 (yes really, that’s not a typo!), we’d hit our fundraising goal in
no time. So we’re asking:

[ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1873?t=1004&akid=64%2E35263%2E0FDj1W ]Will you pitch in just $1 to help us build the resources we’ll need to
protect the Senate majority?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1874?t=1005&akid=64%2E35263%2E0FDj1W ]CHIP IN $1 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1875?t=1006&akid=64%2E35263%2E0FDj1W ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1878?t=1009&akid=64%2E35263%2E0FDj1W ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1879?t=1010&akid=64%2E35263%2E0FDj1W ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

To Tammy, the act of donating is more important than the amount you give.
That’s because every time you pitch in, you’re showing your support for
Tammy’s work fighting for progress for Wisconsin’s working families — from
lowering the price of prescription drugs to protecting reproductive
freedom. So, even though $1 might not seem like a lot, every contribution
really does make a difference.

We’re very grateful for anything you’re able to contribute today. It means
the world to Tammy, and to our whole team

— Team Baldwin

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

body:
Thank you to everyone who attended and supported my St. Patrick's Day event. | | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=a7cb1c09e7&e=292fde286a)

| Dear Peter,

Thank you to everyone who supported my St. Patrick's Day party this week. It was my pleasure to host so many familiar faces and reconnect with our campaign community.
[](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=ad48b0fbd2&e=292fde286a)
I ran for Congress to fight for the future of our democracy and planet. We need to protect and strengthen our democracy and transition away from our reliance on fossil fuels towards a greener future. Our kids deserve it.

My first big fundraising deadline is approaching, [can you contribute today to help support our efforts?](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=98fbe87981&e=292fde286a)
---
| Sincerely,
Kevin Mullin

subject: Free and fair elections under attack in NC

body:
There’s a tough fight ahead of us, but I know I have a strong network of supporters ready to defend free and fair elections.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60346548/396813646/-340664628?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230317-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTJiN2JlMC0wM2M1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydutB1VbzOUz-C6ZcD5ggi7KbcxbaJRKe5NxI9GWITM=)

| Peter,

Republicans have shown time and time again that they are willing to attack voting rights to stay in power.

Their latest efforts to reverse North Carolina’s gerrymandering ruling could jeopardize the rights of millions of North Carolinians at the ballot, and further disenfranchise Black and Brown communities. I ran for Congress to protect voting rights and stand up to far-right Republicans.

There’s a tough fight ahead of us, but I know I have a strong network of supporters ready to defend free and fair elections. name: Katie Porter
subject: In front of a whiteboard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
SCOTUS, Willow Project & women in politics
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19552%2E3422442%2EE-2RVm)
Derek,
Earlier this week I visited UC Davis. The students came prepared with some great questions, and I felt right at home in front of this whiteboard. Keep reading to get a glimpse inside the event, **_[and consider chipping in to help us continue putting on events like these.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230317-1?amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode=EMAF17_1_Q&A_20230317_V2_F&refcode2=19552_3422442_E-2RVm&akid=19552%2E3422442%2EE-2RVm)_**
[**__**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230317-1?amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode=EMAF17_1_Q%26A_20230317_V1_F&refcode2=19552_3422442_E-2RVm&akid=19552%2E3422442%2EE-2RVm)
**Question: What do you think about expanding the Supreme Court?** **Answer:** _We should expand it. Right now, our Supreme Court doesn’t just lean conservative, it’s corrupt. The Court is only taking up cases that further an agenda being pushed by a handful of corporations and Republican mega-donors. I believe we should implement term limits, work to get politics out of our judicial system, and implement a judicial code of ethics—it’s appalling that we don’t already have one!_
---

**Question: What do you think about President Biden’s decision to move forward with the Willow Project?** **Answer:** _The Biden Administration has helped us make real investments in clean energy, but this new drilling in Alaska is a step backwards, and this is a perfect example of why Big Oil shouldn’t be involved in politics. Right now, I’m pushing Big Oil to clean up the messes they’ve made and fighting for our country to truly transition to cleaner energy._
---

**Question: What advice would you give to a young woman who wants to run for office?** **Answer:** _Here are a few things I really dislike: getting dressed up, giving speeches, having my picture taken. I tell you this because it illustrates that I *never* thought I would run for office, and because there is no one path towards being elected. My advice for young folks interested in running for something is to pursue service in any way you are passionate about, whether that is organizing to pass gun violence prevention laws or unionizing your workplace. _We desperately need more diverse voices in every level of government, and our Senate is still made up of just 25% women. Our country needs more young, progressive leaders in government._
---
It was great to meet with and hear from the UC Davis community. Now, onward to the next campaign stop!
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230317-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF17_1_Q%26A_20230317_V1_F&refcode2=19552_3422442_E-2RVm&akid=19552%2E3422442%2EE-2RVm)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF17_1_Q%26A_20230317_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19552_3422442_E-2RVm&akid=19552%2E3422442%2EE-2RVm)**

| | Peter, the teachers unions representing the Los Angeles Unified School District, announced plans to strike, shutting down hundreds of schools and leaving parents and students with zero options. Children's education is being held hostage by powerful unions that care more about their own interests than the needs of our children.
---
| | [**TAKE ON THE TEACHERS UNIONS: $20.23**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1504807a326f4ad7b1ab6e9c8d43262a&_e=5SLYW-2BnMOv4EBjZCtu5bJQrL_-KNyEgmmkpiPaF-_EgzlNPMlns2b_mXE8yQdqALsAnyhmPkMKCZcnlYze25GAw9RLeL4r3Hb33SJCZ4BPWYfDQHyQLPORYJBjf_P3l5NnjhFPs52vcnD4ffKljXn_DxlYFUEjlitaamlYVEs1BWThLEg6y_GZzoAqjY5lizkyB6i6CQjdTmCCj0JO8NLiQDFpXQpnW6RvO5exBixXqQN-bsJ-KdgjqebnS3msTs2rlGTvH2xRWv5CAYSGEZbSGT7z81beh7KHYZ5n2YpgscqBfa42UXJCqs1F-NMbnqS0nbbVKm88V-LR12wYVCd92n9xh1ncXR7Vgrni5XNxKokN8sTrAREsFzwd6CTkOc6Ob461HhGk30l7kzN07O_QukBP9bICne90uygllq2e0cgEHLeN0M_L9Tmtuj_KqkuacsJMY5AE577PEyeadv6RyPt7Op3wMomfBpFbhgQ%3D)

| | Parents and students not only deserve a say in education but also to _actually_ receive that education. **This is why school choice is the most critical fight of our generation. ** The American Federation for Children is leading the fight to bring education freedom to families nationwide, **but we need your help. ** Teachers unions led by school choice opponents like Randi Weingarten are doing everything in their power to slow school choice momentum. **These strikes are hurting thousands of families and leaving them without options. name: Sen. Tim Kaine (via Democrats.org)
subject: I’m running for reelection, and I need you by my side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I’m proud of everything we've accomplished together, but there is so much still to be done. That’s why I’m running for reelection -- and it’s why I hope you’ll help start my campaign strong. | |
---
Derek -- I’m officially running for reelection to the U.S. Senate! The outpouring of support since I announced has been so energizing, and I’m ready to hit the campaign trail all across Virginia in the months ahead. I’ve been a public servant for a long time -- having served as a missionary, a civil rights attorney, and at local, state, and federal levels for our great Commonwealth. **And one thing I’ve learned along the way is that, if I’m going to run for office, I better build a true grassroots team -- because without people like you by my side, I know I can’t win.** So, I’m asking: Will you split a $10 donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC today to defend our Senate majority and elect Democrats up and down the ballot?

clean_body: I’m proud of everything we've accomplished together, but there is so much still to be done. That’s why I’m running for reelection -- and it’s why I hope you’ll help start my campaign strong. | | Derek -- I’m officially running for reelection to the U.S. Senate! The outpouring of support since I announced has been so energizing, and I’m ready to hit the campaign trail all across Virginia in the months ahead. I’ve been a public servant for a long time -- having served as a missionary, a civil rights attorney, and at local, state, and federal levels for our great Commonwealth. And one thing I’ve learned along the way is that, if I’m going to run for office, I better build a true grassroots team -- because without people like you by my side, I know I can’t win. So, I’m asking: Will you split a $10 donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC today to defend our Senate majority and elect Democrats up and down the ballot? Look, we've accomplished a lot together these last few years: \-- We’ve lowered the costs of both health care (including insulin) and energy with the Inflation Reduction Act. \-- The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law is the biggest commitment to infrastructure since the Interstate Highway system initiative in the Eisenhower Administration. \-- We’re bringing back American manufacturing jobs with the CHIPS Act. \-- We enshrined protections for same-sex couples at the federal level with the Respect for Marriage Act. \-- And, for the first time in decades, we passed major federal legislation to tackle the scourge of gun violence in our country. I’m so proud of everything Democrats have delivered for working families. But as folks across our Commonwealth and the country continue to face challenges, I know there is so much still to be done. Let’s do this! Tim Tim Kaine U.S. Senator, Virginia Former DNC Chair The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot this cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. body:
I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.

| Peter,

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.

So I am asking:

[_**Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Fight for Progress and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. body:
The fossil fuel industry has endless resources to fill the pockets of elected officials and cover their tracks as they continue to pollute our planet.

| | | **The fossil fuel industry is destroying the climate — and legislators won't do anything to stop it.**

_\- The HuffPost_
---
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60347945/396817878/-1803454529?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230317-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmMDFkOTdmLTA4YzUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6O6SGqWlgShaxa6ubrxQlPEaZG6kEobvrZ0FMS4SyV4=)
---
Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out with an important message: I recently wrote an op-ed for **HuffPost.**

We have been more frequently experiencing devastating natural disasters – from deadly wildfires to freezes to hurricanes and more. _**But the truth is there is nothing natural about them.**_

These tragedies are a direct result of corporate greed. The fossil fuel industry has endless resources to fill the pockets of elected officials and cover their tracks as they continue to pollute our planet. On both sides, it has always been about putting _**profit over people.**_

**The recent train derailment in East Palestine, OH – which spilled a toxic chemical, vinyl chloride, into the community – is a dangerous example of how the fossil fuel industry avoids consequence. The same industry produced the toxic chemical to produce plastics, but since it’s profitable, the government looks the other way.**

That’s why it’s crucial now more than ever to elect climate champions that refuse to take even a penny from the fossil fuel industry and have a proven record of climate action. clean_body: The fossil fuel industry has endless resources to fill the pockets of elected officials and cover their tracks as they continue to pollute our planet. | = | | | The fossil fuel industry is destroying the climate — and legislators won't do anything to stop it. \- The HuffPost | = Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out with an important message: I recently wrote an op-ed for HuffPost. We have been more frequently experiencing devastating natural disasters – from deadly wildfires to freezes to hurricanes and more. But the truth is there is nothing natural about them. These tragedies are a direct result of corporate greed. The fossil fuel industry has endless resources to fill the pockets of elected officials and cover their tracks as they continue to pollute our planet. On both sides, it has always been about putting profit over people. The recent train derailment in East Palestine, OH – which spilled a toxic chemical, vinyl chloride, into the community – is a dangerous example of how the fossil fuel industry avoids consequence. The same industry produced the toxic chemical to produce plastics, but since it’s profitable, the government looks the other way. That’s why it’s crucial now more than ever to elect climate champions that refuse to take even a penny from the fossil fuel industry and have a proven record of climate action. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s put our planet and people first, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. **Look, no one thought that a first-generation Latina from Adams County would beat the odds and make history — but we did!** You’re the reason I’m in Congress, Peter. This incredible grassroots team showed up for me every step of the way, and because of you, I have the privilege of representing my community in Congress.

_Now, we have to do it again._ **But with Republicans already targeting me with dishonest ads, and planning on spending millions of dollars to unseat me, we need to fight back and show that we’re not going anywhere.**

Peter, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Yadira Caraveo to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Yadira’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Colorado’s 8th district. But with Yadira serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: (FINAL DAY) Sign the petition to the Senate: Quickly process backlog of Biden's judicial nominees
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD~ ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfkr-~~

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/ambdFrYA__

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9305847&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDQ1Mjc4OQS2&spReportId=MTcwMDQ1Mjc4OQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9305847&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDQ1Mjc4OQS2&spReportId=MTcwMDQ1Mjc4OQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~dv33S_ ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTqez99J-/MXhuQXdSdlU0LzVPdUhrMG5rSWdxOUpTMXphZEhKcTVHUHVtTDkvM2xuMnROaWVxRjYwbjhXU2c1a0JvcTZCT2hUSWk4YUZ1eldBditNWG11M1ZnTVhINjZYbElQUnZaalZjZEMvRFpMam89S0/

subject: F*ck this.
