body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is
outrageous:

Andrew Cuomo — who resigned in disgrace — is apparently launching an
organization called Progressives for Israel. 🤔

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131447?refcode=em20230317-28034&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28034%2E1203867%2E186fmd ][IMG]
Andrew Cuomo isn’t a progressive. He allowed elderly people to die during
the early days of the pandemic and has been accused of disgusting acts of
sexual harassment.

We’re true progressives and that means standing by the fight for
Palestinian human rights as well as all human rights here and abroad. We
will always support Palestinian human rights and continue to speak out
against fake progressives like Andrew Cuomo who tell us otherwise. But, we
need your support in order to continue our work of recruiting and electing
real progressives to Congress who will fight for Palestinian and human
rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131447?refcode=em20230317-28034&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=28034%2E1203867%2E186fmd ]Will you contribute $3 right now to say that you support
human rights and agree that Andrew Cuomo is not in any way a true
progressive?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131447?refcode=em20230317-28034&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28034%2E1203867%2E186fmd ]Contribute $3

No matter what — if you can donate today or not — thank you so much for
being a part of this movement to transform the Democratic Party from the
inside out. Together we will continue to make change.

In solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28034%2E1203867%2E186fmd ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28034%2E1203867%2E186fmd ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28034%2E1203867%2E186fmd

## My infrastructure task force bill advanced out of the Transportation committee
SB 233, a bill I authored to study traffic fatalities and infrastructure safety in Indiana, passed out of the Senate this week! This bill will help protect Hoosiers whether they walk, ride or drive. I'm so proud to see it moving through the Legislature and will work with my House colleagues to ensure it crosses the finish line.
[Read More](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Nk3ROWJBAwE_iKmzAmr8rZ3sJfrKS8u7SAHH5HnnHwc/s/2950175210/br/156375746266-l "Read about this article")

---
## Legislature must focus on creating better outcomes for children
New data shows that Hoosier kids are suffering with worse rates of depression and are continuing to struggle in the classroom. Indiana can only continue to thrive if our children are happy, healthy, and cared for: I'll be fighting for full funding of mental health services, for exceptional schools, and to fill the gaps in care that prevent Hoosier kids from living safe and joyful lives in Indiana. Ensuring these metrics improve is one of my top priorities.
[Read More](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDgsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyMzAzMTcuNzM1NzEzNTEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2luZGlhbmFjYXBpdGFsY2hyb25pY2xlLmNvbS8yMDIzLzAzLzE2L2RhdGEtc2hvd3MtbWVudGFsLWhlYWx0aC1lZHVjYXRpb24tZGVjbGluZXMtZm9yLWhvb3NpZXIta2lkcy8ifQ.127O1n2uVscyXeImnJE0_hEjt7WDzoPp62q2rnPUGjY/s/2950175210/br/156375746266-l "Read more about this article")

name: Emily Cain, EMILYs List
subject: Your commitment to our movement deserves recognition, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | Join me and the scores of pro-choice activists who are *proud* EMILYs List members [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60348828/396820546/809333048?sourceid=1048785&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQzZDY2NS0wZGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTjv1ypZVwPvrr7wbQyw84QKeMsMUziC6MIeLHGX5gs=&emci=9043d665-0dc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9243d665-0dc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) This is it: Your very last opportunity _**this year**_ to activate your 2023 EMILYs List membership! **We're just 3,261 members shy of hitting our 150,000 annual member goal! Join me and the scores of proud pro-choice activists who have already activated their 2023 EMILYs List memberships by donating before MIDNIGHT:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60348829/396820547/809333048?sourceid=1048785&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQzZDY2NS0wZGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTjv1ypZVwPvrr7wbQyw84QKeMsMUziC6MIeLHGX5gs=&emci=9043d665-0dc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9243d665-0dc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Peter, Eighteen years ago I was starting my first term as state representative in the Maine Legislature. From the floor of the Maine House, then to the state Senate, to the campaign trail while running for Congress, and for the last five and half years as Executive Director of EMILYs List, I have been proud to be a part of this enthusiastic and unapologetic EMILYs List community that never stops fighting for reproductive rights for _everyone_. And that's why I became an EMILYs List member.

To be honest, when I received my first EMILYs List membership card in the mail in 2008, I didn't know that *every* new and renewed member receives a personalized card. It was a prized possession and I carried it in my wallet — I still do that today — and I now know that card symbolizes membership in a millions-strong community. For me, that feeling of being part of something powerful hasn't faded a bit.

**[**Want to join me and be part of the team? Donate any amount to activate your 2023 membership to get your personalized membership card. We're only accepting memberships until midnight tonight!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60348837/396820555/809333048?sourceid=1048785&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQzZDY2NS0wZGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTjv1ypZVwPvrr7wbQyw84QKeMsMUziC6MIeLHGX5gs=&emci=9043d665-0dc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9243d665-0dc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** Now, our yearly membership drives are a highlight of my year. EMILYs List was founded on a model that allowed donors (_like you and me!_) to help Democratic pro-choice women run and win. Not only can you support those on the frontlines of the fight for reproductive rights, but you can be a card-carrying member of the team that helps those women WIN up and down the ballot.

We're nearing the end of our final 2023 membership drive, Peter — which is also my last as the executive director of this incredible organization — so I wanted to ask you personally:

**We're *so close* to hitting our goal of 150,000 total 2023 EMILYs List members before this drive ends! Will you activate your EMILYs List membership for 2023 by midnight? Donate now:**

****[https://emilyslist.org/go/Membership-Last-Chance](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60348838/396820556/809333048?sourceid=1048785&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQzZDY2NS0wZGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTjv1ypZVwPvrr7wbQyw84QKeMsMUziC6MIeLHGX5gs=&emci=9043d665-0dc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9243d665-0dc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you so much — and GO TEAM!

Emily

clean_body: | | | Join me and the scores of pro-choice activists who are proud EMILYs List members This is it: Your very last opportunity this year to activate your 2023 EMILYs List membership! We're just 3,261 members shy of hitting our 150,000 annual member goal! Join me and the scores of proud pro-choice activists who have already activated their 2023 EMILYs List memberships by donating before MIDNIGHT: Peter, Eighteen years ago I was starting my first term as state representative in the Maine Legislature. From the floor of the Maine House, then to the state Senate, to the campaign trail while running for Congress, and for the last five and half years as Executive Director of EMILYs List, I have been proud to be a part of this enthusiastic and unapologetic EMILYs List community that never stops fighting for reproductive rights for everyone. And that's why I became an EMILYs List member. To be honest, when I received my first EMILYs List membership card in the mail in 2008, I didn't know that every new and renewed member receives a personalized card. It was a prized possession and I carried it in my wallet — I still do that today — and I now know that card symbolizes membership in a millions-strong community. For me, that feeling of being part of something powerful hasn't faded a bit. Now, our yearly membership drives are a highlight of my year. EMILYs List was founded on a model that allowed donors (like you and me!) to help Democratic pro-choice women run and win. Not only can you support those on the frontlines of the fight for reproductive rights, but you can be a card-carrying member of the team that helps those women WIN up and down the ballot. We're nearing the end of our final 2023 membership drive, Peter — which is also my last as the executive director of this incredible organization — so I wanted to ask you personally: We're so close to hitting our goal of 150,000 total 2023 EMILYs List members before this drive ends! Will you activate your EMILYs List membership for 2023 by midnight? Donate now: ** Thank you so much — and GO TEAM! Emily Emily Cain (she/her/hers) Executive Director, EMILYs List \--- If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to activate your 2023 membership, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded. | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: Andy is good at what he does.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
It's no surprise that a majority of Kentuckians approve of the job Andy's doing as governor. Peter —

Since coming to office, Andy has been there for Kentuckians. He led our Commonwealth throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, putting public health and science before politics. He's ensured our communities have the support and resources to recover from some of the worst natural disasters in our history. And Andy's helped to put millions of Kentuckians on better footing by expanding affordable healthcare access, investing in our kids, and creating thousands of good-paying jobs across the Commonwealth.

**That's why it's no surprise that a majority of Kentuckians – 60%! – approve of the job Andy's doing as governor. And other people agree:** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60349100/396821722/1737192232?refcode=em23_230317_esquir_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230317_esquir_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a390130e-0fc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzkwMTMwZS0wZmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UY4mR-6rH1zqFHd7pMjUme9l6eTyToZJQRmcOhUzhPE=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60349101/396821723/1737192232?refcode=em23_230317_esquir_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230317_esquir_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a390130e-0fc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzkwMTMwZS0wZmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UY4mR-6rH1zqFHd7pMjUme9l6eTyToZJQRmcOhUzhPE=)

Kentuckians know real leadership when they see it, and Andy has shown us time and time again that he is the right one for the job. From day one, he has worked across the aisle to move our Commonwealth forward.

[**Still, Andy needs your support to win re-election and protect Kentucky's progress. He's up against 12 opponents and outside groups that are spending millions to support them. Please, pitch in to re-elect Andy and protect Kentucky's progress!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60349102/396821724/1737192232?refcode=em23_230317_esquir_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230317_esquir_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a390130e-0fc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzkwMTMwZS0wZmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UY4mR-6rH1zqFHd7pMjUme9l6eTyToZJQRmcOhUzhPE=)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The bank crashes last weekend jeopardized the security of millions of American families. Kyrsten Sinema helped crash Silicon Valley Bank and put huge stress on the financial system through support for deregulation … a policy that Ruben Gallego voted to oppose. Gallego is running for Sinema’s seat and know who we trust more!
body:
She voted for this crash
| | | | |

| | | | | Peter, **Who caused the crash of the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB), _the second largest bank crash in U.S. history,_ is simple to figure out.** _One of the biggest causes of this crash_ of the kind that set in motion the Great Depression, _was none other than Kyrsten Sinema. In 2018, when Trump deregulated banks like SVB, he knew where to buy a vote. GOP Senators like Ted Cruz were easy. But, he had a "Democrat" who'd also endanger our economy: Kyrsten Sinema._ [**Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ruben Gallego? No more SVB crashes caused by greedy politicians**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7b08d5a-6ed4-4fac-9308-a45dc1070e16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Kyrsten Sinema's appalling Senate record is defined by doing whatever banks ask of her, as long as the cash keeps flowing. As Michael Daly wrote, for _The Daily Beast_ : ** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2d62bea-b032-4a55-a3c1-2dc82a0f6ac8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Rep. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: Conservative News Update **St. Patrick's Day Special Edition**
body:
Ever since Ron DeSantis joined forces with the IL GOP, one predictable phenomena has occurred: tanking poll numbers.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/52962a4b1999/conservative-news-update-st-patricks-day-special-edition?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Leaders Rally Behind DeSantis as Trump Surges and Maintains an Impressive Double-Digit Lead Over FL Governor in Latest Polls (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/il-gop-leaders-rally-behind-desantis-as-trump-surges-and-maintains-an-impressive-double-digit-lead-over-fl-governor-in-latest-polls.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis’ recent visit to Elmhurst, IL GOP leaders were out in full force, showing their support for the popular governor who’s taken a stand against the woke culture in the sunshine state.

And DeSantis didn’t hold back, nor did he disappoint, directing many of his comments towards a shared political enemy: Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker.

“During Covid, even though your governor would lock you down, his family was in Florida.”

The speech in Illinois, which mirrors a mini United States, was seen as a latest sign that DeSantis is laying the groundwork to run for president in 2024.

But ever since DeSantis’ visit to the Chicago suburbs, he continues to drop in the polls, as his potential opponent – former President Donald Trump, surges – widening his double-digit lead over the FL governor.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/il-gop-leaders-rally-behind-desantis-as-trump-surges-and-maintains-an-impressive-double-digit-lead-over-fl-governor-in-latest-polls.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Rabine: How Illinois Parents Can Stop the Marxist Billionaire (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/rabine-how-illinois-parents-can-stop-the-marxist-billionaire.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The culture of our schools in Illinois should not align with the culture of our Marxist Billionaire Gov, JB Pritzker (D).

Socialist Democrats led by Gov. Pritzker are striving to dominate our school board races across Illinois. Pritzker is investing millions of dollars, throwing his weight (political) around again.

He is back on a buying spree, buying candidates he can manipulate from Springfield with an agenda of indoctrination and union support in our local schools like we have never seen before.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/rabine-how-illinois-parents-can-stop-the-marxist-billionaire.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/rabine-how-illinois-parents-can-stop-the-marxist-billionaire.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Gov. Pritzker Extends "Supreme Executive Power" and Signs 40th COVID-19 Emergency Declaration, Says State Remains a Disaster Area (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/gov-pritzker-extends-supreme-executive-power-and-issues-40th-covid-19-emergency-declaration-says-state-remains-a-disaster-area.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
On March 3rd, Gov. JB Pritzker (D) issued his 40th Emergency Declaration, declaring that “the Governor shall have the supreme executive power” and that the State of Illinois remains a disaster area from the effects of COVID-19. Illinois remains one of only four states across the country still under a COVID-19 public health emergency declaration. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/gov-pritzker-extends-supreme-executive-power-and-issues-40th-covid-19-emergency-declaration-says-state-remains-a-disaster-area.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/gov-pritzker-extends-supreme-executive-power-and-issues-40th-covid-19-emergency-declaration-says-state-remains-a-disaster-area.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Gov. Pritzker Signs Law Making Illinois Just 3rd State to Mandate Paid Time Off for "Any Reason," Adding Burden to Small Business Owners (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/gov-pritzker-signs-law-making-illinois-just-3rd-state-to-mandate-paid-time-off-for-any-reason-adding-burden-to-small-business-owners.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
On Monday, Illinois Gov. JB Pritker (D) signed a bill into law mandating paid time off for “any reason,” making the state just the third in the US to guarantee paid leave for one full week each year, placing a tremendous strain on small business owners still struggling to recover from the pandemic and a troubled economy under the Biden administration.

Just months into his second term in office, and with rumors swirling about Pritzker’s presidential ambitions, it’s clear that he’s building a national profile and sticking to a liberal extremist political agenda.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/gov-pritzker-signs-law-making-illinois-just-3rd-state-to-mandate-paid-time-off-for-any-reason-adding-burden-to-small-business-owners.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/gov-pritzker-signs-law-making-illinois-just-3rd-state-to-mandate-paid-time-off-for-any-reason-adding-burden-to-small-business-owners.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Sources: Mayor Keith Pekau Bullies Local Businesses and Rewards Campaign Donors, Creating Optic of Pay-to-Play Politics in Orland Park (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/sources-mayor-keith-pekau-bullies-local-businesses-and-rewards-campaign-donors-creating-optic-of-pay-to-play-politics-in-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In addition to being mayor, Mayor Keith Pekau is Orland Park's liquor commissioner – meaning he approves, denies or suspends liquor licenses throughout town.

And many restaurant owners, who asked Illinois Review not to reveal their identities for fear of retribution, are worried if they don’t do what he says, as liquor commissioner, Pekau could terminate their licenses – eliminating a major source of their revenue and causing them to potentially shut down altogether.

It’s no wonder why patrons of so many of village's bars and restaurants have to fight a barrage of Pekau’s campaign signs to gain access to these establishments, as no owner would want to willingly turn off half their clientele.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/sources-mayor-keith-pekau-bullies-local-businesses-and-rewards-campaign-donors-creating-optic-of-pay-to-play-politics-in-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1676835c51-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_17_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1676835c51-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

| Hi, it’s Sharice. I know we’ve written to you a lot lately, but it’s all because the stakes in our campaign have just been raised.

Earlier this week, our race was added to the list of National Republican top targets. That might not mean anything to you, but we know from years past that this is a big signal to dark money groups to start reserving ad buys for misleading attack ads against my record in Congress.

**In other words: The 2024 race starts now.**

We have no option but to fight back–and fast. That’s why we’ve been writing to you so much, we need to ask for your help. body:
| | |
---
**POLL ALERT: A new poll shows President Biden LEADING Trump, DeSantis, Pence, AND Haley!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12267?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230317-PollAlert-BidenBeatsGOPStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230317-PollAlert-BidenBeatsGOPStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=10159%2E9716520%2EOnM4XV)
**Take our live poll: Who would you vote for in 2024?**[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12267?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230317-PollAlert-BidenBeatsGOPStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230317-PollAlert-BidenBeatsGOPStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=10159%2E9716520%2EOnM4XV)
Team, this is NOT the news Republicans wanted: **A new poll shows President Biden leading FOUR of the GOP's top potential presidential contenders!**

This is HUGE news for our fight to win in 2024 so we can **_stop_** far-right Republicans from banning abortion, cutting Social Security and Medicare, and imposing a 30% nationwide sales tax.

But now, Republicans are ramping up their attacks on President Biden, and we NEED to know if Democrats are standing with him. **Today's Live Tracking Poll closes at MIDNIGHT, but we don’t have your response on file! Please, let us know before the poll closes:**

**Who would you vote for in 2024?**[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12267?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230317-PollAlert-BidenBeatsGOPStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230317-PollAlert-BidenBeatsGOPStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=10159%2E9716520%2EOnM4XV)
Thank you,

**I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers.**

In order to afford the cost of college, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me.

And I made a promise to those businesses I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician. **I can’t imagine where I would be if my family or my community didn’t have my back.**

**But I’m worried.** National Republicans are threatening to slam the door shut on the American Dream that uplifts communities like mine.

Their plans to upend crucial student debt relief, implement a 30% national sales tax, and give handouts to the wealthy will make it near-impossible for hard working Americans to get by, much less go beyond their station in life.

**This isn’t an accident, friend. It’s a policy choice.**

It happens when National Republicans would rather work for high dollar donors and corporate Super PACs than their own communities. It happens when they bail out the mega-rich at the expense of hardworking people like my parents.

**I’m sick of it.** I’ve spent my life seeing the people of my community be left out and overlooked by people in power. And I’ve spent my career as an emergency physician and in public service fighting to change that.

[**But I need your help, folks. Together we can defeat the National GOP agenda that aims to shred the American Dream and our best line of defense is our grassroots team. Can you pitch in $10 (or anything you can afford today) toward our 1,000 donation goal today and help strengthen our Democratic agenda?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad5yVaA_CImPVuTdzGTYQn8f0bEpl1ylhzbQNCFjgZwH4uNXTgSYsXgQdBWpwTPfTQp8vk6REb_GWa5rKXZjS8rxUdQ16SiGG_pIP9nY4fqs9uq5qLT8ZmmPcp23At8kibyJxw1nWrh-lUs_TBDzOdsBCRrnJSlZFdflOY7SXRluVWrbevuihzvk7I-oknkWLJgoKQZRszJ1YGsU4nkIJ8BTpatB09aGNk3PznmN8tv7ckWNFwFST8VUUSbRz2jRWqSfgU8_B3mKw51GTTAfZpOEjFwIB2F0_SxG2-6Bcyho7XM0YSDP1MwzduQ5qewSLvQ2O3rVAGjzaHZaJ_vUd8A5u6ouOzTDoXGuC-KBa5RqL/3uk/GfXxmjjSRsqqHRzt9whyfw/h5/YyY_m2ZjRODyqsThy0sv-AnSlOlCFI1TxjdSYpWIJcc)****

subject: re: George Santos’ resignation

body:
| George Santos’ list of lies is growing EVERY DAY – so when we reached out to top Democrats to sign our letter demanding his resignation, we thought signatures would POUR IN. **__Butwe couldn’t have been more wrong.__** We’re sending our letter to Santos tomorrow morning at 9am sharp, and we need a SURGE of signatures before we do!

_If we don’t, Santos will think nobody cares about his lies and he’ll get away scot-free!_ [We’re asking one last time: Chip in $3 to add your name to our letter demanding George Santos resigns from Congress »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42093?t=6&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf) | [**DONATE $3 AND ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42093?t=7&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42004?t=8&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf)
* * *
**TO: Rep. George Santos**
**FROM: Add your name**
Dear Rep. George Santos,

I’m SICK and TIRED of your misinformation, lies, and constant scandals.

American working families need REAL support, but you’re too busy playing politics and covering up your potential crimes!!

[That’s why I’m calling on you to RESIGN NOW and gladly chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to remove MAGA extremists like YOU from public office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42093?t=9&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf)
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42093?t=10&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf)
---
We deserve genuine, honest Representatives that care about healthcare, voting rights, LGBTQ rights, accountability in our Democracy...

NOT an ultra MAGA fan who lied about his entire identity while running for office!!

[That’s why I’m signing this letter calling on you to RESIGN immediately and pitching in $3 to Voter Protection Project to ensure far-right Republicans like you never hold office again »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42093?t=11&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf)

With conviction,

_**_X Add your name_**_
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42093?t=12&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf)
---
***SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION***
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6739%2E878179%2ESAVcxf)

body:
Peter Willis, did you
see the team’s message about our new limited edition “Birdie Sanders”
sticker?

recurring donation. And if you are already a member, it’s only $5!

Bernie's podium — and we're celebrating with a new sticker depicting the
hope and joy of that moment!

This heartwarming moment in Bernie-history took place in 2016 in Portland,
OR, where a crowd of 28,000 erupted in thunderous applause.

“I think there's some symbolism here,” Bernie said. “This bird is really a
dove asking us for world peace — no more wars!”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8453?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230317_FR_sticker_0_25SP_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_sticker&t=1015&akid=4123%2E5885482%2EQvGa7k ]At this moment of great turmoil, the hope embodied in that moment is

clean_body: Calling on all Patriots | Fellow Conservatives, We need ALL THE HELP WE CAN GET if we want to take back the Senate in 2024 and put an end to the Left’s radical agenda. Ever since Joe Biden took office two years ago, our country has crumbled under his leadership. | Here is why Joe Biden is unfit to run our country: 1. High costs from inflation are hurting Americans. 2. Fentanyl overdoses are the leading cause of death for young Americans. 3. Our Southern border is wide open and in total chaos. 4. Spending on the war in Ukraine is out of control. We could go on and on, but you get the idea... The Biden administration continues to neglect the needs of Americans. He is trying to distract us by focusing on woke policies, but we can see right through it. It is clear NOW MORE THAN EVER that Biden does not have our best interest at heart. I can’t just sit by and watch the country we love crumble at our feet. Together, we have the power to change the course of America! God Bless You, and God Bless America, Rep. name: Collin Steele
subject: Hi!
body:
I’m excited to be back on #TeamLizzie
---
| | | | Hi — I’m Collin, back on the team as Lizzie’s Political Director!
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60350508/396826179/-920481049?refcode=folf230317_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM3NzA1NC0xNmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HGGbgHiVYUigHn0_NeJ26O0YgUYUczQU3hXYp1Ew9z4=)
---
I worked on Lizzie’s first campaign, starting with her back in 2017 to switch the seventh from red to blue. After working across Texas since our win in 2018, I’m excited to be back on #TeamLizzie as we work together to keep Lizzie in the House and to move our state and country forward in the right direction. I’ve been doing this a long time, and I know Lizzie is exactly the kind of leader we need fighting for us in Congress. The work we have done together has already had an impact on our Houston community and across our country, for people like my family, friends, and countless young people working for change. And there is so much more to do. I take this work seriously and I’m looking forward to being part of this consequential race with you. I’ll touch base with you in the weeks and months to come to share updates about our team, campaign, and ways you can help. [_**Here’s one thing you can do right now I’d really appreciate: Make a contribution! Every dollar — especially ahead of the first FEC deadline of the year later this month — makes a difference as we build out Lizzie’s campaign for 2024.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60350509/396826180/-920481049?refcode=folf230317_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM3NzA1NC0xNmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HGGbgHiVYUigHn0_NeJ26O0YgUYUczQU3hXYp1Ew9z4=) Talk soon, Collin

name: CaucusRoom
subject: The Tiger King Wants to be President.
body:
You won't believe what is racist now. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday! **
## **RSVP for the[March CaucusRoom Council Meeting](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-y/). **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-t/) **Hallie Got the Money** Members of the Biden family received more than $1 million in payments from accounts related to Hunter Biden's business associate. [**That account is labeled as "Robinson Walker, LLC," and one of the family members is Hallie Biden.**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-i/) **Government**** Waste** The [**Biden administration spends about $130,000 per day to store and maintain unused border wall panels**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-d/) at the southern border, and Senate Republicans are demanding answers. **Bugs for Lunch**
# A middle school in Utah **[gave sixth-grade students"disgusting" insects to eat last week as part of an English assignment on climate change](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-h/).**
**Stop Comparing Us to Nazis** Kamala Harris' husband, Doug Emhoff, said that [**the hatred that led to the Holocaust is "interconnected" to the "hatred" from parents who are speaking out at school board meetings**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-k/). In other news, Kamala **[doesn't know what she is doing](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-u/)**. **Pantry Porn**
## The recent trend of**[showing off perfectly organized and styled home pantries is rooted in a history of classist, racist and sexist social structures](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-o/) _,_ **according to one Chicago professor.
**Biden Lies** Biden **[accused congressional Republicans of pushing for law enforcement to be defunded](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-x/)** despite almost all of the GOP supporting back the blue. **Tiger King for President?** Joseph Maldonado-Passage, **[better known as"Joe Exotic" or the "Tiger King," is currently serving a 21-year federal sentence](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-m/)** after being convicted on multiple charges.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* Please **[help](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-q/)**.
* Keep them **[guessing](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-a/).**
* Stop **[pretending](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-f/).**
* Look me**[in the eyes](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkiuhid-trhiujldw-z/).**

body:
She’s staying busy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60350665/396826946/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZjNGM3OC0xN2M1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXiqqmU27vFbwm23M2fhm43e-cOo5_p6QwKmIJA9ZO0=&emci=54e1fc7a-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=046c4c78-17c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter, **_Becca’s been busy!_ Here’s what she’s been up to recently:**
1. Becca wrote an **[op-ed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60350666/396826954/1840271783?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZjNGM3OC0xN2M1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXiqqmU27vFbwm23M2fhm43e-cOo5_p6QwKmIJA9ZO0=&emci=54e1fc7a-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=046c4c78-17c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272)** about the Commission to Study and Develop Reparation Proposals for African Americans Act. We must have the courage to examine our nation's history and how it impacts our present in an honest and accurate way, and she’s committed to making progress on injustice.

2. Becca did an [_**interview with C-SPAN**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60350667/396826955/-259846054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZjNGM3OC0xN2M1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXiqqmU27vFbwm23M2fhm43e-cOo5_p6QwKmIJA9ZO0=&emci=54e1fc7a-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=046c4c78-17c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272), in which she talked about her family, career, and hobbies. _Fun fact: Becca is a rock climber, hiker, AND motorcyclist!_

3. Becca [_**visited Central Vermont**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60350674/396826957/278946212?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZjNGM3OC0xN2M1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXiqqmU27vFbwm23M2fhm43e-cOo5_p6QwKmIJA9ZO0=&emci=54e1fc7a-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=046c4c78-17c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) to learn about the biggest challenges local food producers are dealing with and held her **[first town hall](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60350681/396826970/-2069042954?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZjNGM3OC0xN2M1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXiqqmU27vFbwm23M2fhm43e-cOo5_p6QwKmIJA9ZO0=&emci=54e1fc7a-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=046c4c78-17c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272)** in Barre City to discuss the housing crisis. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **☘️ HAPPY ST. PATRICK’S DAY ☘️** **** INDems Call for Support of Public Schools Amid School Choice Expansion This week, INDems called for increased support of Indiana public schools in light of the recent lobbying efforts by school choice advocates for more private and charter school funding. As reported in the [Indiana Capital Chronicle](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351183/396828495/-82747663?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535), school choice advocates are upping their efforts to expand private and charter school options in Indiana, a move that could divert even more funding and oversight from public schools. ******[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351184/396828496/-1918601708?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)** Hoosier parents understand the importance of having education options, however they do not want to do so at the expense of public schools, which educate [nine out of ten](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351185/396828497/120894570?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) Hoosier students. Under the new GOP-backed budget proposal, families making up to 400% of the federal poverty level, roughly $220,000, would qualify for vouchers. Even members of the Indiana Republican Party are starting to distance themselves from the school choice agenda. Republican State Senator [Ryan Mishler](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351186/396828498/-2080862819?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) stated that "voucher schools are not necessarily better for students than traditional public schools'' and that "voucher schools are not subject to the same level of accountability as traditional public schools." See INDems’ release by [clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351187/396828499/1033873446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535). **** INDems are gearing up for the 2023 municipal elections and are more fired up than ever to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. With a renewed energy and focus, Indiana Democrats are committed to fighting for the issues that matter most to Hoosiers, including affordable healthcare, quality education, and job growth. ******[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351188/396828500/-591698927?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)** Candidates in cities like Carmel, Lawrence, Evansville, Michigan City, and Municie are rolling up their sleeves and getting ready to flip mayoral offices and city councils. With a strong sense of unity and purpose, the INDems is poised to make a real difference in the upcoming elections and beyond. **** Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351189/396828501/1772722896?cxt=HHwWgMCz2cfI87YtAAAA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)****[Share Rep. Maureen Bauer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351190/396828502/1772722896?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)** State Representative Maureen Bauer (South Bend) advanced a bill through the House to expand housing opportunities for all in St. Joseph County. On Thursday it cleared the Senate Committee on Local Government by a vote of 9-0. Rep. Bauer [commented](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351191/396828503/2120012838?outputType=apps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) after the bill’s most recent advancement, “This bill will help us address the number of delinquent vacant abandoned homes and increase the inventory of low to moderate housing for first-time homeowners,” [HB 1627](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351192/396828504/482449329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViZmIzOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jtxkqAhBHHEreMhZZlzScahKHhZccXMeJVeCOUze_0=&emci=4aabebba-0ac5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ce5bfb39-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ☘️ HAPPY ST. PATRICK’S DAY ☘️ ** INDems Call for Support of Public Schools Amid School Choice Expansion This week, INDems called for increased support of Indiana public schools in light of the recent lobbying efforts by school choice advocates for more private and charter school funding. As reported in the , school choice advocates are upping their efforts to expand private and charter school options in Indiana, a move that could divert even more funding and oversight from public schools. ** Hoosier parents understand the importance of having education options, however they do not want to do so at the expense of public schools, which educate Hoosier students. Under the new GOP-backed budget proposal, families making up to 400% of the federal poverty level, roughly $220,000, would qualify for vouchers. Even members of the Indiana Republican Party are starting to distance themselves from the school choice agenda. Republican State Senator stated that "voucher schools are not necessarily better for students than traditional public schools'' and that "voucher schools are not subject to the same level of accountability as traditional public schools." See INDems’ release by . ** INDems are gearing up for the 2023 municipal elections and are more fired up than ever to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. With a renewed energy and focus, Indiana Democrats are committed to fighting for the issues that matter most to Hoosiers, including affordable healthcare, quality education, and job growth. ** Candidates in cities like Carmel, Lawrence, Evansville, Michigan City, and Municie are rolling up their sleeves and getting ready to flip mayoral offices and city councils. With a strong sense of unity and purpose, the INDems is poised to make a real difference in the upcoming elections and beyond. ** Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. State Representative Maureen Bauer (South Bend) advanced a bill through the House to expand housing opportunities for all in St. Joseph County. On Thursday it cleared the Senate Committee on Local Government by a vote of 9-0. Rep. Bauer after the bill’s most recent advancement, “This bill will help us address the number of delinquent vacant abandoned homes and increase the inventory of low to moderate housing for first-time homeowners,” now heads to the full Indiana Senate to be considered further. **** Marion County is MARCHing to the Polls ** The Marion County Democratic Party continues its “MARCHing to the Polls” event series this Wednesday at United Steelworkers Local 1999. You are invited to share your ideas about how to increase voter turnout and engagement throughout the City of Indianapolis. Feel free to bring a friend as well! Visit the link below to find more details and register for the "MARCHing to the Polls" event for Pike and Wayne Townships! 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today! ** INDems IN the News Indiana Capital Chronicle: Inside Indiana Business: IndyStar: Greater Fort Wayne Business: IndyStar: IndyStar: NWI Times: WISH TV Indianapolis: WTHR Indianapolis: State Affairs: WRTV Indianapolis: Opportunities with INDems** To apply for a job with the Indiana Democratic Party, please visit or send a note to mailto:jobs@indems.org. Thank you. [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
The American Rescue Plan pumped billions into Ohio for workers and their families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351305/396828932/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230317LuckyARP_N_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ4YzJlOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyYomBJlN5vnXJvIHy5Stm3R2u-XjbzZ2HDFwqu3-Ng=) Peter, Ohio is definitely feeling lucky this St. Patrick's Day.

Two years ago, thanks to President Biden and Democrats in Congress, we took decisive action to bring funds flowing into Ohio and keep Americans on their feet through the pandemic. By passing the American Rescue Plan, we invested billions of dollars into building an economy that works for poor and working-class Americans. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60351306/396828933/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230317LuckyARP_N_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTA_p1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ4YzJlOS0xOWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyYomBJlN5vnXJvIHy5Stm3R2u-XjbzZ2HDFwqu3-Ng=) These historical investments have diffused throughout Ohio’s economy, kickstarting an unprecedented recovery. **The luck of the Irish is with us this St. Patrick’s Day as we put Ohioans back to work.**

But with a GOP-controlled House, all this progress is threatened every single day. We can’t let all our hard work go to waste, which is why I need your support right now, Peter. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Tell your Representatives: pass the Secure Viable Banking Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
We have to fix what Kyrsten Sinema broke. | |
---
Peter – The collapse of Silicon Valley Bank demonstrated the damage that Trump-era rollbacks on bank regulations are having. **Rollbacks that Kyrsten Sinema voted for, while taking THOUSANDS in donations from big banks.** In response to this crisis, Sen. Elizabeth Warren and Rep. Katie Porter introduced **the**** _Secure Viable Banking Act_****.** This legislation would restore the rollbacks on Dodd-Frank, protect consumers, and keep reckless banks and CEOs from destroying our economy once again. We’re asking folks to write their House Representatives to pass the _Secure Viable Banking Act_ and protect American consumers from another financial crisis. [**Could you quickly send your Representatives a message and share it with a friend to do the same? >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkVIL9b_UvrMEGhYpeT-jGSu6y6pj4Jimn1gB2OFy43FHBcJtPuCZl_BCKf-njYEt88heGujwZngyfP9wP0n79KRIUrXoe4xshMkDogIxqbG7OI43mtGTkbKCVAWnRNx-m_4PAHzXWzkElb-gZ23LthsCRP0HwVSkKcgO41NhVHvp7r_sTBwzPVYXTzH_yGtWJVb5MF5JNjn5Y21thIGI6czSNwIvtsfuBXrRy_fsrKPuCdy-5Xz0H6gdZHlOgIAwQwzIr2sJYudBiIKhw_60gg-zzRK43qPVwfksP3bBnZRXVJ3bORiusQa03rnZz0LCgytcwAQbl87okiKe8NPraGB4cD-UXi-GB_3wKd99Pny2Gojh2ll-DwfHkgIW4_DGO6zuu3W-fB4NYlO5GcDuus4V7eM48LvGAG-y7SIafsXOf53PDkkTiweTs21aZ_ROZhlXoJR5Q7M9gSCZHGYs4cLKbmkwBduKRL-eMwy4izNZwrfhDFY9a5P4nTrJq6Zv8-EvJdS5g9Fv5KRIyCYWrwjoCe6wnqA_EmR9nxSHcptWHMChrhNsAlAp9uJUvbKBkZnV-nlQvJy8_Q2iWY0rYkUfQb52WoIojU8y3mWM1Ocw/3uk/PyGJspljQpa3K85buNlmmA/h0/Hs-Dw9YLtRgqCYwl5IwfEIn5y_lnVKUbHmRw-l870W0) Not only did Sinema vote to rollback regulations on big banks, she also voted for legislation that would make policing them **_DRAMATICALLY_** more difficult, including central elements of bank supervision like stress tests. **Sinema also supported legislation that would reduce the capital big banks must hold to protect the financial system.** We can’t count on Kyrsten Sinema to do the right thing or prioritize working families over special interests.
